Set on the beaches of Michigan in 1994, the book depicts the joys and consequences of young love as Mara and James meet, shoot a movie, fend off bullies, and explore the potential of infinite beauty. "The Accidental Siren" is a dark, contemporary fairytale available on paperback and ebook at the end of June! To learn more, check out my website at www.JakeVanderArk.com!

authorBio:
For a ton of new writing tips, check out my new paperback and ebook, Put the Cat In the Oven Before You Describe the Kitchen! https://www.amazon.com/dp/B01CMQNVZK

"I want to offend my readers. I want them to fall in love, to lose their minds, to think and feel and dream. If they're not shellshocked and hungry by the final page, I haven't done my job."

Whether it's a modern-day fairytale or hardcore science fiction, Jake Vander Ark attacks every story with brutal realism and down-to-earth characters. No subject is taboo. Truth is paramount.

The School of the Art Institute of Chicago influenced the experimental quirks of his stories, while his pursuits in Hollywood hammered the importance of traditional storytelling. This unique fusion of structure and innovation gave life to the most beautiful girl in the world in THE ACCIDENTAL SIREN, the gritty morality tale of LIGHTHOUSE NIGHTS, the cryptic prologue of THE BRANDYWINE PROPHET, and the mind-melting climax of THE DAY I WORE PURPLE.

When Jake isn't writing, he's building rustic furniture for his small business, engaging with his readers online, and livin' it up with his dog.

description:
The snow on the mountains of the Jefferson National Park has settled. With her ankles buried deep in slush, Lily leaves her cozy cabin, bow in hand and arrows sticking out of her backpack, for the trees. There is nothing unusual about this hunt. Not until she spots something dark and mysterious underneath an old willow oak. 

Lily doesn't so much as flinch when her prey arrives. With her sharp eye, she strikes at the right moment, taking down her dinner. As she goes to collect her meat, a shadow catches her attention by the old oak tree-something that will change everything.

title: Chester And The 24-hour Lottery
description:
"Chester Drivel," he was given a tight-lipped smile, "We look forward to watching what a man such as yourself can accomplish in 24 hours. It is twenty seconds to midnight. Are you ready?"

The crowd was turning. Chester dodged a shoe and heard someone make fun of his name. It wasn't the first time his name had been disparaged but the shoe throwing was new. Chester nodded and backed away, steeling himself to run to where Vanyla was waiting.

The year is 2024 and every state has a special lottery JUST FOR YOU!
For 24 hours you can do anything your heart desires with absolutely no consequences or persecution. All you have to do is sign a DNA blood ticket and you could be the lucky winner!

Chester Drivel, a man of few words who internally cursed everything and everyone around him, finds that a rash decision may just be what's needed to discern he's got what it takes to shake up his state and the girl coming along for the ride may be even more jaded than he is.


*WARNING Mature language and content*

title: THE END OF WAR (Watty Award Winner)
description:
A secret program in the United States seeks to replace human militaries with artificial intelligence-driven machines, but the machines aren't so willing to play along.

***

Picture a world where humans no longer fight wars. No more families missing loved ones. No more veterans with lifelong mental and physical scars. No more conscription. For the super-secret End of War Project inside the United States government, such a reality is already here. The project models out how artificial intelligence can overcome dangerous and morally sensitive war scenarios with algorithms and automation. The centerpieces are "autonomous combat machines," or ACMs, that look like humans but function like supercomputers. After a string of brilliant successes in the field of combat, the End of War Project is preparing to reveal itself to the public, but something unusual stands in the way. Against their programming, the ACMs start exhibiting all-too-human signs of apprehension, guilt and compassion as they're pushed to perform ever more extreme tasks. The human leaders of the End of War Project race to find who "hacked" the ACMs, but what they find is even more startling--and revealing--than they could ever imagine. 

***2019 Watty Award Winner - Science Fiction***

title: Safe House
description:
As zombies rise, an abused woman is forced to make a change in her life.

Norma Deckard is a good wife. She does what she's told. She tries her best to never step out of line with her overbearing husband, Baron. He sets the rules and she follows them. That's how it's been for years. But then dead people begin to wake up. Norma's small little world is changing and suddenly she's never felt more trapped. She will have to face many fears and Baron Deckard is just one of them.

authorBio:

You might've seen my stories featured numerous times in the horror genre, or on one of several lists in the official Wattpad pages Fright, Wattzombie, AMC, and more! I've won the Ooorah! awards and in 2017 my story One That Got Away was shortlisted by the Wattys!

I approach horror with a variety of tactics that range from psychological to gore. Stephen King, Chuck Palahniuk, and R.L. Stine have been my biggest literary influencers.

I adore giving back to my readers when I have time by reading their horror or thriller stories and offering advice.

title: Where There's A Will
description:
An armed robbery, a kidnapping, and an enemy that's closer than anyone realises.

Inspector Stone has to put aside problems at home and an ambitious underling when the daughter of a local businessman is kidnapped, and a multi-million Euro ransom demanded for her return.
Can he find her and return her safely to her parents when the kidnappers are dangerously close to home? 

Nominated for an Ethereal Award
    
This is now the final, fully edited version of the novel which is also available on Amazon for the Kindle and in paperback.

authorBio:
I'm a lover of mystery, fantasy, history, mythology, books and film. The size of my to-be-read and to-be-watched piles don't bear thinking about, but I will get there someday.
My best memory is of drifting down the Nile in Egypt on my birthday, visiting temples, and I hope one day to return there.

Under the pen name Alex R Carver I have published 9 titles on Kindle and other places, with more to come in the future - books 10, 11, & 12 are already in the works.

title: The Witching Hour Anthology
description:
Ever wondered why the early hours of the morning are so still, so silent, and yet so ... creepy? The Witching Hour isn't just when the bars close; it's an archaic belief that sinister forces emerge between the hours of midnight and 3am, growing heightened in their powers and number.

But here on the dark side of Wattpad we don't stay up late for those phantom howls, black magic rituals and the distant footfalls of the undead. That's why, this Halloween, we're bringing the Witching Hour to Wattpad with this winning collection of short stories.

In association with Fright, ParanormalCommunity, ParanormalLovers, WattVampires, WattVampiros, WattyWolves, WattZombie and Werewolf.

title: The Haunted Town
description:
Surrounded by a dark thick forest and population below three thousand, it is the town where the demons dance in broad daylight and shadows rule during the night. Of all the places, Simone's parents think that Elmdale is the perfect town to stay hidden from the loan sharks and be together as one family.  With the mysterious deaths occurring for a decade and the administration trying to cover it up, it certainly is not a perfect place to live as a happy family...

title: Nuclear Love
description:
When 18 year-old trust fund kid Quinn York's tourist shuttle to Mars unexpectedly crashes, he wakes up only remembering one name: Celeste. He knows he has to find her no matter the cost, even if he loses his own life in the process. Quinn discovers the world is changed however; the nuclear holocaust that caused the shuttle to crash also set the world in commotion. It becomes a "kill or be killed" life for Quinn as he does anything he can to find Celeste. To do so, he must survive cruel raiders, grotesque animals, and a new breed of mutated human survivors called Skulks. 

**PLEASE NOTE: This is a progressive book, meaning throughout the book, the main character will be presented with different options. A "Choose Your Own Adventure" if you will! It is up to you as the readers to determine the actions of Quinn York. I don't know how this story will turn out, and I'm excited to see what path it takes. Will Quinn be a fearless raider killer or will he become the most horrible human being on the planet? THE READERS WILL DECIDE - HIS FATE IS IN YOUR HANDS!!!

**Please comment at the end of the chapter about which action you vote for to make it simpler for all of us. I will require a minimum number of comments/votes before moving on, which I will state at the end of the chapter. I will post a new chapter once a week, because I do have a busy life, and I will be doing several revisions on top of massive brainstorming depending on what options you all choose. So please be patient, and please "LIKE" my book to spread the love.

Thanks and enjoy reading "Nuclear"
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Food, Friends, Family, and Fantasy Fiction are just a few of my favorite things. I also like alliteration apparently!

I consider myself an amateur writer - I love it, I love reading, and I absolutely love creating worlds unique to our own. Hopefully this comes across while reading.

I have an amazing family, an incredibly beautiful and supportive wife, and two perfect little angel girls. While I have a day job, my heart is always in writing, so whenever I can spare a minute or two to do so, I indulge.

I also enjoy anything peanut butter, and I have a fascination with crème brulee! I have to try it at every restaurant I go to, and I judge the entire restaurant based on that crème brulee!

I hope you enjoy reading my works, and hope you have an excellent day!

title: Lacrimosa
description:
In 1984, 6-year-old Alexander Sedona walks into an old-fashioned schoolhouse in the quaint rural town of Oaksbury, Pennsylvania, situated in the heart of the Old Amish Country. In one of the country's safest places, the small boy never leaves the old schoolhouse. An inexplicable phenomenon, his disappearance rocks the community to the core. 

Believing the boy's disappearance to be the result of witchcraft, devil worship, or even worse, the town of Oaksbury quickly deteriorates. Three decades pass, and as the memory of Alexander Sedona's disappearance fades, so does what is left of the once-beautiful town. 

Those who remain live simple, quiet lives. Little disturbs the peace until Rosalie Andrews, the former apprentice in charge of the children that haunted night, comes across a body. The corpse is that of a stunning young woman, lying beneath the azaleas that still bloom in the yard of the abandoned school house. A black cat anxiously circles her body, a mysterious note tucked in his collar. 

The young woman's body is pristine, except for one perplexing fact. The crime lab discovers she is covered in the blood of Alexander Sedona, the schoolboy who disappeared before she was even born. 

Determined to put a lifetime of guilt behind her and lay the ghosts of her childhood to rest, Rosalie makes it her mission to find justice for Alexander Sedona--and the angelic young woman who tells his secrets from beyond the grave.

Cover credit to @TheTigerWriter and her Magic Fox. They've done a number of my covers, and have an intuitive gift of understanding my personal aesthetic. Thank you!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"If you can tell stories, create characters, devise incidents, and have sincerity and passion, it doesn't matter a damn how you write."--Somerset Maugham

* Currently on hiatus from clubs/reviews, but still writing and RPing here. @LadyGuenevere is my alter ego.

Alayna-Renee is a professional freelance author, content writer, and performer living in Southern California. Despite calling Atlanta home for over a decade, she still retains the sarcasm and the blunt charm that's courtesy of growing up in the Northeast . A former manic pixie dream girl, Alayna has never lost her child-like sense of adventure, her enthusiasm for theatre, vintage fashion, costuming, glitter, chocolate, martinis, travel, and refusing to wear a pair of socks. Hobbies include reading, writing, fashion, reality TV (and yes, she almost appeared on one of those shows), music, singing, acting, movies, video games that immerse her imagination, mail art, Etsy, RPing with friends,and Dateline mysteries.

Alayna started her writing journey as a popular and successful blogger back in the early 2000's, so sharing thoughts and feelings online is nothing new. She's explored many venues for creativity since then. She's created content for virtual worlds and video games, ghostwritten stories and novels, and written scripts for both audio and video performance. It is a lifelong dream of hers to tell an entire story worth remembering.

She holds a B.A. in Musical Theatre with a minor in Creative Writing. She lost her love, partner, and best friend of over a decade, @willjra, on 07.29.20.

Alayna is an author of dark fantasy, Gothic fiction, historical drama, twisted romance, tasteful erotica, old-fashioned poetry, and paranormal elegance. Her most successful book, "Immortally Beloved" is the first book in the saga of an unforgettable female vampire from the time of the French Revolution.

Highest rankings, awards, and general bragging lurk within the books.

No unsolicited read for reads.

title: Agent Freeman (The Model Spy Prequel)
description:
CIA Agent Zachary Freeman may live in a city of eight million, but he knows better than anyone else what it is like to be alone. And when he lives a life filled with lies and burdened with secrets, maybe being alone is the only way to keep others safe. But he soon discovers that he isn’t the only one living behind an intricately fabricated disguise, and now someone else’s lies are putting Agent Freeman in more danger than he has ever been in before.

You’ve read about Agent Zachary Freeman in The Model Spy and Making the Grade, but get to know Zach before Agent Laura Porter and a mission to Paris turned his life of lies upside down.

authorBio: I've loved making up stories since before I could physically write them! Thankfully, I no longer need my parents to scribble my stories down on scrap paper. I have been published by several print and online literary magazines and anthologies. My nonfiction essays have been recognized by contests statewide and nationally. When I'm not working, I'm curled up with a good book or have my eyes glued to my laptop, typing away.

title: The Horrors of Montwood Mansion
description:
//"Cloning and gene mutation is more common than you may think."// 

The Blackwood family has a lot of secrets. Some of which being too dark to be talked about out loud. Whether it's the fact that Olivia, the oldest, is dating her Art teacher or the fact that Mr. and Mrs. Blackwood's relationship isn't as sophisticated and happy as it seems to be, the Blackwood family is pretty skilful at hiding their deepest, darkest secrets. 

As soon as the Blackwoods move into the Montwood Mansion, they knew they had hit the jackpot. The mansion was breathtakingly beautiful with its ancient carved doors and huge, airy rooms and a spacious garden. All was well until Lucy, the youngest found a hidden basement in the house full of mysterious items.

As time passes by, Julian and Olivia realise that something sinister is happening to their sister and strange events start taking place. They soon realise that what's happening to their sister has something to do with their fucked up yet extraordinary family history, where everyone had even bizarre secrets that were too disturbing to be believed. 


A tale of horror with a pint of science.


Highest rank #1 in Sinister, #14 in Horror and #7 in Thriller

title: The House in the Woods
description:
Lilah Winters is on the run after her father loses her in a poker game to the most powerful - and dangerous - man in town, Ted Roscoe. The eighteen year old is lost with nowhere to go when by complete accident she finds the house in the woods, a dwelling shrouded in mystery and magic and a world she never thought could exist. But could she really find her sanctuary in the woods with the alluring and mysterious Apollo Ambrosia? Or will Ted Roscoe find her and shatter her dreams of a perfect life?

title: Harly

What happens when your imaginary friend gets all too real?

Emma hasn't seen her sister's family in seven years. After a fate meeting, now Emma is living with them.

authorBio:
I'm a Wattpad Creator and a Wattpad Ambassador which keeps me plenty busy! I challenge myself to write novels in different genres, and I enjoy reading all genres. About my writing style:

+ Romantic encounters in my stories are of the fade-to-black variety.

+ Scenes of graphic violence are limited and mostly used as a special effect rather than the norm.

+ Traditional gender roles.

+ Staunch defender of the serial comma.

Many people have helped me over the years to learn the writing craft. I consider helping others as a way of giving back. I'll read and comment on other Wattpad author's books (as time permits) as long as the story holds my interest.

My writing memberships include: Pennwriters, Greater Lehigh Valley Writers Group, and Perry County Council of the Arts.

title: A Girl Like Her
description:
TRIGGER warning: contains acts of sexual assault, self-harm, and swearing 
***

'Zander's lips curved into a soft smile. "No need to worry, Lala. It'll heal." His smooth voice was soothing to the ear but I didn't let it affect me- physically. 

"Lala?" I asked, changing the subject before I could let my thoughts wander. 

Zander shrugged, still smiling. It wasn't a big smile. It wasn't even a wicked smile. It was a genuine one. His damn dimples were showing again. 

"It's a nickname. Layla reminds me of Lala. Don't friends have nicks names?" He raised a challenging eyebrow, a  deep twinkle within his captivating, honey-glazed eyes. 

***

It's only been two years since the night that made Layla Adams lose any and all trust she had in anyone. Desperate for a new life, she convinces her parents to move to a new state with the promise that she'll get her act together for senior year. Two years nearly wasn't enough to stop the nightmares but Layla has grown used to sleepless nights and eases her nerves through nicotine and caffeine. And maybe a mysterious new boy who moves in next door. 
But when Layla's very own nightmare comes back in the form of reality yet again, she's going to need a little more than cigarettes and coffee to keep her wits- and maybe her life.

Cover made by: @TinBrin
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Unfashionably Dead
description:
Fashionista Cheline Morgan's life is turned upside down following the discovery of a corpse outside the building where her best friend lives. After coming to terms with the death, Cheline attempts to solve the mysterious circumstances surrounding it, while her best friend appears more guilty by the minute. Will she find the murderer before her BFF ends up in jail or worse...dead?

Jello Wrestler

Mother of four

Old, as in probably old enough to be your mother
Constantly crippled by self-doubt 
I love constructive feedback; it's the only way I can grow as a writer. I appreciate every read, vote, and comment that I receive.
I love my followers. I'm not the best at keeping in contact--I could easily be a hermit when I grow up--but I cherish each one of you. I don't do Follow-for-Follow. I honestly want to keep it real.

title: Fake Me To Church
description:
Secrets, Scandal...and Murder.

Ahmed Heavenstate just wanted to fit in. A recently adopted high school freshman in a brand new town, he'd barely gotten his foot in the door before being targeted by the headmaster's entitled son Steven. But when a cruel prank brings both boys face to face with a brutalized corpse in the school's main building, these warring adolescents are swept into a terrifying world bloodied with the long-buried secrets of their tight-lipped community.

As the passions and prejudices of old money and new acquaintances whirl relentlessly through their town of sheltered closets and the skeletons inside them, Steven and Ahmed will discover a truth more terrifying than anything their paragon of sacred laws and tradition would dare allow them to believe.

authorBio:
Hi, everyone! My name is BlueJay! I love writing, I love people, and I love Jesus even more!! I would like to start by saying that I'm really excited to be on Wattpad! To have a community of readers and writers is such a blessing, and I am very appreciative of every single person kind enough to post writing and/or review it. You are truly amazing, and I am so thrilled to be reading and writing alongside such a wonderful community. I love you all!

Favorite genres: mystery/thriller, suspense, sci-fi, and all iterations/combinations of any of these!

Favorite novels: Paperquake, Blackthorn Winter, Time Windows

For whatever reason(s), if you have any questions about me, my writing, or my likes and dislikes, please be sure to send me a PM! Comments on my profile are also welcome, depending on how public/private you want our conversation to be. I'm good with either, because I don't believe you should say in private what you wouldn't say in public; I won't send you anything in a private message that I wouldn't be comfortable with the public seeing (except maybe if we're discussing the twist ending to a book!).

Okay, that's all for now. :)

title: In Sickness and in Hell (drafted for rewrite)
description:
Paranormal // Mystery/thriller // Horror // LGBTQ+ // Novel // Completed 
~ He haunts them every night, but these two kill men in their sleep. ~ 
Devon and Tamesis have shared dreams since they met back in highschool. Every fear, hope, and dream they shared as they built their life together. Even after Devon's promising military career was shot down with her, the two have been inseparable lovers.
For years they've been on wicked adventures together, but then another person manages to sneak into their shared dream world--and he is not friendly. This strange, shadowy man changes his appearance every time in an attempt to elude them. He tries everything, from torture to seduction, in an attempt to sate his sadistic desires. He wants them for himself, dead or alive.
But when you've shared your heart, dreams, and life with someone, it doesn't matter what reality you're in together: you fight for each other.

title: The Damned Holies (The Fallen Wars 1)
description:
Angels. Cute, little Heavenly beings, right?
     Wrong.
   The angels, all sixteen of them, have been exiled from Heaven. They fell to Earth and crave revenge on God, hurting the things He loves the most; humans. They're immortal, superhumanly strong, impossibly fast, and unnaturally cunning. They're not humane; they are brutal beings who do not sympathize. They have waged a war with humanity for over two decades and Aimee Chevalier was placed right in the middle of it the second she was born.
     She is Nephilim; half angel, half human. She’s being hunted; all the human governments want her dead and the angels want her to help them take over the world by controlling or killing off the human race. She has been on the run, her adventures taking her all over the world while she tries to stay neutral and stay alive, but her time is close to expiration.
      Even the immortal run out of patience.

title: Cursed ✔️
description:
Genre: Horror/Mystery 

'Sometimes It's Better To Keep Things Untouched' 

A perfect beach trip. A mesmerising emerald stone. It looked so hypnotic and beautiful. It's just a stone, right? What could go wrong? 

What John didn't know was that his innocence was just the beginning of their ends. And whom does the whispers belong to that keeps echoing in John's head? 

Since the day John brought the stone home, eerie and creepy things began happening and even the deaths in his family. Is that all just a coincedence? And whom does the shadow belongs to that John keeps seeing? 

John, his sister, Hannah, and their friend, Emily, must act fast before the curse gets them. 

Will they be able to solve the mystery of the curse before it's too late? And who are the mutilated creatures following John around?

description:
NOW AVAILABLE ON AMAZON IN EBOOK AND PAPERBACK
-----
It's all a game.

How much does the life of three hostages weigh against the life of an entire city?

For ex-detective Henry Wood, hunting a diamond thief seems like the best way to get him and his partner back into the team. Back into their jobs. It's been a year since they were fired and it can't go on like this.

His over-confident genius of a partner isn't so sure. As they delve deeper into the case, all is not as it seems. What starts out as an ordinary theft soon turns into a twisted game of life and death. Aidan is faced with an enemy from his past, with a mind as sharp as his. Known only as 'The Trickster', he makes Aidan doubt everything he believes in.

As the stakes rise higher, and time is running out, all that remains is one question:
Who will play the better trick?

title: Her Terrifying Love
description:
While being chased by her abusive boyfriend, Lyla turns the tables, shoving him into the path of an oncoming car. But rather than calling the police, she and her friend, Jack bury the body deep in the woods. Instead of finishing her senior year in peace, Lyla is horrified to discover that her dead ex has returned for revenge. 

This genre-bending supernatural thriller weaves elements of murder mystery, romance, high school drama, humor, and, of course, a terrifying ghost story.

(Excerpt from "Her Terrifying Love")

Jack's chest heaved. "You said he was dead."

Lyla inched closer and whispered, "He had no pulse!" 

"Maybe he was just stunned."

"We carried him all that way," she said. "He wasn't breathing."

"But maybe he woke up after we left him down there."

"Woke up?! His neck was broken."

Jack hung his head. He couldn't make sense of this.

"I know how this is gonna sound, but..." He choked on his words. "When I went to pick up my car from the body shop yesterday, he was standing across the street. Watching me."

"Who was?!"

"Keenan. I swear to God."

"No way," she asserted. "That's crazy talk. He's dead."

"It was him." Jack nodded. "He had a frickin' giant tattoo on his neck." 

A shiver flashed down Lyla's spine. Jack confirmed what she'd been dreading. He'd been seeing the ghost, too.

If you enjoyed "Her Terrifying Love," check out the sequel, "Dirty Secrets."  https://www.wattpad.com/822348938-dirty-secrets-prologue

title: Obsolution ✔
description:
Ty, a shift manager with an alcoholic wife, creates a female replicant in a dystopia veering toward full mechanization. For Ty, the surreal drudgery of working in a retail environment is interrupted when robotic interfaces are installed at his job. Any protest of the machines will prompt Prominents to place him in a re-education program, and that's if he's lucky.
      
In an effort to distract himself from a failing marriage, Ty becomes obsessed with the idea of a printing a live composite. In a botched job, he ends up printing a female version of himself.
    
Thanks to his clone, Samantha (or Sam as she insists being called), Ty and his family are in danger of being jailed by Prominent forces. A dangerous life of hiding in plain sight is nearly impossible to pull off, especially when Sam strays from simple Prominent edicts by dating a woman. 
      
 Ty's reality begins to unravel and he is forced to new truths, all while coming to terms with the full-force of mechanization and violence that surrounds him.

title: Mortal Sin - Sin Book II
description:
The toss of a coin can change your life.
    
    Vehicles can crash into buildings.  Cities can crumble.  A man can die.
    
    And be reborn.
    
    When your memory is lost and Death is your shadow, you turn to the only person who has offered their hand - a strange, evasive woman with pale skin and sad eyes.  But who is she, really?  And who are the people who occupy the half-way house she takes you to?  And why are people dying horrific deaths in the park?
    
    The toss of a coin can change your life... and end it...
    
    Flip and catch...
    
    -
    
    Mortal Sin is the sequel to the bestselling paranormal thriller, Sin.

title: Crashed Into Reality
description:
June's world is turned upside down after her husband died and daughter disappeared after a suspicious car crash.  As she tries to process what has happened, she gets a call that her daughter is being held captive in exchange for an item her husband had.  While searching through her husband's things, trying to find what was demanded of her, she comes to realize that she did not know her husband at all.  
  With help from Matt, a rookie cop who risks his job, and his heart, she races against time to save her daughter, and a rescue comes from the most unlikely of places.
*Crashed into Reality was my first completed manuscript.  It is not yet published, but I am currently working in a different genre.  I plan to eventually return to this book, and re-work it, because I love the story, but I also know my writing has changed over time, and I haven't worked on this one for almost a decade.  I hope you enjoy this story, and I look forward to hearing what you think.

title: Empty Chains ✔️ | #ONC2019
description:
Death has a sick sense of humor.

On the most destructive week of Holiday Warren's life, a crosswalk turns into a deadly sprint through the depths of hell to right the wrongs of her troubled past.

No one was ready for Holiday's death, not even her.

Dying is supposed to be simple, easy.  She expected darkness or maybe endless food. Not an introduction to Death himself and the invitation to something sweeter.  Kill or be killed, he couldn't care less. But win...

Win and be free to return to life as she knew it.

title: Between Screams and Silence
description:
Following the traumatic birth of her daughter, Kathleen-Anne spirals into depression and struggles to cope with her newborn baby. 

Desperate to put some life back into the wife he adores, husband Rheemus suggests that she takes some time out to have some fun with her friends and Kathleen-Anne reluctantly finds herself at the home of Barbara Arden, the town medium. 

Invited to take part in a séance with the spiritualist who many townsfolk believe is nothing but a charlatan, Kathleen-Anne places her fingers on the planchette and waits for the Ouija board to answer Barbara's call. When the candles begin to flicker and someone whispers her name, Kathleen-Anne realizes too late that Barbara isn't a charlatan at all and that she should have listened to her Mama's warning never to visit the medium's house. 

As the lights go out and the screaming begins, Kathleen-Anne is about to learn the hard way that when you call something over from the other side, it never wants to leave.

authorBio:
In 1965 Los Angeles, a widowed mother and her two daughters add a new stunt to bolster their séance scam business and unwittingly invite authentic evil into their home. When the youngest daughter is overtaken by the merciless spirit, this small family confronts unthinkable fears to save her and send her possessor back to the other side.

title: Flowers for you
description:
All is well in Patty's life until her best friend goes missing. No note. No texts, just got up and was gone the next day. 

People say she ran off with some guy, or was hiding because she was pregnant with notorious bad boy, that Patty never seemed to like, Jasper Mckinley's child. 

Some say, she's dead. 

Patty denies all of it. She knew Jasmine like the back of her hand and she was convinced she did not run away or fell in a ditch somewhere. 

A year has passed. But she never stopped believing her best friend was still alive.

So what happens when a stranger suddenly sends her flowers with notes about things only Jasmine and her would know? And she finds herself asking for help from the very guy she suspects?

Everything starts to become a game. 
For every flower delivered to her doorstep, the chances of finding her best friend alive, decreases.

It's two weeks after the fall, and Scotland Yard is in turmoil, trying to  round up the remnants of Stephenson's gang while the old man himself sits quietly in custody, determinedly not  being helpful. title: CODES
description:
[Book 2 in the CODES series] || Roger, a cybernetic human with a second chance at life, must face the truths of every lie he's told or risk the possibility of losing it all...

**
A year after the "Digital War," Roger had his second chance at life. It was owed to him, a forgotten promise made eighty years in the past by the founding fathers of the Province's prospering nations. He and the other "Codes" left abandoned within the silent computers of every living city would be brought back to life...

And have their crimes forgiven and wiped from existence. 

Yet, finding a home in newly created bodies isn't easy for the new cyborg citizens. The Province may have reached its desired Utopian climate, but society itself was far from reach. So many refused to forget the pain every "Code" inflicted on their lives...

Roger hadn't forgotten -- he chose to forget. But as those secret plans made before his original death return to the surface, Roger learns -- just as the Province did -- burying the past doesn't help heal old wounds. 

**

The gun fit so perfectly in my hands. It's metal, still warm from it's last fired bullet, brought back so many memories I'd learned to suppress. I didn't want to be the man standing in front of them, I wanted to grow and change. But let society remind me of my place...

"Roger, don't!" Clara's tearful face came in front of me as she tried to take the gun from my hands. "Please, you don't have to do this!"

I couldn't look at her. I didn't want to see the pain in her eyes. "That's the thing, Doll..." I tilted my head back and inhaled sharply. "I've got no other choice."

The sound of a bullet firing never sounded so nice...

title: Case File
description:
13+

"Sharna Davis, Detective Sharna Davis. Remember that name well, Detective"

Sharna Davis is a young ambitious Detective trying to begin her career, she doesn't stop till she gets what she wants. After 2 whole years, she is sick of her boss and boring job at the police station, so she decides to quit and become a private detective. 

She has always dreamt of becoming a detective and achieving justice ever since her father's mysterious death as a child. 

Through out the story she will be going through different crimes in which some will be long like 5 chapters while others would be short like 2 or 3 chapters leading to the final case, the death of her father.

authorBio: Hey! I'm Mariam Moawia, I'm 24 and I'm an Egyptian Filmmaker, Animator and Writer. title: A Dangerous Woman (A Fay Cunningham Mystery-Book 1)
description:
Fay Cunningham, publisher of a small-town Pennsylvania newspaper, is having a well deserved midlife crisis. Both nicotine-and calorie-deprived, she stays busy delivering the paper she publishes in order to get closer to her customer base, craving inspiration, a smoke, and a cheeseburger. But she discovers something odd going on behind the closed doors of her trusted friend Joe Wise. Like, where is he and who is the mysterious blonde rudely blocking Fay's entry to his house?

Adding to the puzzle, Fay learns that Joe's brother and biggest rival, Thomas, has just died under strange circumstances. Joe was Fay's professional benefactor and her journalistic instincts kick into overdrive. But first, she has to get past Angel, Joe's hostile and secretive new companion. And when Fay's questions get too personal, a killer makes lethal plans to send Fay into permanent retirement....

authorBio:
Ciao a tutti!
My name is Kari and I really enjoy... writing stories (surprise!), and I'm not too good at this bio thing but I'm gonna try it anyway.
I'm an internet addict (probably just like everyone else who is reading this right now), and I really like desserts of various kinds, especially those little chocolate mints you get at Olive Garden, and if that's your thing, too, then we can definitely be friends! Or, if you don't like those, we can still be friends; it doesn't really matter.
I'm a little Wattpad lonely sometimes, so just ask me if you want me to read any of your stories or talk or something. I'll do anything you want, most likely, actually.
The things that bring joy to my life most would have to be my four adorable nephews and my two beautiful nieces, all of whom are pictured in my background at the moment, though you may or may not be able to see all of their faces because I never change it and the Wattpad updates always screw the resolution up.
As far as my status within the walls of Wattpad goes, I think I've been here for five... or maybe six years now. I actually don't really know but I DO know it's been probably way too long so feel free to ask me any questions if you're new here. I'm also quite a huge grammer freak and if you need me to edit some work for you, I will gladly accept the challenge. 
I'm approximately 631,238,406  seconds old as of March 14th, 2018, if I did it right. And, yes, I added both leap years and leap seconds because it'll really bug me if I don't.
Y hablo un poco del Español...
...e un po'di Italiano...
...и немного по-русски.
Also I overuse heart icons sometimes so I'll just apologize in advance for that.
I wrote this new bio sitting at a computer in a hospital waiting room surrounded by the ill and elderly (even though I revise it every 3rd day of each lunar cycle).
If you didn't get anything out of this bio, just know that I tried and I'll be your friend if you want me to!
♡♡♡

title: The Face in the House
description:
A twisted tale of death, love, and magic. Enter the mouth of the face in the house...

Featured on:
"Stranger Summer Reads" (Wattpad Pick)- Summer 2019
Wattpad Homepage - Fall 2019
"Wattpad Classics" - Spring 2020

Rose White's little old house is filled floor-to-ceiling with books, newspapers, and other fragments of a life spent shut in from the outside world. She lived as a stranger to her family, who knew her only as a reclusive, lonely old woman.  Only her great-granddaughter, Teddy White, knows that the woman was anything but lonely in that strange old house. At just ten years old, Teddy witnessed an impossible, terrifying magic there--one that changed her life forever. 

Nearly a decade after that twisted weekend visit, Teddy returns to grandma's house, unsure she can trust her own memory of the place.  As she struggles with her newfound independence, she dives deep into the escape, and companionship, the house provides. For the first time she can remember, Teddy feels the warmth of love and security with her makeshift family--But there's a dark presence growing in the house that threatens to take it all away.

title: Frankenstein's Guide (Book 1, the LiteraTours Cozy Mystery Series)
description:
Jessica "Ike" Wordsworth can dive into books, but she isn't prepared for a monster - and a ruthless murderer killing her tourists.
 
Ike is fighting the aftermath of a nasty divorce that left her husband in custody of her homesitting business - and her beloved cats.
With nothing but a turquoise construction trailer to call her home, Ike invests her last quid and becomes partner in a tour company specialising in bespoke trips for book-lovers. When the guide hired to take on the first tour drops out at the last minute, Ike has to take over and steer her guests towards the cradle of Mary Shelley's "Frankenstein".
All to soon she realises there truly are monsters on the loose, one of them a ruthless killer who's targetting her tourists. 
To unearth the truth, Ike will have to cooperate with her moronic partner, Gary Sands, 13th Baron of Nettlehole and founder of LiteraTours. When they don't succeed in stopping the killer, she realises she'll have to take the plunge and draw on some rather unusual skills her family has been hiding from the world  . . .
"Frankenstein's Guide" is the first instalment in the "LiteraTours Cozy Mystery series".

title: Psychopath (Jikook)
description:
Jimin is a 17 year old with 6 different uniquely great yet very dangerous personalities hidden within him.  After all Jimin is charming, callous, cunning, manipulative, comically grandiose, egocentric, energetic, compatitive, possessive, controlling, and with an apalling failure of empathy along with an very short temper. If you saw him from a distance or met him once, you would never think that Jimin was crazy, a psycopath killer. But if you knew Jimin, I mean really knew him you would do anything and everything in your power to never encounter him again, EVER.
Jungkook  21 years old a young detective who had been caught in the cross fire of one of Jimin's plans and after that. He never thought he'd whine up as one of Jimin's obsessions after all they never met before, or did they?

"Your nothing but a psycho!"

Jimin nods happily. "Yes, a psycho for you."

Vocab if confused
Callous-A cruel disregard to or for others
egocentric-Thinking only of oneself constantly without a regard for the feelings or desires for others-Basically a person who is very,very self centered.
Grandiose-A sustain view of oneself as better than others that causes the narcissist to view others with distain or as inferior-Basically a person who sees no one equal to him, that he's so unique no one is on his level or even near his level.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Jimin is my ultimate Bias😍

Taehyung is my Bias😘

Jungkook is a big Bias wrecker😗

I have a thing for the maknae line😛

I also love the hyung line of BTS💝

I love bts and many more groups

Life sometimes suck but anime and Kpop are my everyday go to.😎

title: Meticulous Planning
description:
Meticulous Planning: By day, Gary Saunders is a mild-mannered real estate agent, charming his clients and evaluating properties. By night, he transforms into something far more sinister. Each home he steps into is more than a listing-a potential hunting ground. With chilling precision, Gary stalks his prey, returning when the lights go out to seal his ultimate "deal." Behind his polished smile lies a dark obsession that keeps his deadly secret buried beneath the perfect facade. Are you ready to uncover what happens when the line between ordinary and horrifying disappears?  

Are you ready to Trip the Dark Fantastic...?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Feeding Frenzy (Watty Award Winner)
description:
*Watty Winner* & *Featured Story* WITCHES - NECROMANCERS - INAPPROPRIATE TABLE MANNERS. The three-hundred-year-old town of Loon Lake looks calm as a pond, but below the surface, clans of witches and wizards clash like hungry sharks.

First-year student Tonya isn't privy to her family's darkest secrets, but when campus is overrun by a deadly eating epidemic, only she can resist the hidden, mind-controlling entity behind it.

Meanwhile, Tonya's new friends, artist Priya, and Digital Ninjas Drake and Zain, want to create the creepiest art installation Loon Lake Cemetery will ever know. Too bad what's lurking in the graveyard is deadly.

Untrained and overmatched by occult conspirators, Tonya will need to develop magical abilities she never knew she had. Can she uncover the mystery behind the epidemic and save her town?

Winner of the coveted Watty Award, supernatural thriller Feeding Frenzy is a witch's brew of intrigue with a dollop of comedy, a teaspoon of romance, and a pinch of horror.

Readers say:
"It's been an amazing ride! ...I've loved every minute of it!" -J. L. Weaver, author of the Penderry's Bizarre series (England)

"A great ending! Loved it!" -Denise Murdoch (USA)

"Just when you think there won't be any more surprises, Maaja Wentz throws us for a loop." "It's like I'm infected and you're food because I NEED MORE." -Helaine Duvenhage (South Africa)

"...great novel - it has been so much fun to read! The ending wrapped things up nicely, but it begs for a sequel. With Tonya's discovery of her powers and the hints at this Loon Lake magic community...it feels like there is much more to come for Tonya and the gang." -David J. Thirteen (Canada)

Zombie...meet cake. Take a spooky town, a food obsession and wrap it all up in a wee bit of @MaajaWentz creepy, ghoul-tainted humor and you end up with the kaleidoscope that is Feeding Frenzy. -Jetta Frame for WattZombie reviews (Wattpad)

Vote, comment, and tell friends about FEEDING FRENZY. I'd love to hear from you.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:

title: Madame Juror.
description:
Alianna Winter managed to keep herself out of trouble for a grand total of ten weeks. Which, as she pointed out to Isabel, was actually rather good.
Isabel naturally didn't agree.
Answering a plea for help from Chief Inspector Barnes, Allie finds herself in a very unfamiliar situation; in a courtroom. As a last-minute member of the jury. The case she is supposed to be trying seems incredibly straightforward at first glance, but as Allie soon finds, nothing is as it seems. It's up to her to change the minds of the rest of the jury, or a woman will surely hang.

-The seventh book in the Alianna Winter series.
Her earlier cases:  
1.Death At Scarlet Leaf   
2.The Merryweather Jewel Thefts
3.A House On The Hill
4.Murder Is At Hand
5.The Incident Concerning The Alsatian Dog
6.At The Plaza Majestic
Her later cases:
8.A Murder Shall Commence
9.The Impossible Poisoning
10.The Final Endgame

The Toby Smart Spin-offs:
What Makes A Detective
What Breaks A Detective

authorBio:
Welcome to my tiny, dusty corner of the Internet. I hope you enjoy your stay:)

My two series on this account are The Alianna Winter Mysteries, and The Casefiles of Hawes & Gray.

Find more of my writing on Wattpad at @3PumpkinLlamas where I've hijacked what was supposed to be a joint Harry Potter fanfiction but then ended up with me just being a massive nerd and writing all of it.

Older than I act, younger than I look. Still.

title: I AM MI6
description:
Keeping secrets was never easy, keeping secrets which could mean  life or death for the entire country is an entirely different matter all together. Living as a werewolf in its self was never going to be an easy feat. But for the last fourteen years of his life, one young lone wolf has been living in England, as an agent for MI6.
For nearly his entire life he has managed to keep his secret, letting only a very small handful into his life. Now however, with a new family to worry about. He is about to receive the mission of a lifetime. What will it mean to those he cares the most about, and will he be able to keep the secrets he has kept so close to him for so long?

title: Teen For Hire
description:
Reece sticks by a certain motto in life:

"If you ever want something to get done, pay somebody to do it for you."

In this case, people pay HIM to get things done. Anything they could possibly want, from babysitting, to stalking their exes or even doing their math homework. He could do it all with the right amount of money.
Okay, maybe doing Maths homework is a stretch, but you get the gist.

Trouble arises when the hot mess of a teenager got an offer of getting $10000 per month to protect the new girl in town, Sierra Ferrind, he didn't exactly know what he was signing up for.

She's cheerful but mysterious and at times, downright dangerous.

And now Reece has to stalk her. Great.

Join Reece Alexander as he rocks out in Junior year with undercover missions, disastrous people and the ever so powerful teenage hormones. After all, who knows what life could bring when you're a teen for hire.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
My favorite quote: "Sex will give you STDs, friendships are f**king fake, relationships will cheat on you, family will disown you. But Pizza? Pizza is forever."

Honestly that gave me some much inspiration 🍕.
Just kidding! Though, that IS my favorite quote.

Hey! My name is Zeke and I am a **teen guy who is not ready to specify my age lmao. Hint, I am sort of a junior/sophomore in high school.

I am new to this Wattpad thing but let's see how this turns out!

title: The Stripper and the Bartender [Victuuri/Viktuuri] (DISCONTINUED)
description:
Twenty five year old Yuri Katsuki is a hard working, but chaotic agent working for the FBI. He works hard to earn money for his mother, who is stuck in the hospital with leukemia. For two years, he's been stuck in his small office doing tedious paperwork for his boss. He's known, but not well liked.
  
  Then there's Viktor Nikiforov, another agent who works under the FBI. He is notoriously known for his credit in cracking the hardest cases and his well known ability in finding evidence. He's well liked by all his peers and is swooned over by both women and men.
  
  One day, a big case comes where a principal of a well known school is kidnapped for an international drug trade between unknown forces and a notorious wanted criminal, who managed to escape the scene. Both Katsuki and Nikiforov are recruited to solve the case as a duo. They are informed that they will need a disguise in order to take the case.
  
  However, one awkward piece of information lies on the palm of their hands.
  
  The scene occurred in a club. And in order to diligently solve this case, the two agents must disguise in order to blend in.
Tous Droits Réservés

a new year stands before us, like a chapter in a book, waiting to be written

title: Our First Step (An A3 Fanfiction By Leigh Lynn) (Act 1)
description:
She had always dreamt of being a Composer one day... But just can't... Because she is holding herself back.

At first she thought it was for the best...

But after years of self-tormenting-- it started to take a toll on her... She wanted to- but that dream was already far gone for her. She wanted to reach it again... But sadly...

She cannot.

Until she found a place where her dreams are slowly recognized by the people who accepts her and loves her for who she is and what she wanted to become.

Of all the clichès and things people do and mention, clichès are still good. It's still worth mentioning even if they are repeated over and over and over again...

"I want to bloom... I want to shine... I want to know what this trapped feeling in my heart feels like when it is released... I want to smile, laugh, get scared, be angry, be sad... I want to feel all the emotions needed to live... Sis- I mean... Director... Help me bloom!"
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Hello there...my name is Leigh Lyn. And uh... I live in the Philippines... Nothing really good is interesting... Just some stories here and there. And I have a youtube... Yeah... Good thing right? My previous intro was a mess. A very big mess. But don't worry I'm fixing it.

Every card has a meaning, but not all are pleasant.

Siobhan Brady is a Tarot reader, a profession that called to her ever since she was young. So when the same card begins to repeatedly present itself during her daily personal readings, her intuition tells her there's something greater at play than just a random draw.

But when the mysterious MacKenzie Stewart crosses her path, Siobhan realizes the cards weren't lying, and soon finds herself in the middle of a deadly spread where not even Fate can determine the outcome.

title: The Reluctant Queen
description:
Born a Princess and widowed by age 19, Tye is now betrothed to the prince and soon to be king of a faraway land. She must now, once again, learn to love her new husband. And make him love her as well. Unbeknownst to her, she will also find she must untangle a plot of treason. If she can't, it can cost her father, brother and new husband, their lives.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Asetah (Tah) Dula was born in Philadelphia, Pa. She is one of 7 siblings born to parents married for over 50 years. She moved to Virginia in her 20's to pursue a better life for her children. There she studied practical nursing and became licensed in 2006 as a nurse. She then returned to school and obtained her Bachelors in General Psychology and her Masters in Mediation and Conflict Resolution Psychology. She has worked as a nurse, counselor, substitute teacher and clinician in pediatric mental and behavioral health. All the while never abandoning her love for history and writing.  She loves to write and is the best selling author of Contemporary romance, women's lit as well as historical dramas, urban fiction, Young adult and Suspense thrillers. She is a navy wife, married for over 13 years to the love of her life, Ryan. She is mother to 4 children, 3 boys and 1 girl. She is also a pet mommy to 2 dogs. Their names are Majesty and Duke.

She is the Owner and CEO of DreamWakeWork Publishing Company and is accepting submissions via their email. DreamWakeWork@Gmail.com

title: This Crappy Life (Season One)
description:
[Teen and New Adult Zombie Apocalypse Romance]

"If you would've told me the last day of our peaceful existence would be a boring Tuesday in November, I would've called you an idiot."

High school senior, Casey Whitmore, is about to discover her life isn't all about graduating with honors, taking her team to the championship, or being the perfect daughter. When Casey's mother comes down with the scariest illness imaginable, she is forced to take action, but no matter which way she turns the normal solutions are unavailable.

As she searches for medical treatment, Casey crosses paths with two friends who agree to help. Derek is the broody, mysterious type while Thomas is the smooth wild card. The guys couldn't be more different, but are attractive and seductive in their own way.

It's not until all communication is cut off that they realize the spreading illness is no accident, and the world becomes lost in a horrific whirlwind when the dead start attacking the living. 

Life must go on, but with no survival skills, Casey has a lot to learn. Even though Thomas and Derek prove to be invaluable during the fallout, love is still very much alive, and emotions run wild even during the zombie apocalypse.

ZOMBIE APOCALYPSE ROMANCE
(FOR TEENS AND NEW ADULTS)

EPISODES: 1500 to 3500 words

FEATURED BY @WATTPADZOMBIES
     •VIRAL READS LIST
     •BOOK OF THE MONTH JAN. 2019 

STARTED: November 16, 2018
COMPLETED: September 21, 2019

Cover Created by Me

I HAVE SOMETHING VERY IMPORTANT TO TELL TO MY READERS...

You are amazing creators and you have the power to do anything you choose. Don't give anyone power over your emotions, desires, creations, or decisions.

Be strong. Stay positive and never give up. Just keep moving forward. Slow or fast, it doesn't matter. The journey is long. Never forget that you're perfect in every way and you deserve joy.

AND ALWAYS REMEMBER YOU ARE WORTHY!
💖Emma💖

title: Dead Eye
description:
What happens when you wake up some day and find out that there is no resemblance to yourself in your own head?
What happens when you realise that you have been sleeping for almost a year?
What happens when you realise that your life is a jumble of puzzles and most of the pieces of that puzzles are missing?
This is what exactly John happened to be feeling when he woke up one day.
while everybody around was happy and glee that he was finally awake.
John had no clue.
his wold had turned upside down.
Wait>>>
Was there any world of his at all?
Oh! importantly 
Was he actually John?
In a series of incidents some clumsy, some violent, some funny John seems to be lost in a world known to all.
yet he fights and manoeuvres his way out of all the odds.
His only target being Resurrection to the Dead eye..
but he does a lot more than finding himself..
Read more to know more
A thrilling and hilarious journey of John...
John?
Is he really John?....
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi Fellow Wattpadders,
Wishing for you healthy and safety.
Hope you find it worth your time reading my profile.
A writing and reading addict with huge sets of dreams to chase; that's me, your author.
A book started will be completed thats the promise to all my readers.
If you are new to Wattpad an a book lover beware you'll be hitched to the place for life.
There is endless set of interesting stories for every genre.
If you are a newbie writer don't hesitate go away and let your pen flow.
My summary of life would be especially during the challenging times is
" One Day At A Time"
I thank God each day for the wonderful morning, for the food on my platter and for the good health of my dear ones.
Thank you all for your valuable time
Love, Luck n God Bless!

title: Never Look Back (A Harry Potter Fanfic)
description:
Teddy, Victoire, James, Albus, Rose, Hugo & Lily are transported 20 years back in time to the year 1997 following a misadventure with a Time-Turner. Stuck in the past with no way out, they decide to help their teenage parents along the Horcrux hunt and in the process, prevent the deaths of their dear ones. Their mission : Defeat Voldemort sooner.

Harry, Ron & Hermione made plans for the Horcrux hunt, but their lives were thrown off gear with the entry of the time-travelers who claim to help them. Will they accept their help, and in turn risk the lives of their future children?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey guys! I'm Adrian. I'm a huge Roger Federer fan. I'm as big a Potterhead as I'm a Fedex fan. I just love Harry Potter. It's what got me into reading in the first place. Never Look Back is a next generation HP time-travel fic! Hope you all enjoy reading it as much as I do writing it! Your feedback is appreciated! :)

My Favorite Books are -
Harry Potter series - JK Rowling (Can't get enough of it ;))
Robert Langdon series, Deception Point - Dan Brown (How does he know so much??)
Sigma Force collection - James Rollins (Blimey! Literally gives me chills!!)
Horns - Joe Hill (Asset to his father, Stephen King. Just brilliant!)
Pride and Prejudice - Jane Austen (Romance has never been handled more subtler!)
Walking In Darkness - Charlotte Lamb (One of those books which I just couldn't shake off!)
Coma - Robin Cook (Fast paced, Gripping, Page-turner!)
Clifton Chronicles - Jeffrey Archer (Unique Narrative style!)
The Clay Lion series - Amalie Jahn (Time-travel epic story!)
The Queen of the Tearling - Erika Johansen (Amazing!)
I've Got Your Number - Sophie Kinsella (Funny, Light-hearted!)

Other Books I've read - Percy Jackson, Eversea, Twilight series, Divergent (Only first book, not my forte, I guess!), Perks of being a wallflower, Shiva Trilogy, Hunger Games series, Narnia series, Andy McDermott books, 50 Shades of grey (again, only the first book, sigh..), Superstition, Twenties' Girl, Somewhere in time, Cell, Darwin's Radio.

Books I haven't read yet, but want to - Vampire Academy, 39 Clues, LOTR (loved the movies, though!), Paulo Coelho-The Alchemist, Robin Cook books, Game of Thrones, Scion of Ikshvaku etc...

So basically, yeah, get the picture?! I love reading any book which doesn't involve studies! (I'm just being cranky here ;)) Feel free to PM me or suggest me any good books you like! I read all genres, although I'm biased to Fantasies, Thrillers, Time-travel and Adventure. Cheers :)

title: Dear Darkness (Book 2 - P.S. I'm A Creature)
description:
Sequel to P.S. I'm A Creature

It had been ten years since Viktor's accident. Ten years since he moved on with Aaron and struggled to control his blood lust and crazed hunger, and it finally felt peaceful.
That is, until the government decided it wants its part in the Experiment craze. Along with the fact that Viktor no longer believes his past is truly in the past.
All that's left is for him to do what he does best.
Kill, and leave no man to survive.

title: Unrequited Love
description:
In the unforgiving halls of Hogwarts, Mattheo Riddle and Zara Potter are destined to clash. As the son of the infamous Dark Lord, Mattheo carries the weight of his dark heritage, wrapped in a veneer of arrogance and cruelty. Zara, a fiercely independent witch with the weight of her famous surname, is no stranger to the expectations and challenges placed on her by being Harry Potter's sister though they are nothing alike. Neither Mattheo nor Zara can escape the chilling truth: one of them will destroy Hogwarts, and the other will be consumed by its darkness. The answers lie buried in the shadows, twisted and forbidden, waiting for the right moment to strike.

Tw⚠️‼️ mentions of Abuse,Smut, cussing
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Midnight Parallel | Stray kids
description:
Five boys, five universes, one secret- if I don't find out who's ready to die, he'll take me with him.

--|| Every night between 12 a.m. and 3 a.m., a teenage girl gains the ability to text five boys from a parallel universe through a mysterious app on her phone. Each boy, from a different reality, has their own unique struggles and secrets, but one of them harbors a dark truth: he's on the verge of ending his life.

Driven by cryptic warnings and her own guilt from losing someone to suicide in her past, she pieces together clues hidden in their conversations. As the nights pass, the stakes rise, and she realizes the universe she's communicating with mirrors her own in haunting ways.

With only a three-hour window each night, she must unravel the boys' lives, build trust, and identify the one in danger-before it's too late. But as she grows closer to the truth, the lines between her universe and theirs begin to blur, and she must confront her own fears to save a life.

Themes: Mental health, self-discovery, trust, and the impact of small actions in someone's life.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: PEEL-BEHIND THEIR EYES. Book 1 (Complete)
description:
The Grimsby Gouger is out for blood. 16-year-old Macy Shepard was trapped, scared and about to die, the only person who could save her life was Detective Peel and he really had a bad headache and not just because of his alcohol problem.

There is a murderer loose in the town of Great Grimsby and three girls are missing. 40 years ago the same happened, and Peel's father failed to catch his man. 

Are the new murders connected? Has the Grimsby Gouger returned or is there a copycat on the prowl?. The clock is ticking and three young lives are depending on Peel and his team to save them.

Shocked and shaken by family secrets of his own that come to light, Peel is on the trail of not one but two vicious killers.

Follow the rough and ready detective as he ploughs headlong through his own troubled past, searching for answers to secrets long hidden from him.

authorBio:
A Wattpad featured author.

Hello there, come on in. Look I have saved you a chair and gathered a few books and stories for you to browse. I hope you find something suitable and if so please jot down any comments or criticisms you deem worth of the piece. But first here's a little of my own personal story-

I have been around the block for forty five years and then some. I live with my beautiful wife and six children in the once famous fishing port of Grimsby, UK. I'm an avid reader and have very itchy fingers, so I write a lot. At night I enjoy astronomy. title: Amber Skies: A Post-Apocalyptic Novel (Book 2 of the 2136 Trilogy)
description:
Survival is more than air and water when you're being hunted by the undead. Worst yet, when you caused it. 
    
    Willow ascends into what she believes is an answer to prayer, leaving the harsh realities of the world below behind her. But when she arrives onboard Proc 1, nothing is as it seems. She's quickly indoctrinated into the system by her mysterious rescuers, only to learn that she's been promoted to Lead Physicist in the NAMOS program-BioTic Corp's Top Secret protocol on genetic decomposition and mutations. 
    
    The name on file is not her own, but someone else's. Cloaking herself in this new identity, she marvels at the vastness and complexities of the first floating civilization. Her curiosity is cut short as her advanced training in molecular cloning begins. This only drives the knot deeper into the pit of her stomach. It's only a matter of time before she's discovered as an imposter.
    
    The further she digs, the harder it is to decipher the truth from lies. SIND is not what everyone believed it to be. The new world government wasn't trying to save mankind; it was attempting to control it by curing death. 
    
    There's just one problem; no one survived the treatments, until her. With a potential cure pulsing through her veins, will Willow be able to stop the impending apocalypse before she's turned into SIND's next science experiment?
    
    Find out in Amber Skies.
    
    Highest ranking: #8 (11/12/2016)
Tous Droits Réservés

title: London Love Story
description:
This is the published book on Amazon which started life on Wattpad, called Older Man Rich Girl.
Corinne Roussel is a celebrated French actress. At age 26, she's created a fortune from a new breakthrough cosmetic formula. But her personal life is a mess as she searches for love and understanding.
Harry Smith is age 40, never married, a loner, especially when it comes to women. He works as a management consultant. He's tough, sharp and speaks his mind. But he's hiding a secret.
They first met ten years ago, when he saved her life on a cold French mountainside and stayed with her until help arrived. The night-time ordeal forged a close bond between them, but they have gone their separate ways and lost contact - that is, until Corinne spots him in London.
Their friendship becomes deeper, but Harry can tell she's being emotionally manipulated by her ex-husband, Jacques, who remains her business manager. Over time Harry finds out more about Jacques: his past, his greed, and his corruption. 
Corinne is in danger, and she needs to reach out to Harry for help. As the stakes increase, Harry and Corinne must survive the perils surrounding them, while finding a way to confront their personal issues and discover true love.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Grim Reaper (The Grim Reaper Duology - Book 1)
description:
One year ago, Alex was murdered. His death was the work of a serial killer who has plagued the town of  Eventide on the same night every year - Halloween night. Nicknamed the Grim Reaper, he terrorizes the locals, by going off on a planned killing spree each year. 

Now, Thomas Burton, Alex's friend, wants to avenge his death. In plotting the Reaper's downfall, he finds himself brought closer to the killer than he could've possibly imagined. Following the unraveling of a sordid secret in the town's past, Thomas comes to realize he has to make the ultimate sacrifice to stop The Reaper once and for all.

title: The Unexplained
description:
[BOOK 1 IN THE UNEXPLAINED SERIES]
[UNDERGOING EXTREME EDITING]

Time flies by fast as we work on the project, and soon a couple hours have gone by. Feeling like I overstayed my welcome, and feeling a little uncomfortable with my hood still down, I tell them it'd be a good idea for me to start heading home.

As I head out the door, I turn and I wave to Cas and Abby as they stand on their porch. "Thanks for having me over!" I smile as I pull my hood up, my face and hair covered once again.

Abby grins. "Yeah, no problem! Come tomorrow and we'll finish the project in no time!" I smile and nod as Cas waves and I start walking away, but I glance back once more and my brow furrows. As I look at them, I sense something odd again, as if there were only one person standing there, instead of two.
===================================
When worlds are apart in dark and light,
You must uncover what can be gained.
But even with knowledge of what is right,
You cannot decipher the unexplained.

title: jack is a f@#king pu**y
description:
Like a cat in a mousetrap, like a mermaid without water-this is how those around her describe her.

Jack is a coward with complications, more than he ever imagined.

When Jack gets entangled with Elizabeth, a girl who grew up in a wealthy but cold and distant home, he finds himself drawn into a dark world of secrets, superstitions, and cults led by a mysterious woman named Madeline.

Elizabeth herself doesn't remain whole along the way, and readers will quickly discover that at least part of her is hidden from everyone's eyes. The cult influences everyone who becomes ensnared in it, but there seems to be one character-Vicky-who somehow remains immune. Will she be the one to help Jack escape the mess, or will she too fall victim to a world of manipulative desires and internal struggles?

In this book, Jack is forced to confront not only his fears but also his lost loves, complex relationships, and a distorted reflection of himself. All these threaten to break him but may also reshape his life entirely.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi! I'm victoria smith, a writer who loves creating complex characters and weaving emotional, thought-provoking stories. My work explores themes of identity, love, and the tension between personal desires and external expectations. I'm fascinated by the darker side of human nature and enjoy writing stories that keep readers on the edge of their seat, wondering what's coming next.

I find inspiration in real-life experiences, music, and the quiet moments that often go unnoticed. If you're looking for stories with layers, unexpected twists, and characters who feel real, you're in the right place!

Follow me for stories that dive deep into relationships, internal struggles, and worlds where nothing is ever as simple as it seems. I'm always working on something new, so stick around for the next chapter

title: The Price For His Obsession
description:
Victor's life is consumed by his obsession with the girl across the street. Her beauty haunts his every waking moment, even as she remains out of reach with her boyfriend. When Victor witnesses an intense fight between the couple and wakes up with blood on his hands, his worst fears take root-did his obsession turn deadly? As Sabrina disappears and suspicion closes in, Victor's desperate search for the truth pulls him deeper into a web of guilt, confusion, and betrayal. With the lines between reality and fantasy blurring, Victor must confront the ultimate question: what price will he pay for his obsession?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Karasunomiyako [EN]
description:
When the infinite, gargantuan Tree is all that makes up the entire known world, all manner of creatures need claws or wings just to survive. The beasts had claws. The winged people had wings. 12 year-old Miyako, somehow, had neither ... and she was the only one without.

And she Fell: down the Precipice, away and further yet away from the bottommost civilization, because of a winged bully's prank gone wrong.

Accompanied only by the mysterious immortal raven Kotengu, Miyako resolved to herself that she would make things right. If they allowed her to Fall, then maybe they wouldn't mind if she returned the favor.

Maybe, this time, she could finally cry.

title: The Stolen Wife.
description:
Elizabeth doesn't have a bad life, in fact she has everything a woman could want from a gorgeous home to two wonderful children and a handsome almost perfect husband.
Elizabeth is trapped in a golden cage that nobody even realizes is there, stuck in a loveless marriage with a cheating husband who is never around.
But somebody is watching Elizabeth and he sees what's going on behind the picket fence.
He's the most dangerous, terrifying man she has ever met and he wants her to do terrible things to the husband who wronged her, he wants her to live her own life.
Even as she falls deeper down the rabbit hole of deception and betrayal she can't stop, not now maybe not ever.

title: Distant Oblivion (Book 1 of Blue Vice saga)
description:
Warning: This book is not for the faint of heart. Read it at your own discretion.

The seen universe got split into seven factions: Ice-planet (UU1); Earth (UU2); Energee (UU3); Bizzaria (UU4); Elvian-society (UU5);  Acheron (UU6), and Stellar (UU7). 

After the Great war of Blue and Red Dragonlords, humanity finally received peace. Dvapar Yuga ended and Kali Yuga started.

Charles Vi Bezereth, a prince from Bezereck of the Planet Bizzaria, gets entangled in the lingering malevolence of Kali Yuga. As ignorant as he is, his foolish recklessness and childish pride lead him to grave trials. Possessing the most overpowered tic 'Augmenton', blinds his judgment, and his decisions deter from that of a hero as he embarks on a journey of self-development. 

With overwhelming determination and sacrifices to make, he sets forth to become the Universe's first Emperor.

His actions disrupt the peace this Universe once achieved and will decide the fate of an ancient prophecy that the Oracles made.

title: One Day In Budapest. A Thriller.
description:
A relic, stolen from the heart of an ancient city.
An echo of nationalist violence not seen since the dark days of the Second World War.

Budapest, Hungary. When a priest is murdered at the Basilica of St Stephen and the Holy Right relic is stolen, the ultra-nationalist Eröszak party calls for retribution and anti-Semitic violence erupts in the city.

Dr Morgan Sierra, psychologist and ARKANE agent, finds herself trapped inside the synagogue with Zoltan Fischer, a Hungarian Jewish security advisor. As the terrorism escalates, Morgan and Zoltan must race against time to find the Holy Right and expose the conspiracy, before blood is spilled again on the streets of Budapest.

One Day In Budapest is a chilling view of a possible future as Eastern Europe embraces right-wing nationalism. A conspiracy thriller for fans of Daniel Silva, where religion and politics intersect.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Keep the Ghost
description:
Kayla is about to fake her own death. The teenager has met a couple of strangers that claim to be experts on pseudocide, and they've told her what to do. And poor Sean Reilly, the exchange student living in her house, has stumbled on the plan. When Kayla begs, Sean gets roped in. I mean, only with little things, nothing too serious: lie about when he last saw her, and hide a few facts from the police. 

Except, things fall apart in a hurry. When Kayla vanishes, the police suspect Sean of being more than a concerned friend. As evidence mounts, detectives zero in - there's no way out for Sean. They're arresting him for Kayla's murder. 

His one chance at freedom is to follow in Kayla's footsteps and reach out to the enigmatic strangers who make a life out of pretending to be dead. They call it enlightenment, but Sean calls it crazy. At least they have a plan, even if the first step is to kill himself. Will Sean have the strength to take the plunge? And if he does, who will come out the other side?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey - you read one of my books here and like it? Want to get the rest of them (including the ones not on Wattpad) free? Sign up for my mailing list and they're yours: bit.ly/eurekapad

I write books with one goal: breaking your brain. Gritty, cerebral novels that make you think. You like smart books? Come get some.

I wrote my first novel when I was fifteen, and it wasn't very good. I kept writing a book a year all through high school and while I was in college studying Literature, one of my novels, "Jimwamba," was published by Flame Books. I was finally an indie novelist, and it's been a long climb from there. Now I'm older and live in Texas with my wonderful wife Erin, and I've never stopped working on my craft.

I care about books that are entertaining, but also books that make you think. I love quality literature and am always trying to craft something more than "just a story." I put a lot of depth into my writing because I want to attract readers who appreciate that quality in literature.

Wattpad has been very good to me, and if you reward me with your fanship and votes, I promise to return the favor by bringing you more gritty, cerebral literature.

Don't forget to check out my webpage and add me on Facebook if you enjoy my work.

title: resurface
description:
Seventeen-year-old Emma Conrad has grown up in Seaside. A seasonal beach town on the North-Atlantic coast, it's the kind of place with over 4000 homes, but only 358 year round residents. It's a town famous for homemade fudge, Saturday night fireworks, boardwalk carnivals, the world's first best saltwater taffy, and the abduction of Ivy Anderson Wright.

Everyone knows the story. It happened eleven years ago, during Labor Day weekend. The nanny was home sick, the parents had just rather publicly filed for divorce, and the older brother took his little sister to the championship game of the annual Volleyball Tournament. At 6:15, the six-year-old ran down to the water to collect seashells. At 6:47 pm, there was no sign of her. Three separate ransom demands came and three times her family paid, but they never found her. Not her and not her body.  

What they don't know is that Emma was also on the beach that day. It was her idea to collect seashells, and Ivy went with her because they were best friends.

Now, three weeks before the summer season reopens, when Emma is caught between welcoming and dreading the change of pace, Ivy Anderson-Wright is found-alive.

Ivy claims she doesn't remember her abduction, that she doesn't want to dwell in the past now that she's finally home, but Emma knows she's lying. Whoever abducted her is still out there, and they're willing to do whatever it takes to make sure she doesn't talk. And if Emma can't unearth Ivy's secrets and figure out what really happened that day, this time they both might end up dead.

-------

Please feel free to leave any comments. I'd love to know what you think!
Tous Droits Réservés

It's been a long time since I really updated this thing haha. But hey guys! I'm Risq and I am 23 years of age. I have two years of college with a major of English and Literature. Especially the work of my friends on wattpad. I may not respond immediately because I do have a full time job. Let's talk about Alpha's Slave.
I know theres alot of you guys that love that book. And I do fully intend on finishing it . . . eventually.
I am trying to figure out how I want to rap it up. Its hard because I wrote most of it when I was going through a very bad and traumatizing time in my life. I want to end it on a good note, because my story ended on a good note.
Anyways! While I take a small break from Alpha's Slave, please enjoy a new creation of my mind, my novel "VIXEN". To answer immediate questions.
1. Yes it is a werewolf involved story.
2. It is not in anyway related to the universe of Alpha's Slave.
3. It is not. And will not. Be a cliche werewolf mean Alpha and weak but spirited girl. No offence to those stories. But this ones going in a different direction.

Thats all for now friends. Thank you so much for the comments and votes and general support you've given me. Love you guys!

description:
