title: Akira : The Concealed Curse
description:
"What's your name?" I asked. 

"Ak-" Her eyes drifted shut, her head drooping as if burdened by an unseen weight. Suddenly, her body jolt as though startled by a steep fall, and she forced her eyes open, blinking with a dazed expression.

"Akira Ved Singhaniya."

The name sliced through the silence, and my heart stumbled, caught in a breathless pause. My fingers dug tightly into the armrest, as I peered at her face, searching for some sign of lucidity, a glint of intention. But her gaze was lost, unfocused, wrapped in a fog that told me she wasn't even aware enough to be scheming. Did she truly say that name?

Taking a breath I focused on the questions. I couldn't risk it to fall for her trap again. I wouldn't let her corrupt me again. 

"Do you know me?" Gripping her face in my hand I forced her to look into my eyes.

"Ved."



~°~

The sole heir of the Singhaniya's  and the embodiment of devastation, Ved Singhaniya, acquired a curse from a previous life. But there is always a cure for a curse, and she was his cure, his panacea. 

Akira Suryawanshi, the last blood alive of the Suryawanshi's. She was unaware of the power she possessed, until the history began to reveal itself. They scurried apart, tangled in a bond neither of them knew existed, but they were each other's fate. 

Destiny played its game unfolding the truth in front of Ved, and now he would go beyond the extent of his limit to make her his sin and  salvation, again, for this lifetime.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Making Of Shadows
description:
After the betrayal and murder of mafia boss Luca Moretti, his son Matteo is forced into a life of survival on the streets of Montreal. Once heir to a criminal empire, Matteo becomes a thief, haunted by his father's legacy and driven by a thirst for revenge. 

When a mysterious benefactor offers him a high-stakes heist promising a big payoff, Matteo seizes the opportunity. 

But what begins as a simple job soon spirals into a web of secrets and power beyond his imagination. As Matteo delves deeper, he uncovers forces that blur the line between myth and reality, testing his resolve and pitting him against enemies both mortal and otherworldly.

The Making Of Shadows is a gripping tale of betrayal, survival, and the fight to reclaim what was lost, all while battling forces beyond mortal comprehension in a life-or-death struggle where only one can emerge victorious.

title: King Solomon's Wives: Hunted
description:
The two thousand descendants of King Solomon’s ancient harem have the ultimate power of seduction: Their very touch is as addictive as any drug.

But that power comes at a price: Wives die giving birth. They can only bear daughters. They are only fertile until the age of twenty-four.

Hunted for hundreds of generations by men who crave their touch and fear its power, the Wives have kept safe by following three simple rules:

    A Wife shall have no meaningful relationships outside the clan.
    A Wife’s addictive touch may be used only for procreation or to protect the clan.
    A Wife shall sacrifice herself for her daughter at the age of twenty-four.

But tonight, the rules have been broken, and someone must pay.

In the blistering first episode of King Solomon’s Wives, we meet Sumarra on the night she plans to conceive. Instead, she and the other wives find themselves under attack from a group of male hunters, intent on destroying them.

Sumarra has always broken small rules and indulged rebellious tendencies. Now that the Wives have been found, her defiance will either be their salvation or her own undoing.
Tous Droits Réservés

King Solomon's Wives is a modern thriller about women alive today who descended from King Solomon's ancient harem. They're hunted... because their touch is addictive.

title: The Gunpoint Society: Class-9
description:
In a near-future world where shooting has become the ultimate sport. From high-stakes 5v5 matches to massive Battle Royale tournaments, accepted and fueled by the adrenaline of society.

But for one teenager, the story is different. Transferred to a struggling school filled with students dreaming of becoming legendary shooters, he is determined to prove himself in this unforgiving world.

Not for fame. Not for respect. Not for the glory others chase.

He carries the heavy burden of horrific memories, losing his left eye and bearing scars that both left him haunted by the past as a war survivor.

Despite his fear, self-loathing, and inability to pull the trigger, he clings to a singular, unshakable purpose: to protect those who cannot protect themselves. And to do it without taking a single life.



Recent change: Character and internal thoughts

Expect a chapter in 1-2 chapters in a week.

(new cover Jan-11 2025)

authorBio:
*Hello, I'm Almos Dreamer-of course, that's not my real name, but it's the one I've chosen because most of my stories are born from my lucid dreams. Almos means "tired" or "sleepy"-fitting, since I get tired quickly and love to sleep. My dreams are my escape, my playground for creativity.*

✧A little about myself:✧

-My imagination is wild

-I'm not a fan of being awake-sleep is my haven.

-Dark, inspirational stories fuel my soul.

-Horror? Definitely my thing.

-I never want to hurt anyone-if I ever cross a line, please let me know.

-I laugh easily, even at the wierdest things.

-I love Psychology

-As loyal as they come to the Omori and SCP fandoms.

-A sleepyhead at heart.

-Writer. Reader. Animator: Currently working on Aetheria:The battleground(Still working on the name), A random chair animation, Sunny and his fears, and A character demonstration:*Almos*


I'm part of many fandoms, but mostly SCP and Omori, I'm fiercely loyal to both.

Sometimes I post disturbing stuff, but don't mind it-that's just me working through the sadness.

✧Dreams are illustrations... from the book your soul is writing about you✧

✧Embrace your uniqueness. Let your true self shine, and you'll be special in the eyes of those who matter✧

title: Forbidden Eternity.
description:
After a should've been fatal crash, Katie Lewis wakes up on her birthday with no recollection of the night before. After returning home completely unharmed - If a little woozy from all the blood - she is immediately sent off to The Academy. The signs already showing.

Katie discovers The Academy is not for normal people, no, the place is for vampires, and she is to become one of the rarest types of vampire, A Daywalker.

With the only other Daywalker at the academy being the aggressive and mysterious Daniel Wolfe, Katie already has a bond with him that she hasn't with the other vampires. But with Daniel's chillingly good looks and brooding (if slightly sarcastic) personality, Katie is drawn in deeper than she intended.
Daniel is harbouring a very dark secret, one that threatens everything that Katie is. 
Determined to bring down Daniels walls, Katie doesn't realise Daniel isn't who he seems.
And finding out who he truly is will not only be dangerous to her, but to him as well...

Join Katie on her embarkment into becoming a fully transitioned Daywalker, and what dangers and adventures come along with that change....

title: Forfeit (Original Edit)
description:
*** A Wattpad #1 and Featured Story ***

Pay your stake. Roll the dice. Do the dare. 

Becoming a widow at twenty-five sucks - big style - so Daisy packs her hiking boots and heads back to the Lake District, to the security of best-friend Clara's cottage in Gosthwaite. It'll be just what Daisy needs - anonymity and a fresh start. What she's not expecting is to meet a veritable Knight-in-Shining-Polo-Boots. 

Xander's twenty-two and drowning in as much as misery as Daisy, but when he knocks her off her wedge heels, she topples into his world of It-girls, players and Michelin stars. 

At a party, embracing a night off from mourning, Daisy agrees to play 'Forfeit', the ultimate game of dares. Five friends each toss £100 onto the table and complete their dares. Round One was a fun way to pass an hour, Round Two isn't for the faint-hearted, but no one wants to stake £10,000 to play Round Three - not until they're persuaded by a vitriolic blackmailer. 

£50,000 is up for grabs, but the game's called 'Forfeit' for good reason. Blackmail, betrayal, revenge... Move over Gatsby, there's a new bunch of bored young things in town.

*** Caution **
Forfeit's rated at PG-13, but it does contain strong language and scenes of a sexual nature. Just sayin'. Cx ***

title: Bad Guys
description:
This specific group of boys are real players moving from one girl to another , join this cult group as they play girls like games and act sinisterly. This story has a lot of crazy things Poppin so do yourself a favor by reading it.

The story revolves around a group of charismatic and manipulative young men, led by Alex, Jake, and Juan, who use their charm and good looks to exploit and manipulate women for their own pleasure and financial gain.

As the story unfolds, the group's behavior becomes increasingly depraved and exploitative, leading to severe consequences for the women involved, including abortion, depression, and even death.

The narrative explores themes of toxic masculinity, exploitation, abuse, and the objectification of women, raising questions about the consequences of such behavior and the impact on those affected.

The story is a gripping and thought-provoking exploration of the darker aspects of human nature and the dangers of unchecked toxic masculinity.

title: The shadow city
description:
Here's a small introduction for the story:

*"The Shadow City"*

In a world where darkness and light collide, a young girl named Emilia discovers that she is the key to unlocking the secrets of the Shadow City, a mysterious realm that exists parallel to the mortal world. With the help of Elijah, a mysterious ally, Emilia must navigate the treacherous landscape of the Shadow City, confronting ancient powers, hidden enemies, and her own destiny. But as she delves deeper into the heart of the city, Emilia begins to realize that nothing is as it seems, and that the truth about her past, her powers, and her very existence is far more sinister than she ever imagined.

title: Southern Charms
description:
[COMPLETED] My grandmother is a witch. My mother is a witch. My sisters are witches. Even my daddy is a warlock when he's not moonlighting as a rat (a consequence of the aforementioned grandmother's temper). 

So you would think I would be a witch too, right? Nope. Not a spark of magic resides in my fingertips, and even worse, I'm beginning to think I'm allergic to magic. Kind of a big problem when you live in the middle of the most magical town in Mississippi. 

I'm just biding my time until I turn eighteen. Then, I can pack my bags and move out into the real world- with the normal humans. 

Until then, I just have to survive my grandmother's experiments, my sister's nasty temper, and the charms of the town's bad boy, Ash Goodwin.  

Easy...ier said than done.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: **💖 Trials of Love 💖 : ** 🌙✨ Secrets & Shadows 🌑💔
description:
The Trials of Love: Secrets in Shadows

Noor's unspoken love for Sadiq 💔 takes a heartbreaking turn when a tragic misunderstanding convinces her that his emotions are rooted in lust, not love 😔. Believing his heart belongs to Zara, a childhood bond that looms over their future, Noor retreats into quiet despair.

A scandal 🌪️ forces Noor and Sadiq into a contract marriage 🤝 to protect his family's honor 🏰. To the world, they are the perfect couple 💑, but behind the façade lies a fragile, growing bond 🌸. Just as their love begins to bloom, Zara's treachery 💔 destroys everything, shattering their fragile connection.

Tragedy strikes ⚡, leaving Sadiq with memory loss 🧠 and a rare condition that warps his personality ⚠️. The once loving man turns cold, consumed by hatred and revenge 🖤. Believing Noor caused the catastrophe that nearly destroyed his family 💥, Sadiq's love twists into a dark obsession, seeing her as a pawn in his vendetta 😡.

Noor, despite enduring his cruelty, refuses to give up. She believes the real Sadiq is still there, buried beneath the pain and manipulation 💪. Battling betrayal, heartbreak, and vengeance 🔥, she vows to reach the man she once loved and rebuild the life they lost.

Will Noor's determination reignite the love they once shared? Or will their story be consumed by the shadows of revenge and loss 🌑?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Lastliners
description:
When all is about to fall, when darkness will descend and all will turn to dust, who then do you call in your final moments of peril?

You call the ones who do not fear the grip of pain, the jaws of death, the command of the darkest forces ever assembled. When all other lines of defense fall, you call up your final defense. Your last line of defiance.

And right now, Celestria has need of the rag-tag crew of seven that it calls The Lastliners.

CELESTRIA PHASE: 2

Original art by Frederico Toscano, forever in humble admiration of his craft.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
This is the official profile for the Science Fiction universe of Celestria, created and written and run by Kieran Judge.

In the future, The Empire Of Humanity has spread throughout the universe conquering many galaxies and absorbing many species. At the center, the manufactured hub-world: Celestria.

The stories can be dipped into at any point with ease, and one can read a single or all of the tales. With (hopefully) new updates as much as possible, there's always a reason to stick around and have a Black Mariner martini or two. Enjoy, one and all

Celestria - Journey Ever Onwards


Kieran Judge is a PhD Creative Writing student with MA degrees in Creative Writing and Film Producing. He writes for TheFilmMagazine, HorrorAddicts.net. His fiction has appeared in Sirens Call eZine, Schlock! Webzine, Lovecraftiana, Thuggish Itch, A Tribute to H G Wells Vol 2, The Irregular Adventures of Sherlock Holmes, and many others. title: History of Consciousness
description:
A seemingly ordinary freshman enters college only to find himself joining an unusual lab. There, he realizes he is far from ordinary-he has the power to cross time and space, uncovering the deepest secrets within others' minds. From that moment on, he is drawn into an ancient struggle between two mysterious organizations that have shaped world history for millennia. This battle propels him to confront profound questions about life and death, the nature of reality, and the ultimate meaning of the universe. Through this journey, he evolves from a new college student into a powerful protector, one who stands to safeguard his loved ones, his species, and his world.

title: Survival
description:
Stephanie Armstrong lost everything and everyone she knew when she was just fifteen.

Two years later she's pursuing her past alone on the road, but it's been far too long with far too little to show for it. Time has worn her down, and trouble seems to follow her wherever she settles down. Out of leads, she hopes to recuperate in the small town of Quinn, Massachusetts.

Being an outsider in a white picket fence town proves to be more difficult than she'd expected, until she finds friends in tough-love Kirsten and ever-quiet Daniel.

But when the secrets she's been carrying forever come back to bite her, she has to figure out whether it is really possible to live the life she longs for with such a twisted past.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Mind Man
description:
Do your thoughts affect other people?

What if those people end up dead?

The unthinkable is happening. People are dying inexplicably. Just one man appears responsible. He is either a deranged monster, or a tortured soul; consumed by revenge, and unknowingly manipulated by an adolescent infatuation. A reluctant cop sets out to find the truth; he risks it all and loses everything.

And what’s the deal with the fluffy rabbit?

A spine-tingling, emotional rollercoaster with a sumptuous dusting of romantic intrigue.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Peter Richmond is a graduate from the University of Tasmania.

He spent many years working in the spatial-information industry; two of which were spent mixing it with the Kurds in Northern Iraq, as a consultant for the United Nations.

He lived for twelve months in Moscow, acquainting himself with Russian life, enduring freezing winter temperatures, writing restaurant reviews for an ex-pat website and enjoying the cafe culture of a blissful Moscow summer.

He now writes full-time and lives in Sydney with his wife and two sons.

Website: http://pdrichmond.com

Twitter: http://twitter.com/peterdrichmond

Blog: http://phobiairaqlove.blogspot.com

title: A Smile to Hide (CYOA/WWYFF)
description:
Three years ago, the murder of your best friend has started the entanglement of all the peace that was gained, and the longer that your town lives in the lies they don't realize they're surrounded by, the stronger the hatred between humans and beings grows.  

Revealing your best friend's true murderer is only the tip of the iceberg as you learn of other horrors at Fintan's Academy. As you learn and hone your own ability, you develop strong bonds with people whom you could never imagine meeting even possible.  All become important, all become irreplaceable, but one becomes everything:

An old friend whose worries and feelings become split between you and his flame back home.

Your vampire roommate who doesn't know how to keep herself out of danger in her search for a friend.

A cambion who’s stuck in his old habits in the bedroom, desperately trying to prove that he's serious about one thing.

A tough-as-nails lesbian siren whose dreams of being a musician isn't the only dream she has.

A dark elf whose past still haunts him, but learns that his art isn't the only thing that will help him see the brighter side of himself.

A nature faerie who's still trying to figure out what she wants, and trying to find her own path on life and love.

Another human stuck with the wrong crowd, trying to free himself from a guilt that doesn't let go.

The live-wire werecat whose devotion to friends and family are only rivaled by blinis, learns that patience really is a virtue.

That is, you'll meet your potential match if you make it to Fintan's Academy.  Dangers still lurk everywhere, and not everyone can be trusted.

The picture is a photograph of the Salisbury Cathedral located in England, taken by Bernard Gagnon.  The photo is under a Creative Commons and GNU Free Documentation license, and I merely cropped the photo, added GIMP gradient manipulation, added highlighted areas and added text.I'm not gaining any profit and the story is published non-commercially.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi, there! First things first, all characters appearing in my work are fictitious. Any resemblance to real persons, living or dead, is purely coincidental, and any fan fictions that I have posted here have individual disclaimers in the summary section.

I have been dubbed the Mary-Sue Guru by Rougeberry on Lunaescence for my extensive Mary-Sue guides entitled "Mary-Sue: Who is She?" and "The Mary-Sue Complaints Checklist," both of which I have published here.  And, as if that's not enough, I have a stand-alone guide called "How to Tell Your Friend They Have a Mary-Sue" with the first rule being NOT telling them they have a Mary-Sue.  Trust me, it's the most you'll ever read on Mary-Sues ever, and I have more plans for this subject.

I have also been dubbed the fanfiction guru and fanfiction connoisser here by @roo3story (AKA heatherlovatt) for my "evolved" thoughts and opinions over fanfiction.  I'm not sure about evolved, I'd say I'm more laid-back about it.  I thought it was all just common sense to not limit someone's creativity just because you may not like it.

Current music obsession:  "The Hearse Song" by Harley Poe

"Even in literature and art, no man who bothers about originality will ever be original: whereas if you simply try to tell the truth (without caring twopence how often it has been told before) you will, nine times out of ten, become original without ever having noticed it." -- C. S. Lewis

"Write something to suit yourself and many people will like it; write something to suit everybody and scarcely anyone will care for it." -- Jesse Stuart

"A writer is a writer not because she writes well and easily, because she has amazing talent, because everything she does is golden. In my view, a writer is a writer because even when there is no hope, even when nothing you do shows any sign of promise, you keep writing anyway." -- Junot Diaz

title: The Ship of the Unforgotten
description:
The crew of the colony starship UTS Rose Dawn awaken after centuries in cryo-sleep to discover that most of their number died during the voyage. To make matters worse, one of the survivors isn't taking their current predicament well; not well at all. The remnants of the crew must work together with an untrustworthy computer to determine what's gone wrong and why if they're to have any hope of some sort of life out among the stars...

title: No Life to Lose
description:
James Kirkpatrick's difficult life leads him to take solace in virtual reality—a momentary peace soon shattered by mystery, intrigue, and unseen forces bent on plunging the world into chaos. An epic tale of love, loss, and the boundless influence of technology, No Life to Lose examines our fears, our hopes, the price of our dreams ... and what it truly means to be human.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello there!

I'm Michael, and it's my pleasure to meet you (in a virtual sense). I'm an editor, a digitally published author, and a lifelong reader. Words—and the stories they comprise—have been my companions since I was old enough to hold a book.

CRITIQUES: If you're seeking one, you've come to the right place. I'll critique anything, no restrictions. I'll be as harsh or as gentle as you like. I'll praise what you do well and I'll let you know what you can work on.

THE PROCESS:

1) Complete the payment as outlined below.
2) PM me a greeting, let me know you've finished the payment, and tell me what you want critiqued.
3) Tell me how harsh you'd like me to be (default is slanted toward things you can improve).
4) Be patient! You're in the queue.
5) I'll read as much as needed to form an opinion of your work.
6) I'll leave your critique as a comment on your story.

PAYMENT (required in advance):

1) Follow me!
2) Read at least a few pages of my story: http://www.wattpad.com/story/6563621-no-life-to-lose
3) Leave at least one non-generic comment.
4) Vote if you liked it!

***

With that out of the way, a note about internet publishing:

To me, the rise of the ability for anyone to write and publish may be the greatest thing that has happened to storytelling. Everyone has a story to tell, and now everyone has a place where it can be told—and heard.

Such an amazing time to be alive.

I hope you enjoy my work, and I hope I'll have an opportunity to enjoy all of yours. Until then: read, write, and be happy.

***

The published edition of No Life to Lose is available for purchase at:

https://www.smashwords.com/books/view/329590
http://www.amazon.com/dp/B00DLYLW6S

Or likely also at whatever online retailer you prefer.

***

Thanks very much for your support. For a writer, readers make everything possible.

title: Demons Run
description:
Evangelina Virgo had finally escaped an ugly past, and was now living a secure, happy, normal life. She was a college student with a well-paying job, and her best friend was secretly in love with her. All of that was shattered when one night, death creeped in and wrapped its unforgiving hands around her. 

Enter Roman -- an extremely good-looking demon who is seeking redemption. He saves Eve from dying by bonding his soul to hers, but unbeknownst to him, this comes with severe side-effects. When they are united again, her past is brought to light and Eve discovers things she never knew. Roman needs Eve's innocence to save his soul, but are there ulterior motives? Why would a demon want his soul back? When two Fae appear to warn Roman that the Prince of Hell, Barbatos, is dying to get his hands on precious little Eve for reasons that nobody is able to determine, the question of why arises. The archangels are making unexpected apperances and even Eve's own guardian angel. Raziel and Roman can't see eye to eye on anything except for Eve's safety. The girl begins to question her choice for this journey; she gets deeper and deeper into things she can't possibly understand, and finds out more about herself, who she is, and why her soul was chosen.

Keep your eyes open, run fast, and don't let the hellhounds catch your scent, because hell is on high alert.

Fantasy #749, General Fiction #761

© Elizabeth Elliott and Layla Neal, all rights reserved 2014

title: When the Earth Tilts
description:
Caden Bellroy is an average 16 year old living in a suburb with his twin sister, Candace, and their parents. They live in a nice, quiet neighborhood. Everyone is happy. Until one fateful night he wakes up in the middle of the night to see that his impending doom is coming sooner than he'd hoped. And now, every month, a lot of people will meet their fate when the Earth tilts the opposite way it's supposed to, making every single function, every single move, every single breath, seem wrong and deadly. Everything, even the biggest things, will be tossed around like clothes in a dryer. People die, get maimed, and most of all... change. A specific type of lightning strikes people, and when it does they mutate into a different kind of being. A beast. A zombie. In the first "Tilt" his family loses his mother In the second "Tilt" his family loses him. In a battle of life and death, Caden has to find his mother and his way back home at the same time. He fights thirst, starvation, love, trust, tears, death, despair, hope, and most importantly... Zombies.

title: Flash of Curiosity (Book Two)
description:
Secrets are driving one particular person crazy; Andi Brave. She is curious for the truth that leads her to a path that could endanger her friends and loved ones' safety, especially her partner Barry Allen. Although towards Central City, he is well known as The Flash. 

Mysterious events are striking throughout the city. Barry can do so much to investigate before he can suit up with Andi to finish the job. Once they figure out what or even who is causing the destruction the mission becomes personal. 

But when more problems are added to Andi's plate, it only causes more questions to be ask, but little time for answers. There is too much that Andi wants to know, too much she should know. Will she get all the answers to her curiosity? How will it affect those she cares most?

title: Betting with the Alpha #Wattys2019
description:
No, it can't be...

I stared in shock and hopelessness at the pair of dark brown orbs which is staring at me across the hallway too.

My mate was none other than the person I hate in my life the most. The Alpha.

~~~

Cleo Havard: the definition of stubborn, hardheaded, and one who doesn't give a shit.
Especially about the fact that females have to be submissive to their mates.
She's just an ordinary shewolf trying to finish high school, get a degree and live a normal life; maybe without a mate.
The only exception? The Alpha is blocking her way.

Flash Winston: the definition of rich, hot, handsome, charming, alluring - the epitome of perfect.
The bonus? He's the strongest Alpha in the world.
He seemed like the perfect wolf every shewolf wants to have. The perfect package.
Keyword: seemed
The only flaw that comes with it? His personality is the definition of bullshit.

With his warm dark brown orbs, stunning 8-pack, chiseled jawline and styled up bronde hair, he is able to charm any girl's pants off. Without fail.
Well, except for his childhood enemy: Cleo Havard.

So what does Cleo do to resist her Alpha? She made a bet, of course. 
Throw in some mysterious letters, black roses, kidnapping and intruders, Flash and Cleo have to work together while fighting their feelings for each other.

Follow them through their journey filled with laughter, sarcasm, sadness and of course, plot twists.

ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

title: A COFFIN IS WAITING
description:
In the vibrant and tumultuous 1920s, young private investigator Sloan Sheppard navigates a world of crime and elite society in A Coffin is Waiting, set against the backdrop of Prohibition.

When a high-profile case involving a murdered attorney lands on Sloan Sheppard's desk, he must unravel a web of deceit and danger that threatens his career and the lives of those entangled in the mystery. As the enemy closes in and time runs out, Sloan must rely on his strength, determination, and sharp instincts to uncover the deadly truth.

Sloan Sheppard, a determined and resourceful private investigator in 1920s Albany, New York, takes on a case involving Judge Archie, who believes someone is out to kill him. The situation escalates when lawyer Clement Lewis mistakenly drinks poisoned tea intended for the judge. title: 🥀 We Aren't Friends [Bad End Friends] ♠
description:
♠Bad End Friends story.♠

" No, we were never friends." - True, they were never friends. At the top of their game, individually, they were the most death-defying and unstoppable villains in the multiverse. Best part? There's no stopping them from their game continuing.

Beast Wirt -The Beast's Spawn & Lantern Barrer
Bipper - The Demon With One Eye & The Mad Emperor
Ice Finn - The Cold-Hearted King & The Lord Winter's Breath

Until an anomaly occurs, and Time Baby reincarnates. The titan can't help but feel envious of the power that these three have and so, he'll orchestrate their fall. He won't steal their powers, he won't destroy their dreams, no . . . . . 
To the Lord, this is all amusing, but to the trio, this is the end of an era.

"If I die, I want to drag you and him with me. " 

"What is sweeter? The bloodthirsty chocolate mix in a person's eyes when they get betrayed, or their withering shell-shocked eyes when they die? "
 
------

P.S. I got inspired on the way home on the bus with music. Plus there aren't many of these out there. Then I saw this so I wanted to give this a shot. Hope y'all like it. If I see another XReader, I will explode.

title: Perfect World
description:
A story of star-crossed lovers couldn’t be more cryptic. When two gods Monaxia and Ari’el are captured by mad scientists bent on discovering the Secrets of the Universe, the lovers have no choice but to immerse themselves in an alternate reality where they’re oblivious mortals in an unusual world. But what happens when their god friends from reality come to save them? Will they be able to wake up, and what type of horrors could be waiting for them when they do?

Meanwhile, in this alternate universe, two brothers Pete and Allen battle to make sense of what the hell is going on with all these gods wandering around while another guy named Eidan is fighting for the right to stay alive. Viva la revolucion! No, scratch that. All he wants is to love and be loved, and if he’s able to prove that he’s not as dangerous as everybody thinks, maybe Farrah might actually give him a chance. 


WARNING: complex sciences and ideas are represented here. This work is not a light read, and while escapist readers might enjoy the plot, skimming lines and paragraphs isn't recommended. If you find yourself confused, go back and read the parts you skipped. I guarantee it's explained there :)

title: IF I FELL | STEVE HARRINGTON
description:
❝i really thought nancy and i were end-game, you know?❞
❝you're a real dumbass. you and rachel are end-game, not you and negative nancy.❞

Rachel's life was pretty simple before her world turned upside-down... quite literally. Her best friend went missing, and so did her brother's friend. Unfortunately, only one of them were brought home safely. It was all so insane; otherworldly creatures and alternate dimensions and a strange girl with even stranger abilities. Despite it all, a year had passed and Rachel tried to convince herself everything would be okay even though nightmares haunted her every night.
But as it turns out, nothing would ever completely be okay again. Surprisingly, though, the one person who makes everything bearable is the one person Rachel would have never expected: Steve Harrington.

title: Lie To Me
description:
Raven's many talents have elevated her to a position of prestige far above that of the common criminal. But when she crafts a scheme that involves outwitting one of the most cunning, powerful, and ruthless men in the world, she finds that she may be in deeper than she can handle.

Kieran's sharp mind and formidable influence are a deadly combination, and they have brought him far. But with power comes enemies, and even Kieran is, when it comes down to it, just a man. 

Aidan is the fire to Kieran's ice, the hotheadedness to his twin's cool intellect, and the amalgam of their differences has proved nothing short of lethal. But then two young women enter the brothers' lives, and Aidan finds himself caught directly in the center of a power struggle that spans continents. 

Three extraordinary individuals. Two genius minds. One cosmic gamble.

authorBio:
Hello! My name is Selah and I love to read and write--as evidenced by the fact that you're staring at my profile on a site for people who do just that.

Other things that I love:
- People (so don't hesitate to message me if you have some thoughts about my writing, if you want me to take a look at your story, or if you simply want someone to talk to)
- Benedict Cumberbatch's Sherlock Holmes (I'm very specific ahahah)
- Too many fantasy characters to count (PM for more detail and/or discussion, and I'll be happy to converse with you!)
- Good (read: most likely over-priced) food
- Nearly any type of well-written, well-developed, or overall enjoyable fictional work

Favorite TV show:
Sherlock will always hold a special place in my heart, for so many reasons.

Favorite movie:
I don't watch many but the Lord of the Rings and Hobbit trilogies were pretty good. Oh, and Pirates of the Caribbean, too!

Favorite book:
Now, that is ACTUALLY impossible. Favorite book in any given genre? Nope, I can't answer that either. Favorite book by a certain author? That, maybe I can answer. However, I can recommend good books in pretty much any genre, so if you're looking for new reads, feel free to PM me!

That being said, my current work-in-progress is a contemporary thriller called Lie To Me, so if that sparks your fancy, I'd love for you to browse through it and drop a thought (or ten) in the comments!

title: Meat
description:
Constantly coming second sucks. But at least you're not dead.

Carson is fed up of coming second. The wolf pack that was meant to be his is under the control of his brother-in-law, who continues to undermine him at every turn. Now, the vampires are breaking the laws that have been in place for a hundred years.

A chance encounter with a curious vampire inspires Carson to hatch a plan that will put him-and the pack-back on top. But if it works, it could change more than the tenuous pact between the wolves and the vampires. It could destroy everything Carson holds dear.

Carson is about to learn that being first in life can also mean being first to die. As his plan spins out of control, his goal to destroy the vampires might also turn the werewolves from hunter to hunted.


MEAT: THE SECOND SERVING is the second book in the TEETH series

authorBio:
I'm Chele. I'm an Urban Fantasy author living in London, UK, and looking for escape reality by any means necessary.

I have 10 novels published across 4 series. Teeth and Out of Orbit are both completed.

I'm currently working on an Urban Fantasy series called Hallowed Ground. Book 1, From Death to Dawn, and book 2, From Power to Post, are both complete and on sale. I'm currently writing book 3, and a number of short stories connected to the series.

If you have read one of my books here, please consider going to Amazon and leaving a review (I've linked to my profile in the website section.) Reviews are really helpful, and will allow me to bring more books your way.

You can find me on my website http://chelecooke.com or in most social media places under the name Chele Cooke

If you have any questions, comments, or just want me to gif you a high five, leave a message at the profile page beep.

title: Half-Demon's Revenge (Legends of Radenor #1)
description:
The land of Radenor is in need of salvation: the royal family and court are corrupt to their very core and full of vipers and backstabbers, the church is malevolent, people are starving, death has become a frequent guest of the mendicant people. 

A betrayed princess sacrifices herself to get vengeance for her ruined mind and life. A newborn prince will become the ultimate weapon for her bloody revenge. He is a half-demon necromancer who was born for an express purpose: become strong, destroy their enemies and regain the throne.

Prince Alexander Leonard Radenor is starting his journey, along the way, he will have to master his skills and try to avoid losing himself in the process. After all, there is a reason why necromancy is considered the forbidden art: there is a thin line between using them and letting them use you.

Still armed with his magical prowess, martial skills and the abilities granted to him by his demonic heritage, Alex presents a serious threat, the one that the royal family and the court would do well to fear. 

**This dark fantasy series will be updated every Tuesday and Friday**
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello everyone. My name is Lina and I'm from Russia. I have been writing stories since I was 10 years old and I have been happily writing ever since. But I didn't show many people until 2011. I took a huge leap and decided to publish part of my story 'I am Sophia' in an online magazine. Of course, in Russian, but I was lucky. People liked what I wrote and I was published. Honestly, I love that my work has been and is popular in Russia, but I also want to introduce it to the rest of the world.
I live in Tambov with my husband and daughter and when not writing I have a lot of hobbies. Things like Karate and Lace-making. I believe you should enjoy every day of your life.
I will update my books every Thursday and possibly once more a week.

title: BLACK✔️
description:
#3 in Hysterics.
#42 in Naija.
#557 in Surprise.
#98 in Chicklit.
#878 in Teen-drama.




BLACK--(A dark colour that could be obtained from the mixture of the primary colors, blue, red and green. It could also be an adjective used to represent something sad, gloomy or sinuous. And also, it could be used to categorize people who have the melanin chemical in their skin.

In this story, the word BLACK, means everything listed above.

#BLACKeverything.



          A novel depicting the struggles of a black girl in New York city.

 Seventeen years old Habeebah Williams talks about how her life transformed from a "perfect fairytale", to a horrendous nightmare, all because her father; Jamal Williams, got murdered by his childhood best friend and colleague at work, Alex owodunni. Her "nightmare" started when her mother, Zafirah Williams decided she wanted to relocate to her former home in New York city, as the pain of her husband's death was too agonizing to bear. 

Read about how Habeebah weaves through the struggles of losing a father and dealing with criticism, bullying and discrimination at her new school.

Life really isn't all bunnies and pink rainbows, is it?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: THE SHADOWVERSE
description:
HEROES AREN'T JUST BORN. THEY'RE CHOSEN.

Until now, Johnny Sparks' life was perfectly normal - that is, stuck in college studies and always looking around the corner for something greater. But after an encounter with a mysterious stranger, he and his lifelong friends are imbued with incredible powers - at last giving his life meaning.

But this dream soon disintegrates once one of the friends is taken by a resurrected alien warlord named Titan. In a rescue effort, the remaining group travels across the stars in search of the only possible aid - a legendary, immortal warrior missing for centuries.

During the spectacular journey of destiny, the team must join forces to reclaim their friend and stop a sinister scheme devised against humanity by Titan and his vast empire. The multiverse-spanning, millennia in the making conflict for the soul of reality is set in motion, but even if the group prevails, they risk losing what it means to be human.

Rated ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ by Readers' Favorite and Online Book Club!

authorBio: John-Clement Gallo is a 19-year-old Christian author. He enjoys astronomy, astrophysics, ambient music, and ice hockey, while also a trumpet player. While living in Houston, Texas, he was the youngest person (10) to become a licensed RC pilot. On the other hand, he is ranked a black belt in Taekwondo and Hapkido, though he is very unassuming and tends to keep that accomplishment a cool secret. Currently, he lives in Orlando, Florida with his family, trying to outlive the constant heat. He's also a huge Star Wars fan. Like, tremendous.

title: The Spare
description:
In the cutthroat job market of the future -- in which synthetics are pitted against humans -- Max is considered to be a "Spare," an obsolete model unfit for work.  

Now, thanks to a new diversity initiative, he finally has the chance to work at NeuraLife, and he'll do anything it takes to succeed.  But when his enigmatic new boss asks him to take part in a controversial experiment connecting human brains with synthetics, Max must decide what matters most to him...  Changing a corrupt system?  Or joining it?



Copyright © 2018
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Watching The Twilight Zone was the first time I recognized the power of science fiction to tell suspenseful, visually compelling stories while examining human nature - with a twist!  Like Rod Serling, Richard Matheson, and Arthur C. Clarke, I wanted tell weird and wonderful stories that might one day be seen on film and television.

I set off to Hollywood to pursue my passion, and found myself working in an unlikely place:  behind-the-scenes documentary.  So, if you've ever watched a Harry Potter or Hobbit DVD, and nerded out to the making-of documentaries, you might have seen some of my work!

Lately, I have returned to my first love - science fiction - and while I hope to pursue traditional publishing, I currently write to entertain, thrill, and challenge others to see the world from a new perspective.

I've been so encouraged by the incredible response to my first Wattpad novel, PRISONER SIX.

-- #13 on the Sci-Fi Hot List
-- Wattpad Featured Story 2017
-- Wattys Longlist 2018

I'm currently working on new stories, so please stay tuned.  In the meantime, I hope you enjoy my latest sci-fi short, THE SPARE.  And please feel free to introduce yourself.  I love to hear from readers!

title: A Hand to Hold
description:
You don't really plan to be kidnapped. You don't even really expect it to ever happen to you.

After escaping captivity and torture, all Jessie wants is her life back. But six months is a long time. A lot can change. Classmates she used to call friends whisper behind hands, her boyfriend spends his free time making out with cheerleaders, and she's been left covered in scars inside and out. Can she find herself amongst the darkness and the chaos? Is there anyone out there who understands?

description:
When fugitive superhumans learn of a nefarious plot to create artificial life with unfathomable power, they must do everything in their power to stop it.

                                                                      *****

With Director Shaw axed from Atlas, Chase and the others became The Exiles; fugitives constantly on the run from the United States military and the Primes still under their control. Meanwhile, the new Atlas continues to wrongfully imprison Primes with their new Jaegar program. While The Exiles desperately want to help, they must deal with dire problems of their own.

title: Brynhildr Aria
description:
Star Light, Star Bright, what horrors hide from human sight?

What if your life was a lie? What if everything and everyone you've known up to this point have been nothing but illusions, false memories implanted into your brain by an unknown entity? 

Enter Yuki Takanashi, a meek, ordinary young woman living an ordinary life. She's 19 years old, originally hails from Tokyo, studies at a university in London, and works as a waitress at a less-than-savory maid cafe. Or, at least that's what she believes. 

An encounter with a mysterious, charming man changes her life forever, as he reveals his true identity as a Kamui, a member of an ancient alien race possessing deadly psychokinetic abilities and questionable morals. Yuki's once-peaceful life is shattered when she discovers her own origins as a Brynhildr, one of the Kamui's artificial female creations, and the keystone in an otherworldly battle for the very survival of the human race and beyond...
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello lovely people, my name is Alexandria Francetic, and welcome to my collection!

I began writing at a young age, mainly writing fan fiction in the beginning of my writing journey. I started writing prose fiction at the age of 15, and I have been creating ever since. I specialize in science fiction, dark fantasy, supernatural, and horror fiction tinged with a heavy dose of romance and existential angst.  

Anime, manga, and video games are some of my biggest sources of inspiration, and I draw many influences from mythology and symbolism in my work. When I'm not studying, reading, writing, or researching, I can usually be found watching anime, reading manga, playing video games, or listening to obscure music.

If you're interested in supporting my work further, please consider purchasing some of my e-books (or print books) on Amazon~

authorBio:
15|bi|

The world has bigger problems then boys who kiss boys, and girls who kiss girls

Raise boys and girls the same way

It will get better. I promise. 

I think the hardest thing in life is to forgive. Hate is self destructive. If you hate somebody, you're not hurting the person you hate, you're hurting yourself, It's a healing, actually, it a real healing forgiveness. ~Louis Zamperini. 

Being yourself is beautiful, promise me that no matter how hard someone tries, you won't let them take that away from you. 

When everything seems hopeless, just take one day at a time. And if one day is too much, just take one hour at a time. And if one hour is too much, just take it one minute at a time. 

Kill them with success and bury them with a smile. 

We all die. The goal isn't to leave forever, the goal is to create something that will. 

Letting go and walking away, is the greatest step to healing. 

If you were born with the weakness to fall, you were born with the strength to rise. 

How you love yourself is how you teach others to love you. 

TIs' better to have loved and lost, then never to have loved at all.

FInd the place inside where there's joy, and the joy will always burn out the pain. 

Scars remind us where we've been. They don't have to dictate where we're going 

Although the world is full of suffering, it is also full of overcoming it. 

LOVE IS LOVE 

PROUD FEMENIST 

I've never too busy to stop and talk, if you need help my inbox is always open 

Don't let the world steal your smile.

xoxo.

title: When The Truth Seems Wrong
description:
Irene took a vacation from work after winning a case. She faced a lot of stress lately. Staying in her resthouse with the ocean view is one of her way to release her stress. She forgot to take care of herself recently because of loaded paper works and a bunch of murder cases she solved.



Irene is an in-demand lawyer who never lose a single case before. 



Because she wasn't lose a single case before, a lot of people were trying to reach her out, asking for her help. Their were mails on her table and emails on the internet. There were also unanswered calls on her phone. But to her, a break is a break. She wanted to have a time with herself and with her life only. No disturbance. 



But her happiness was short lived when her senior called her in the middle of the night. Irene was about to refuse it, but the case seemed really serious. Her senior rarely calls her for help. In fact, it was her first time. It was also the last day of her vacation so it left her no choice. Irene drove all the way to the famous five star hotel in the city, where the crime scene happened. 



In Room 0294, they witness a woman's dead body. There were blood all over her fully naked figure. The sides of her lips were sliced and the heart of her feminity was sewed with nylon. The woman was shot twenty times. They also found out that the woman was raped harshly.



They immediately search for the CCTVs and evidences that they can find inside and outside the room. Their sleepless nights and non stop searches were paid off when they gathered enough and valid evidences to catch the culprit. And they were beyond bless when it all pointed out to one person.



But Irene was the only exemption to the celebration when it turns out that the only suspect to the murder case was none other than her ex-girlfriend, Seulgi. 



Will she deny all the evidences, or believe the truth that seems wrong to put Seulgi in prison?

title: Sinister Infatuation
description:
"They say love is unconditional, but my love is possessive, it demands everything, even your soul."

Audrey

When the courage of love appears, 
even fear bows its head.

People call my love madness; I call it passion. The universe threw me in his arms after 10 years; if that's not a sign, I don't know what is. My task is simple: provide him all the information regarding his enemies and help him destroy them. But now that I am with him finally, I'll do anything to make him fall in love with me. Even if it means manipulating him or better killing for him. It can jeopardize the task at hand, but I DONT CARE; I won't care for anything if it's not directly related to him.

 

Xaden

You won't be able to watch me even if I am standing in front of you.

Even after watching, you won't be able to catch me.

Even after catching me, you won't be able to get me.

She is, was, and always will be mine. Even if it means surrendering to my biggest enemy. I tried to keep it professional for the sake of family until I didn't realize the feelings were mutual. Now that I have her besides me, I'll live for her and her only. Dying for someone is easy, but not living and making their happiness your purpose. Even if their happiness means jeopardizing the only mission that kept me alive.

WHAT'S LOVE IF YOU DON'T CROSS THE LIMIT OF MADNESS FOR IT??
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Step into my world, where the lines between love and obsession are blurred. I'm obsessed with obsession - the way it consumes, the way it destroys, and the way it transforms. My stories are a testament to the all-consuming power of obsession, a journey into the heart of darkness diving deep into the darkest corners of the human psyche.

title: The Silent Ward
description:
The mortuary stood at the edge of the city, a monolithic structure shrouded in silence and secrets. Its walls bore witness to countless stories of lives ended too soon, whispers of the unknown lingering in its dimly lit halls. For most, it was a place of closure-a final destination where the dead found rest. But for Lyra Moore, it was a labyrinth of unanswered questions, where reality blurred and darkness thrived.

Lyra had taken the job at St. Helena's Mortuary hoping to leave her troubled past behind. Yet, as the nights grew longer, and the shadows deeper, she found herself ensnared by the eerie aura of the place. Strange symbols carved into bodies, cryptic whispers in the silence, and a growing sense that someone-or something-was watching.

This was no ordinary mortuary. It was a threshold between the living and the dead, where every corpse held a story and every shadow concealed a secret. Lyra was about to discover that the dead don't always rest-and some secrets are buried for a reason.

What began as a job to escape her own demons would soon become a descent into the unknown, where the line between life and death was as fragile as the whispers in the dark.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Love and Revenge (Complete)
description:
Annie Bloom is an average girl.  She's in college, has a best friend, works, and studies.  Yet one day she finds herself attacked, hospitalized, and nearly killed.  Her best friend, Will, is certain it has to do with the guy she just started dating.  Is Will jealous?  Could her new boyfriend be involved?  Or is it someone else entirely?  Annie must find out quickly because every day could be her last.

***
I could feel nothing but the pain. 
I felt every hit in excruciating detail with each erratic, painful heartbeat as my world became reduced to a series of agony. I struggled to breath through the broken ribs that constricted my airflow like a two-ton concrete slab had fallen on me. The blood from the blows to my head rolled down my face in waves. 
My arm was twisted at an impossible angle, yet I couldn't scream because my mouth would not open. I could feel the kicks coming at me from all directions, and as I received another one to the head I knew this was the end for me and my heartbeat slowed. The stab wound was bleeding too much for me to survive. 
When they left me for dead my eyes began to droop and the last thing I saw through fuzzy tunnel-like sight was a man running towards me before one final rattling breath coursed through my broken body and my heart stopped beating.
Tous Droits Réservés

authorBio:
Hey there everyone!
I know my attendance is shoddy to say the very least but let me say how much I appreciate new readers and people coming back to re-read their favorite stories. I regularly use Wattpad to read stories I really love so I understand how frustrating it is when there is a story you really really like but little to no updates. I am going to do my VERY BEST to continue stories people like, if you'd like you could even write me a message letting me know which one you'd prefer I work on the most, and I'll always do my best to respond.
In the coming weeks, I'll be working to correct and improve what I have already published as well as releasing chapters I haven't yet.
I hope that you can all stick with me and please never think twice about reaching out to me to leave critiques, notes, or just to chat about projects.
As always remember to like and/or comment on any works you like. It lets me know who is reading and what people really like.

title: Unknown killer
description:
On a stormy night, a woman finds herself fleeing from a masked figure, desperately trying to escape a terrifying fate. Her frantic attempts to survive lead her to a tragic end, leaving the community shaken. As investigators Maxwell and Jane delve into the case, they uncover a web of secrets surrounding the victim-a young woman with no identification, no known connections, and no apparent motive for her murder. With the clock ticking and pressure mounting, Maxwell and Jane must navigate a complicated investigation filled with twists and dark revelations, all while grappling with their own personal struggles. As they piece together the clues, they realize that the truth is more sinister than they ever imagined.

This is the circus.

Screams, screams all around.

Torture and pain are the sounds.

title: Deprivation- The Feast and the Famine
description:
On waking up to find a dismembered arm protruding from the floor, Claudia knows her privileged life is over. Claudia cannot recall how she came to this pass. She does know she is never getting out. It is all because she is guilty of falling in love, which is a sin no proper Victorian girl would commit. 
  
  She knew when she took up with a man who was not her betrothed, she wouldn't have a happy end. She expected traditional marital boredom would be her punishment not starving to death in dank tunnels or being eaten by rats.  Cast aside into an impossible hell with only an insane angel-woman for company, Claudia can barely remember the sins that earned her a seat in torment. Regardless of her fault in the matter, she will have to face terrors she never dreamed if she is to escape her prison.
  
  * Thank you all for reading. You are amazing!
  * This is a Wattpad exclusive book
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Jay Smith
description:
Jay Smith is an ordinary teenager. Or was.
Until his parents died.
And GSO recruited him.

Somebody grabbed his neck from behind.
Jay gasped in shock. What the-?
The man was strong. He pinned Jay down on the seat. Jay tried to punch the man on his face, but he wasn't close enough. He grinned at Jay, almost cruelly. “Hello, little kiddie.”
Then he put the gun on Jay’s chest and pulled the trigger.

Jay Smith - Time to save the world.

title: Hallelujah (Tate & Violet)
description:
Violet Harmon, a pretty and sardonic teenager, reluctantly moves from Boston to LA after her father Ben's love affair, for a new start as a normal family. Her family bought the 1800's Victorian home even after learning the homicidal murders which led the house to be named "The Murder House". After a therapy session with her father, Tate Langdon stops by the bathroom and sees Violet cutting herself. They instantly bond over their similar family issues, and how they are 'attracted' to the darkness. Despite her father's warnings to steer clear from Tate, she finds it almost inevitable to do so. She's falling in love with the (maybe) psychotic patient in which whom seems to be the one with the most secrets. What she discovers about him is both risky and unbelievable. But what's the harm? Violet's fearless.. maybe not from everything. 

(The characters Tate, Violet, Ben, & Vivien are 'based' on the American Horror Story: Murder House characters. I do not own them. Credits: Writers of AHS)

title: The Enchanted Pendant ( English)
description:
Aarya's life was that of a simple village girl until one night, an unusual light in the middle of the forest drew her in. The source of that light was an ancient pendant, hiding a mysterious power. When Aarya picked up the pendant, her life changed forever. The pendant carried with it an age-old secret, unraveling which became a matter of life and death for Aarya.

Enter Veer, a mysterious young man fleeing from his past and the powerful Shadow Hunters. He comes to Aarya's aid, and she realizes she now holds a power capable of awakening an ancient world. But will Aarya be able to understand and control this power? And will Veer's love guide her on a journey that brings her face-to-face with the greatest puzzle of her life?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
About Me
Hi, I'm Annu, a dreamer, storyteller, and lover of all things magical and mysterious. Writing has always been my passion, and I believe that every story has the power to transport us to a different world.

I'm new to Wattpad, and this is where I'm sharing my imagination with you all for the first time. My stories are a mix of fantasy, adventure, romance, and emotions, crafted to make you feel every moment. I love exploring different genres, so whether it's a heartwarming romance, an epic fantasy, or a suspenseful mystery, you'll find it here.

When I'm not writing, you'll find me lost in books, singing my favorite songs, or exploring creative ideas for my small business.

Thank you for being here and supporting my journey. Let's explore the world of stories together!

title: A Hero's Burden: The Supernova Theory
description:
Have you ever heard of the theory that everyone has superpowers? 
The Supernova Theory, follows the lives of Leon Niccolo Blanchette, the first-ever vigilante, and Jeremy Oliver Laurent, who ended the Age of Blood. From Leon's teenage defiance as Renegade, striking the first blow against an empire, to Jeremy's final stand to liberate a broken world, their intertwined destinies reshape history.

Told through the lens of courage, sacrifice, and hope, this story explores how two children dared to change the course of the future. They weren't born heroes-they became them.

Through gripping narratives, this book delves into the pivotal moments that defined generations. From the courage of Leon Niccolo Blanchette, the first vigilante who lit the spark of rebellion in the Age of Blood, to the enduring leadership of Jeremy Oliver Laurent, who ended the tyranny of the Saving Grace, their legacies paved the way for the heroes who followed.

Uncover the untold stories of the many generations who shaped Prodigy Nation, including the sacrifices, triumphs, and conflicts that forged a resilient and vibrant society. Spanning centuries, this is the saga of those who dared to believe in a better world and built it through perseverance, innovation, and unity.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Kill Your Darlings
description:
Before Spencer Crest left, he called you ‘doc’.

He was your favourite patient, and in return, you were his favourite psychiatrist. You understood him in a way nobody else could. You didn’t know where he came from, who his parents were, or how he knew you, but you never turned him away when he came knocking on your office doors well after hours.

But then your favourite patient stopped coming. You asked around, but nobody in town seemed to know him. 

You never heard from Spencer Crest again.

Until he started calling you.

Cover Credit: Photo by Willko (willko.deviantart.com/)
Design by Go_Figure
Trailer Credit: Trailer made by me.

WARNING: Contains some gruesome scenes and foul language. Read at your own risk.

title: Shatter (The Daevas #1)
description:
Venise Carlson's life is shattered when her family's murdered by a dangerous man – one who may also be her keen watcher for a long while. Afraid and cold in her ever snowy hometown, Woodville, she rushes to run away from him, trying to make sure that he's far away from her as possible.

In greeting to her surprise destination to the heart of Woodville's forests, she's welcomed by a beautiful girl to an old mansion. Venise is shocked to know that the girl has four seemingly dangerous brothers.

As Venise faces multiple trials, she can't help but feel like there's more to the Van Allen siblings. Mysteries about her new housemates' pasts pique her ever growing curiosity – and she's shocked about the evidences she discovers, unlocking the secrets of her own past she had no clue about.

Until now.

title: Survived By Secrets
description:
Almost dying can change a person. For most it pushes them to live life to the fullest; for Ryan, it lets him hear voices and see ghosts.

After a fatal car crash, Ryan Hubbard wakes up hearing a voice in his head that isn't his own. It wants him to find something--someone. As if that isn't the worst of his problems, he can see ghosts too. Naturally, he tries telling people about his new abilities. And just as naturally, no one believes him.

When Ryan gets dared to go into a supposedly haunted house, he almost refuses. But curiosity gets the best of him when something inside him (specifically, the voice) tells him to go. He wasn't exactly hoping to find anything inside-least of all the diary of a dead little girl and the sudden urge to find her killer.

With the help of his friend Lya and the voice that refuses to leave him, Ryan is set to unravel the mysteries and unlock the secrets of the little child's past.

• • • 

A paranormal mystery that takes place mostly in the present and sometimes in the 1960s.

• • •

This work mentions suicide, contains mildly violent, and/or traumatic content. Reader discretion is advised.

Cover by: @solidarity_

• #40 in paranormal

title: Live Your Life
description:
Cappy Jade, age 18, beautiful and slender, but not one to underestimate. Getting a scholarship to Robot City University was expected, as was catching her boyfriend cheat on her, Phineas Ratchet. But one breakup is not gonna keep her down. 

Rodney Copperbottom is also 18, and is going to the same university as well. Unfortunately for him, his girlfriend of two years cheated on him. And he is also going to Robot City University. His friends tell him to keep his chin up, that college girls will get him back on track,  but he isn't over his ex girlfriend just yet. That is until he met Cappy, when these two star crossed lovers meet, they didn't know what hit them.

Hi this is Gabaa101 here with a Robots story, I'm new at this so please go easy on me. (Critics are welcome, and this story is modern AU and the robots are humans.) Enjoy!

(Disclaimer: Robots is own by Blue Sky Studios)

authorBio: I'm a generd (geek-nerd) who's just about into everything. I'll write stories about what couples I like at the moment. I love the underrated movie Robots (2005), I love Rodney and Cappy. I love how Rodney, the underdog, can get the girl, Cappy. If you have any story ideas about those two, feel free to message me, I might just write about it! I'm caring, funny, and sweet. Feel free to message me if you want to get a hold of me. I hope you enjoy my stories!

title: Who's My Secret Admirer?
description:
There's one man who had it all. He had his friends. His favorite job. Like everything. 

But what happens when things take an unexpected turn when he gets injured and starts getting things. 

Love notes.

That is all he has been getting. He's been getting all these love notes but he doesn't know what to do with them.

The mysterious girl is completely crazy about Dean Ambrose. She does things that affects his friendship with his friends. 

Will Dean let this mysterious person get in between him and his friends?

Follow Dean on this very weird road on who his secret admirer is.

(This is based on the movie 'Crush' I did an imagine on this movie and I thought I would then make a book out of it. There is gonna be some stuff that is not gonna be like what happened in the movie, if you have ever seen it. I have three original characters. Dean and other superstars will appear as well. title: TWISTED MINDS - Evil Haunts Me!
description:
HIGHEST RANKINGS:
#2 in repressedmemories   #365 in psychological out of 12.4K

A Psychological Thriller!
WARNING:  WARNING: You are about to enter a disturbed mind. The following story is not for the faint hearted. Nor is it for those who find it hard to sleep...when your mind wanders and you think- what if? 

Twisted Minds is a psychological thriller and delves in the shadows of the past. A past that someone has gone to great lengths to bury. For some, it's essence will consume and the secret will haunt them, for others it was a time where they slipped from reality to illusory-denial has its benefits! 

[CLARE:] 
Meribella comes back into my life. I know her terrible secret. It's her secret!  But Meribella is clever, and she knows just how she can manipulate me, to get justice...not the kind of justice where you alert the authorities. Meribella's justice demands death, an eye for an eye! 

[MERIBELLA:] 
I won't let Clare white wash the past. She tells me she cannot remember anything. But I know she's lying. They're all lying. It was so long ago and although it's a bit of a haze, I know exactly what happened.

Twisted Minds is a psychological thriller. Who to trust? Can she even trust herself?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:

The second in this series 'Every Second Counts' will be uploaded by the end of April, 2020. I will start to upload The third novel in this series 'Reckless Pursuit' from May 2020.
An I apologise for not updating TWISTED MINDS, will get back to that once I've finished writing the Red Picasso series. Isla G -:)

title: Sunsets in Santorini
description:
After her Father is killed in a tragic accident, Eva Westfield is forced to take over a multi-million-dollar corporation she knows nothing about and the troubles that accompany it. After discovering the fact that her Father may have been murdered as part of an elaborate scheme within the business, Eva is propelled into a wild goose chase that leaves her fighting for her own life and the lives of the few real friends she has left. 

Will was hired as a security detail for a young woman who knew nothing about life outside of her cozy L.A. surroundings. He thought he was doing the right thing going back to work for the government and serving on Eva's security staff, but as time goes on, haunting memories from his past begin to resurface. He is forced to acknowledge the fact that he is starting to have feelings for a woman again, but the only problem is that she may be in love with someone else, someone with less of a dangerous past than his own.

Can Eva overcome her grief in time to find the important message her Father hid for her? Will she finally find the love of her life deep in the rocky cliffs of Santorini, or will the sun set on her heart forever?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:

Bio: Kelsi has been writing poetry and stories since she was old enough to scratch words onto paper. She completed her first full-length novel when she was 18 years old and continues to write while balancing a full-time job in the media industry. Originally from the Northwest, she has enjoyed adventuring across the country and making her way to where she now lives in South Carolina. Kelsi has a Bachelor's Degree from Texas A&M University where she studied Journalism and minored in English.

To all of my readers: if you are new to reading my work please send me a message or comment so that I'll be able to learn more about you all personally! :) Great writing would never be possible without great readers! I'm open to constructive criticism and appreciate all of your advice and comments!

Best Wishes,

K

title: We'll Laugh About This Later.
description:
In the once-thriving village of Nooma, a scientist's secret project spiraled into a nightmare. While working on a virus as a personal experiment, his daughter accidentally consumed the pathogen, triggering a terrifying transformation. Driven by desperation, the scientist studied her, clinging to hope for a cure. However, his efforts failed. One fateful day, she attacked him and escaped, only to succumb to the infection's final stage: she morphed into a grotesque, tree-like organism. These "infected trees" spread the virus through their black, spiked roots, infecting animals who carried the disease to the city, marking the start of the apocalypse.



The Fight for Survival

As the infection spreads uncontrollably, a group of unlikely allies bands together to combat the outbreak. United by their shared losses and the desperate hope of finding a cure, they must navigate the horrors of the apocalypse, uncover hidden truths, and fight to rebuild what remains of humanity.

Accompanied by haunting melodies like "Something Stupid" by Frank and Nancy Sinatra, this is a story of resilience, humanity, and the lengths people will go to survive.

title: Through The War
description:
ᴀ ᴡᴀʀ ʙᴇᴛᴡᴇᴇɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴜs ᴀɴᴅ ᴜᴋ ɪs ᴏɴ ᴛʜᴇ ʜᴏʀɪᴢᴏɴ, ʙᴜᴛ ᴡʜᴀᴛ ɪғ ɪᴛ's ᴀʟʟ ʙᴇᴇɴ sᴇᴛ ɪɴᴛᴏ ᴍᴏᴛɪᴏɴ ʙʏ sᴏᴍᴇᴛʜɪɴɢ ғᴀʀ ᴍᴏʀᴇ sɪɴɪsᴛᴇʀ ᴛʜᴀɴ ᴀɴʏᴏɴᴇ ʀᴇᴀʟɪᴢᴇs? 

sᴀʀᴀʜ, ᴀ ʀᴇᴄʀᴜɪᴛ ɪɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴜs's ᴇʟɪᴛᴇ ᴏʀɢᴀɴɪᴢᴀᴛɪᴏɴ *ᴛʜᴇ ᴅᴏᴍɪɴɪᴏɴ*, ɪs ᴛʜʀᴜsᴛ ɪɴᴛᴏ ᴀ ᴡᴏʀʟᴅ ᴡʜᴇʀᴇ ʟᴏʏᴀʟᴛʏ ɪs ᴛᴇsᴛᴇᴅ ᴀɴᴅ ɴᴏᴛʜɪɴɢ ɪs ᴀs ɪᴛ sᴇᴇᴍs. 

ᴡʜᴇɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴅᴇᴀᴅʟʏ ᴄᴀᴛᴀʟʏsᴛ ᴠɪʀᴜs ɪs ʀᴇʟᴇᴀsᴇᴅ, sᴘʀᴇᴀᴅɪɴɢ ғᴇᴀʀ ᴀɴᴅ ᴄʜᴀᴏs, sᴀʀᴀʜ ᴜɴᴄᴏᴠᴇʀs ᴀ ᴛʀᴜᴛʜ ᴛʜᴀᴛ sʜᴀᴛᴛᴇʀs ᴇᴠᴇʀʏᴛʜɪɴɢ sʜᴇ ᴛʜᴏᴜɢʜᴛ sʜᴇ ᴋɴᴇᴡ. ᴛʜᴇ ᴡᴀʀ ᴍᴀʏ ɴᴏᴛ ʙᴇ ᴀɴ ᴀᴄᴄɪᴅᴇɴᴛ-ɪᴛ's ʙᴇᴇɴ ᴍᴀɴɪᴘᴜʟᴀᴛᴇᴅ ғʀᴏᴍ ᴛʜᴇ sʜᴀᴅᴏᴡs. ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴘᴏᴡᴇʀғᴜʟ ғᴏʀᴄᴇs ᴡᴏʀᴋɪɴɢ ᴛᴏ ᴋᴇᴇᴘ ᴛʜᴇ ᴛʀᴜᴛʜ ʜɪᴅᴅᴇɴ, sᴀʀᴀʜ ᴍᴜsᴛ ᴅᴇᴄɪᴅᴇ ʜᴏᴡ ғᴀʀ sʜᴇ's ᴡɪʟʟɪɴɢ ᴛᴏ ɢᴏ ᴛᴏ sᴛᴏᴘ ᴛʜᴇ ᴡᴏʀʟᴅ ғʀᴏᴍ ᴛᴇᴀʀɪɴɢ ɪᴛsᴇʟғ ᴀᴘᴀʀᴛ. 

ᴄᴀɴ sᴀʀᴀʜ sᴜʀᴠɪᴠᴇ ᴛʜᴇ ʟɪᴇs, ᴀɴᴅ ᴇxᴘᴏsᴇ ᴛʜᴇ ᴛʀᴜᴛʜ ʙᴇғᴏʀᴇ ɪᴛ's ᴛᴏᴏ ʟᴀᴛᴇ? ᴏʀ ᴡɪʟʟ ᴛʜᴇ ᴡᴀʀ ᴄᴏɴsᴜᴍᴇ ʜᴇʀ ᴀɴᴅ ᴇᴠᴇʀʏᴏɴᴇ sʜᴇ ʟᴏᴠᴇs?

title: Life Revamped
description:
Life can lead us many places.  It can be cruel, like it can be amazing; most of all, it shapes us into becoming the people we are today.

Suffering the loss of your parents is never easy; something Amelia Reed knew all too well...

Being uprooted to Port Hope at the age of sixteen, a small town where she grew up spending her summers, making friends with the boy next door, Amelia didn’t seem to mind moving in with her grandmother after her parents’ death.  She had looked forward to seeing Christian again.  It had been five years since her last visit; reasons were unknown to her why her parents suddenly stopped visiting Port Hope.  After her final torturous two years of high school, losing the only best friend she thought she had, she moved to the city to make a name for herself.

In her later years, bad news shifts Amelia’s world on its axis, once again.  Forced to temporarily put her life in the city on hold, she moves back to Port Hope to care for her ailing grandmother, the only family figure she has left.

Eventually deciding to make the move permanent, people from her past come back into her life.  Memories and life experiences help to transform her person.  Forgotten passions, abandoned talents, forgiveness and love are all things that confront us in everyday life.  We can either choose to embrace these opportunities that present themselves or we can ignore them.  That, is our ultimate choice.

No one knows why life throws us these curve balls.  We only know that some of us learn how to roll with the proverbial punches, and others fail miserably.

© ItalRT4u, 2012
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
A little something about me...

I've loved to read and write since I was a child. After more than ten years, I'm writing again! In all my years, here's what I've deduced--sacrificing parts of yourself only leads you to confusion as to who you are in later years. You're best embracing those gifted parts of yourself; it will lead to a much happier and fulfilled version of you!

A few fun facts...
-I may be from Northern Canada but I don't live in an igloo, I don't skate on my local lake to play hockey and I definitely don't have a polar bear as a pet.
-Cold is when your nose freezes shut and you can't breathe; not when you have to put a warm sweater on, you sissy!
-You mess with my friends, you mess with the whole damn army, so watch out!
-I'm actually a lover and not a fighter. Yeah, I know, you're not really buying it with the previous statement huh?
-FINALLY, yes I'm quirky but that's why you love me. Now, ADMIT IT! I'm fabulous!


Quotes:

Greatness is only achieved by those who strive constantly for improvement - Yours truly
A man cannot be comfortable without his own approval - Mark Twain
Tomorrow is a new day with no mistakes in it - Lucy Maud Montgomery

title: Remnants of Reality (The Perkins School for Self Improvement #2)
description:
- Highest ranking: #688 in Thriller. -

This description contains spoilers. If you have not read School of Secrets, please do so before continuing.

Sixteen-year-old Amber Greene, a sophomore at the Perkins School for Self Improvement, is having a hard time to say the least.

She's dead, at least she was.

Now, trapped in the darkness of her own mind, Amber struggles to keep a grip on her humanity. Following the events of School of Secrets, her friends are determined to save her, but can she be saved from herself?

The headmaster's in over his head, and darkness has a tight grip on the Perkins School for Self Improvement. Still, the headmaster's nine-year-old daughter, a powerful wielder of elemental magic, believes there's a way to return Amber's lost humanity to her spirit.

In the midst of a world that seems to be fracturing on all sides, Amber must decide whether to embrace her humanity, or to give in to the killer instinct that is newly ingrained in her. On top of that, Marco Wen and Yoshi Tanaka are at it again with their sinister plans, and it's up to Amber and her friends to take a stand.

Can Amber find herself in time, or has she lost her grip on the remnants of reality?

title: The Beautiful Deep (NaNoWriMo 2018) |Completed 2019|Being Rewritten 2023|
description:
Aernford is the sort of town that people avoid, a town that has its secrets, its issues, its darkness... 

It's a town full of history surrounding the three founding families. It's a town that the Carpenter's thought would be their fresh start. A new chapter. A blank page. 

Shirley and Joseph Carpenter find the town fascinating and easily slip into social networking with it's residents... 

But when her husband turns up dead from a supposed bear attack Shirley Carpenter begins to realize why most people avoid the town and the locals that live within it. 

More secrets are buried in the depths of the waters of the docked ships in Aernford, than are kept in her heart, and as the secrets of her soul begin to spill themselves, so do those of the people she's come to know... 

After all, how far can you really trust strangers, if you can't really trust yourself?

Mahira is a 35 year old woman who is living a peaceful life, until her child gets diagnosed with cancer, and she has to ask her husband for help, with whom she has had no contact for the past 4 years.

To make things worse, Aban, who is Fawad's cousin ends up developing a crush on Mahira after moving on from a crush that he had on Bahaar during his college years.

title: SIREN
description:
SIREN is a novel about six people from around the world selected by the UN to investigate a strange musical transmission emanating from Neptune's orbit. They're given a spaceship with cutting edge technology, placed into an induced coma, and expected to report back in three years time. But when the awakened crew arrives at the origin of the transmission, their electronics malfunction and they're driven through the Kuiper Belt. With their engines ruined, oxygen supplies dwindling and one of the team members suffering from hypoxia, time is of the essence for the troubled squad. Their situation grows ever more tense when Tommy Fletcher discovers three alien ships watching their every move.

Tommy Fletcher, the protagonist of SIREN, is the resident linguistics expert who over-thinks, second-guesses and has a habit of biting his nails. He may be in his late twenties, but Tommy's ceaseless trepidation makes the rest of the hardened crew feel like he's fragile and witless. Will the chaotic events happening around Tommy break his brittle will, or can he shed his hesitant demeanour and become a hero?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello! I'm Jacob! I'm a twenty-something year old guy from the UK and telling stories is one of my favourite things in the world.

SIREN is a novel that I've been working on for a couple of years, and I've decided to make it free and available to everyone in the world. I hope you enjoy it!

If you have any questions for me regarding SIREN or just want advice on writing, send me a message, or tweet at me on Twitter. I'm @JacobDyer.

title: Ngozichukwuka
description:
A girl named Ngo, lived in Kaduna state, Nigeria with her mother and five siblings. They all had to stick together. Being Igbo and living in the North wasn't all fun and games for them due to the religious and tribal clash in Kaduna state. 
     Being an only parent, with six children and in a state like that, Mama Uka still found how to balance it all.
