title: Things Not Subject To Gravity
description:
Set Voland--a homeless young man who attacked a child in the midst of hallucinations--has been caught by the police and sent to a psychiatric hospital. There, he's stricken by a meeting with a Shining White Being who will completely overturn his life.

David Green--supposedly an editor in chief for the Evening Times in Glasgow--has been sent to New York by a secret organization. He's given the task of finding Sybil Vain, an enigmatic fortune-teller known as The Oracle.

Sybil Vain has been looking for someone as well--𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑚𝑎𝑛 𝑜𝑓 𝑏𝑖𝑠 𝑑𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑚𝑠, or more precisely, the recurrent premonition of his own death.

When their paths intertwine the wheels of destiny begin to go astray and the door to the esoteric realms slams open.

Is it possible to beguile death by knowing the future or is everything already decided? And what if someone could attain Solomon's power?

⋰⋱⋰⋱⋰⋱⋰⋱⋰⋱⋰⋱

"Even Newton when he discovered gravity believed in what he saw, yet there is an infinite number of invisible entities and, among those, countless are the 
things not subject to gravity." -Sybil Vain

⋰⋱⋰⋱⋰⋱⋰⋱⋰⋱⋰⋱

title: Beyond the Fade
description:
In the picturesque town of Blossomvale, Mora's dream of a peaceful life seems within reach. But as she breathes in the sweet scent of blooming flowers, doubts creep in. "Is this really the life I want?" she wonders.

Mora's world is turned upside down when she's disqualified from a crucial selection test. But Commander Orion offers her a second chance, and Mora must navigate the complex web of alliances and rivalries to survive.

As she confronts her deepest fears and doubts, a mysterious cult emerges as a hidden threat. With the stakes higher than ever, Mora must rise to the challenge and overcome her obstacles to succeed.

title: SHADOWS OF DESTINY
description:
In a realm where angels and devils exist in a fragile balance, a boy born with demonic origins has a singular purpose: to protect Aria, a powerful 21-year-old angel. Though the boy is a devil by nature, he was created for the specific task of guarding Aria from the many dangers that threaten her life and the world they inhabit. His existence is marked by a binding oath, and despite his dark heritage, he has been raised with an unwavering devotion to the angel he must protect.

Aria, a young angel with immense abilities, has always lived a life of duty and responsibility. Despite her strength, she is unaware of the full extent of the dangers surrounding her. Her powers are coveted by dark forces, and her very existence is central to an ongoing battle between light and darkness. As she navigates her own inner conflicts, Aria begins to realize that the world is not as simple as she once believed.

The villain, a powerful and malevolent force, seeks to harness Aria's powers for their own dark agenda, threatening not only her life but the delicate equilibrium between the celestial beings. As the story unfolds, the boy and Aria must form an unlikely partnership, with their fates intertwined in a battle against the villain's growing.

title: A Sinister Crime Book 2 [Sample]
description:
An NYPD Detective James Harrison, age twenty-four, is a homicide detective, and a hard working cop, working in the NYPD's 13th precinct in the New York's City Police Department Manhattan South Homicide Squad in Manhattan, New York City, who investigates homicides and serious assault cases, is assigned to a case where the suspect of a bank robbery body is found dead lying on the ground behind the bank and James as the homicide detective in the New York City Police Department and his partner Detective Ben Diemaet together put in the investigation into why the suspect of the robbery has been murdered. 

Until as the investigation is being conducted, James begins to notice as he and his partner Ben solving the case together is being turned into a much more sinister situation in the case. The suspect of the bank robbery was a part of a group of men known as the Black Knights are known as the men who brutally torture and murder their wives and their children. 

As James and his partner are to stop the Black Knights from getting other men as husbands to join the Black Kinghts to torture and murder their wives and their children, James must put all these men behind bars. But will James be able to stop the violence against women and their children who are being murdered from these Black Knights? 

If anyone who sees this story being plagiarized by someone else, please send me a quick message as soon as possible. I do not tolerate plagiarism at all, and I will sue whoever is responsible of stealing my work.

authorBio:
Hi and welcome,

I also wanted to say thank you from the bottom of heart that you've decided to click on my profile and read one of my books, me as your author, I can't express the love of my readers, who have literally supported me since day one.

All of you, my readers, my supporters, my everything, I thank God from above for each and every one of you who literally push me to continue to follow my dreams. Again, thank you!

I have been a writer since I was like eleven years old, and I knew from day one that I was meant to be a writer. I can't imagine ten years down from now that I look forward to meeting each of you amazing people.

title: Between love and ruin
description:
In a world shadowed by betrayal and revenge, Beverly must navigate a perilous path between love and survival. Strong and resilient, she has survived the darkest trials, but when faced with the devastation of those she holds dear, she's forced to confront her deepest fears. As danger closes in and alliances shift, Beverly's heart remains a beacon of hope and loyalty-yet the price of love may be more than she is willing to pay. Will she embrace the man who's always been there, or will the scars of the past destroy everything she's fought for?


Augustus is a man of shadows, driven by a deep and personal mission. With a cold, calculating mind, he's learned to hide his true intentions behind a façade of control and charisma. But as his world begins to unravel, the lines between duty and desire blur, forcing him to question everything he thought he knew. With his heart locked away and revenge on his mind, Augustus is a man who will do anything to achieve his goals-no matter the cost.


Alonzo is a man of strength, power, and unshakable resolve. With a fierce loyalty to those he cares for, he commands respect and fear in equal measure. Beneath his tough exterior lies a man whose heart beats only for one, a love so deep that it drives him to protect and conquer all obstacles in his path. But even the strongest walls can crumble, and Alonzo's greatest battle may be against the very forces he's spent his life controlling.

title: Social Engineer
description:
A Wattpad Featured Story! 

A pharmaceutical company under cyberattack from China. The chemical formula for their Alzheimer's drug at stake.

Can elite hacker Brody Taylor fortify their cyber-defences before it's too late? And can hackers ever be trusted?

Hired by a global pharmaceutical company to test their digital defences, elite hacker, Brody Taylor, applies his computer mastery and repertoire of audacious confidence tricks to penetrate their most secure systems.

Can Brody obtain the secret chemical formula for their latest drug?

Are his motivations as pure as they first appear?

Could his new girlfriend somehow be influencing Brody's actions?


Accurately depicting real-world, modern-day computer hacking techniques, SOCIAL ENGINEER is a standalone novella that introduces Brody Taylor and the Deep Web Thriller series.

The Deep Web Thriller Series:
The Deep Web Thriller series features Brody Taylor, an elite computer hacker who specialises in hacking and social engineering the weakest link of all computer systems: the humans who use them.

SOCIAL ENGINEER - A Deep Web Thriller #0

INVASION OF PRIVACY - A Deep Web Thriller #1

If you love intricately plotted thrillers with unexpected twists that are packed with technology and great characters, read SOCIAL ENGINEER now.

authorBio:
I'm the author of the Deep Web Thriller series of books which are chock-a-block with unexpected twists, technology and great characters. I've been told my books are a cross between Jeffery Deaver, Ian Rankin and Tom Clancy - quite a mix!

I joined Wattpad over two years ago long before I self-published my work. I first shared early drafts of my debut novel, INVASION OF PRIVACY, posting the opening chapters and was overwhelmed by the constructive and positive feedback. Wattpad readers gave me the confidence to continue through to completion. The finished novel is now published on Amazon. title: The Broken Boxer
description:
~~~~🌻~~~~

A few months after escaping all the events that chased Daytona Lyn out of San Francisco, she finds herself ready to face every thing that has hurt her. 

That and she's finally ready to end the constant pain that Colton brings to everyone he meets. 

One plane flight, two ex-lovers, and three long weeks in the place that dragged her to hell and back. 

Will Daytona Lyn rise above it all, or will the city of San Francisco end up destroying her all over again? 

Find out in the sequel to The Good Girl Boxer:

The Broken Boxer.

~~~~🌻~~~~


"I'm not the same girl I was before. I've changed, and for the better. I'm done trying to inflict fear into other people just because I'm scared myself." I breathed out into his chest. 

"You sure about that Daytona. Because by the way you're reacting to me right now sure does seem like the way you would react to me all those years ago." He twirled a piece of my hair around on his finger and tucked it behind my ear. 

My heart was betraying me and beating rapidly in my chest. He broke my heart. I should not be enjoying him being this close to me. 

"Yes. I'm- I'm sure." 

But I wasn't sure at all.
Tous Droits Réservés

Moriah Hanlon is a new, biracial girl in Pachuck, Oklahoma trying to come to terms with her twin sister's death while also adjusting to her mom's psychotic episodes. 

When a foreign exchange student goes missing, Moriah discovers unsettling things about Pachuck's dark past. Things like kidnappings, sacrifices, and a weird obsession with hogs. After a secret club leaves letters addressed to her, claiming to "watch her", she fears she'll meet the same fate as the missing foreign exchange student. Now, Moriah has 24 hours to figure out who's behind the kidnappings, or she might be next.

Children have been plagued by monsters for decades. From creepers under the bed, to the little voices whispering fears inside their heads. To the eyes that lie behind closet doors, to the ones that roam that halls of creaking floors.

A fearsome being dressed finely in all blue, with a mask to cover gruesome features that allow nightmares to ensue. So, run, hide, pretend it's all in your mind. For it doesn't matter to the monster of blue.

title: Until Death Do Us Part? (Completed)
description:
"Hi, I'm Tara Morningstar. I'm twenty-two years old. Oh, and one more thing: I'm dead." 

For Tamara "Tara" Morningstar, getting in an accident on her first anniversary wasn't in on the plan. 

Neither was dying. 

What's worse is, she's stuck in a place called the In-Between, where souls like her; souls who've died before their time are trapped until they find what's been tying them to the earth, and let it go. 

But Tara isn't ready to let go of Tristan. 

Not yet. 

Then she meets Alex-Dark, gorgeous and brooding Alex is a guy who's stuck in the in-between just like her, and someone who has many secrets of his own. There can't be two people more different then Tris and Alex, and yet Tara is strangely drawn towards the mysterious boy; a boy she knows she's seen somewhere before. 

After a series of impenetrable events-all of which point accusingly towards the person she thought loved her the most-Tara realizes what seemed to be an accident wasn't actually one, and things start getting out of hand. 

Now Tara is faced with an impossible choice: 

Have faith in his love for her and stay in the in-between forever, watching Tristan from afar; or find out what really happened the day she died, and let him go. 

Forever.

Highest Rating: #8 in Paranomal

title: The Painting
description:
"It took me five seconds to fall. The impact on my chest jarring my body but not my mind. I suppose this is the point where your life is supposed to flash before your eyes as time itself freezes - and it did in a way. But I didn't relive my life physically like walking through an old memory, déjà vu in each step. It was a feeling, something that started in my chest and spread to my fingertips, one so unique to me that it encapsulated each significant event into one single second."
For as long as May can remember one mystery has haunted her world.
A dirty window before her, the grim obstructing her vision, she has lived with a loss she can't identify - that is until one rainy night. 
Gradually the spots of dirt May scratched at for so long wipe away with the touch of a finger. But when she looks in will she like what she sees - or will curiosity kill the cat?

title: NERVES OF STEEL
description:
Trapped with your enemy in an underground bunker?

              Trapped in an underground bunker with her sworn enemy, she finds herself face-to-face with the man who let her father die-the man who holds ultimate power as Russia's Army General. She's spent her life plotting revenge, determined to bring his family to their knees and to watch him fall. 

               But when a single mission goes fatally wrong, and he sacrifices himself for her. The move shatters everything she thought she knew, unsettling her hatred and forcing her to question who this man truly is.

              Now, armed with the final piece of evidence to end him, she faces an impossible choice. Choosing to believe this man had changed she decides to give him the benefit of doubt. Thus, shunning every other warning. Unknown to her, his motives run far deeper and darker and she's only but a pawn in his actual game.

            She's caught in a dangerous game. Because he's seen her hatred, knows her every move, and his obsession runs deeper and darker than she ever imagined. He wants her close, bound to him, even if it means bringing the world to ruin. 

            Caught in his possessive grip, with nowhere left to run, she's forced to ask herself: will she risk everything to bring him down, or give in to the dangerous thrill of being his, even if it destroys her?

Keep Reading To Find Out>>>>

title: Dialogue Concerning the Imminent Apocalypse
description:
[2018 WATTYS WINNER] 

Louise Johnson was an African American teen living on the brink of the Space Race. Her hobbies included studying the twinkling night sky, ignoring her racist classmates, equally fantasizing about both killing and kissing Patricia Morris--and oh, using quantum teleportation to her own advantage by the means of a perplexing silver Ring. That was, until she found herself knee-deep in a heap of files revealing that the newly-formed NASA was hiding inconceivable research from Project Vanguard that should've destroyed the entire planet worse the than progressing Cold War. Now obviously, the forty-eight states of America are still intact, and so is our beloved Earth. 

But why? 

Fortunately for humanity, Louise Johnson and her diverse team of science-loving geeks turned the imminent apocalypse into just another facet of American history. And this is the entirely illegal story of how.

[©2017-2018. All rights reserved.]

Olson Cedar was born in district 10 where the cattle were raised and slaughtered for food. the districts are were children are raised from lucky survivors or better yet cowards... that were lucky enough not to get their names picked for a fight to the death in a fashion of entertainment for those who are richer than their lower factions.

It's kill or be killed.

title: Not Another Diva
description:
Now available on Amazon and in Kindle Unlimited. Read Chapter 1 here!

He's a model with a blackbelt.
She'a a pop star with a stalker.
Fake dating just became a matter of life and death.

Zack:
I never thought I'd meet a pop star. And if you told me I'd ever be dating one, I would have laughed in your face.

Joke's on me, though, when I get a callback to be in Brianna Royce's music video...and they tell me they want me to be her fake boyfriend when the video shoot is over.

Do I want to fake date a diva? Not really.

But once I meet her, I realize she's not another diva.
When she tells me she's being stalked, that she wants me to protect her, well...I can't say no.

Guess I'm dating the diva after all.

Not Another Diva is the first book in the Hollywood Stories series of full-length, standalone romances told from the Hero's point of view with no cliffhangers and a guaranteed happily ever after.

title: G•I•R•L•S - Supercorp
description:
•SuperCorp AU• 
•WARNING ⚠️ • 
•Lena G!P⚠️⚠️⚠️⚠️⚠️⚠️⚠️leave if you're not okay with it• 

Ponytails and knee high socks. Bubble gum and vanilla milkshakes. Cheer captain and prom queen. Cherry red corvettes and hot boyfriends. 


Kara Danvers was all of it. 

The infamous blond was top of the social pyramid in Arias Valley, a small town in the green mountains and was practically the queen bee of both the school and town. Born into the Danvers family gave her the title of "Alex's sister" but Kara quickly made a name for herself as the most popular and loved girl in Arias Valley. 

Lena Luthor was much less than that. Although she came from the richest family in Arias Valley, she wasn't very popular and only had a few friends. She was just another nerd to most people but Lena was destructively trying to hide her sexuality and the fact that she was very in love with Kara Danvers. 

Eventually, paths were destined to cross, just not in the way everyone thought and together, they'll face the dangers of Arias Valley. 

A disappearance, a murder, and a stalker, there's so much more going on than anybody could've anticipated.

title: DIVISION 52 - BOOK I
description:
In the distant future there are two powers that control Merridian city. The first: A dictatorship known as the Silver Sun, whose militant soldiers enforce the law. The second: A crime lord known as Scorpion. She controls the entire black market, faction gangs, and every other killer for hire in the city. 

They are Division 52.
    
When sudden and lethal attacks with Silver Sun marks start littering around the upper class sectors action must be taken swiftly. The chaos quickly climbs on both sides and tensions within sectors reaches its boiling point. 

But the game all changes when Scorpion discovers that the Emperor of the Silver Sun has a daughter. 

This girl is impulsive and illusive. Nothing of the pampered royalty that was first suspected. With different agendas and impossible backgrounds, the pair are quickly caught between wanting to kill one another and build something much more in the farthest depths of Merridian...

title: Mania
description:
m a n i a  -  obsessive love ; experience great emotional highs and lows ; very possessive and often jealous lovers 

Collette, the most peculiar of runaways. She names the objects she's fond of, she hums songs that she spent weeks memorizing as they played on the radio, and her hands shake when she flips through countless books. She could never figure out how to hold a knife properly.

She was awfully strange. 

He was the most terrifying of souls. With hair that curled in many directions at every hour of the day , soft-spoken lips and a furious mind, and the way he awkwardly glanced away when she stared back for too long. His hands could so easily snap her in half. 

He was awfully obsessed.

"The problem with the human mind is that we so desperately want something that we will create an illusion to achieve it. It leads us to our capture. It leads us to our grave."

title: Drake's Misguided Adventure
description:
Drake, a child of unknown strength, enters the camp filled with children of Greek gods, Camp Half-Blood. The safest place for the children to be in, but not anymore. He has entered the camp under the disguise of being a child of one of the Greek gods, but little do they know, in the background, he's on the path to destroy the camp from within.

This is the story of Drake. The boy who is on the mission to be the most dangerous demigod the camp has ever faced but will he succeed, or be driven off course as new light to past may change his goals. Follow this misguided adventure and see where it takes him, and ultimately end.

This is a fanfic based on the Percy-verse but none of the og characters will appear here and the verse is mainly used as the setting for the story. So expect the world to be the same as it is in the Percy-verse but with small changes to fit this story better and again, NO OG CAST WILL APPEAR... EXCEPT FOR CHIRON... can't really do the camp without him.

title: A Midnight Mind
description:
The dream man attacks at midnight. To the students of Shirewood High, he's a suburban legend. But to newcomer Ethan Murdock, he's a deadly threat. To prevent the dream man from causing mass brain-death, Ethan teams up with his brainy classmate Neil and sassy school reporter Violet on a psychic journey into a world of pure memory. There, they must uncover the truth behind the dream man before everyone loses their mind. Literally.

title: Crowd: A Dystopian Social Network Thriller (Final Draft)
description:
What if an algorithm controls your life?

In the near future, California is plagued by civil riots. Exploding rent, high crime, and political corruption threaten the lives of ordinary people.

Enter Crowd, an advanced social network that ranks each citizen by their contribution to society, ensuring justice for all.
Want affordable healthcare or better employment?

If you rank high enough, you can get it.

Rayn Cruzada is an ambitious graduate who joins Crowd as a field agent. Her high score allows her to investigate citizens with problematic low ones. Conflict arises as no one understands the algorithms, and losing your ranking means losing your apartment and access to transport. Or worse...

With California on the brink of civil war, Rain has to discover whether Crowd is the solution or a problem.

Inspired by Black Mirror, The Circle, and The Social Network, Crowd is a pre-dystopian thriller.

title: The Child Of The Apocalypse (CHOSEN)
description:
The darkness hideth not from thee; but the night shineth as the day: the darkness and the light are both alike to thee.  --- Psalms 139: 12




                           | A WHOLE WORLD LATER |    


"How would you explain darkness? As the total absence of light or just pure unholiness? Evil has neither a beginning nor end," Ray sighed.

Alexandra just listened. 

"Where does this evil come from?" He wouldn't have heard her if he wasn't paying close attention to her every move and expression.

"Evil comes from here." He replied, touching his heart. Her eyes were wide opened in confusion, but she listened.

"Alexandra? How would you explain light?" He spoke, but before she could reply, he was gone. Like he had never been there.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~


By: Ivy Daniels

title: 4th JULY [ENG. VER]
description:
𝗧𝗶𝘁𝗹𝗲: 𝟒𝐭𝐡 𝐉𝐔𝐋𝐘 (English Version) 
Note: This is translated using Google Translate. Sorry if there is a language error

A shadow of fear enveloped the city. A series of mysterious murders had gripped the city, indiscriminately claiming victims of all ages and genders, their deaths gruesome and chilling. Nox, a lazy yet brilliant detective, found himself caught in the vortex of this case. The evidence was thin, witnesses were scarce, and all the victims shared a dark past. Was it coincidence, or was there a connecting thread? With no trace of the killer, the case was dubbed 'Shadow of the Killer'.
 
Nox's brilliance stemmed from a series of unexpected coincidences and blunders. From the start of his career, his mistakes had led him to success. From this, he had developed a 'cool' philosophy of life - relaxed yet successful. However, the 'Shadow of the Killer' case was far more complex. For months, Nox struggled, until one day he stumbled upon a shocking truth and a reality that was hard to accept.
 
"Sir, there's another murder!" - Ethan
 
"What's the motive for this murder?" - Police
 
"There's no trace or evidence?!" - Nox
 
"The residents are increasingly terrified because of the frequent murders lately." - Police
 
"Damn! What is the killer actually doing?!" - Nox
 
"All the murdered victims have a bad background history." - Ethan
 
"W-what is this? T-this can't be real?" - ??
 
Who was this shadow killer? And what was the shocking truth that Nox discovered? Would 'misunderstandings' and 'coincidences' help him this time? Could Nox uncover the perpetrator of the 'Shadow of the Killer' case before more lives were lost?
 
⚠️This story contains strong language
⚠️This story contains a lot of gruesome action
⚠️This story is my fiction and do not try to imitate it
⚠️Ignore the inappropriate words and actions

title: Be Alright
description:
[completed] "What's wrong? What's wrong is that no matter how hard you try and convince me that I'm what you want, I can't believe you. I see the way you look at him. I hear it in your voice when you talk to him. Even the way you touch him is different. What's wrong is I know you love him and I can't be selfish with you. We are a mistake, Octavia"

Octavia Bradley had it easy. She has good friends, a good job, and an overall good life. Things were simple - until she gets caught in the middle of two guys and a murder investigation. Faced with the job of going undercover, Octavia must figure out if Tyler Watson is as bad as people have made him out to be, or if the sweet and caring side of him that she sees can help prove his innocence. If that wasn't chaotic enough, Octavia is also battling feelings for her best friend, Jace Hughes, a police officer who will do anything to protect her. With the drama of both Jace and Tyler in her life, will Octavia be able to go back to her simple life, or will she fall apart at the seams?

title: The Red Guard: Vampire Hunters of Vatican City
description:
Chloe is bitten by a vampire while on vacation in Rome, but is saved by The Red Guard who halt the soul-destroying virus in her body. Chloe quickly becomes a part of the elite group of Vampire Hunters who follow the will of the Pope.

She is horrified when she learns that there is an agreement between vampires and the Catholic Church. Vampires can kill the poor with reckless disregard with the blessing of the Pope. Not only that, the Church encourages population growth within its cities around the world for vampire consumption in order to protect its own upper ranks and those who support the church financially. 

As Chloe watches boatloads of refugees hit the shores of Italy, she discovers that she cannot live with the rules set before her and she soon learns that she is not alone.  With a little help from some like-minded Red Guards, she sets out to make a difference in the world.

title: The Summer's Wrath
description:
After two years of leaving their families behind, Aurefia Tabitha and her friends finally return-but the cost of their return is more than they ever expected. They sacrificed everything to protect their loved ones, putting their own lives on the line to secure a safer future for those they cared about. But in their absence, the world they fought for has continued without them, and now, the very people they tried to protect are once again in grave danger.

Should they leave again to safeguard those they love, or stay and face the consequences of their actions?

But when Aurefia returns, she finds herself torn. In the midst of chaos and uncertainty, she meets Atheon Giovanni, a man whose life couldn't be more different from hers. Atheon's world is one of luxury and peace, where every moment is cherished and every decision is made with purpose. In sharp contrast, Aurefia's life has been shaped by darkness, danger, and the brutal weight of leadership.

A fierce, intelligent woman forged in war, she's driven by a singular goal: to protect.

However, just as she begins to open her heart to Atheon, she uncovers a chilling truth-his family harbors a dangerous secret, one that could unravel everything. Two years ago, a shadowy event occurred, and the Vourelle family has been hiding the truth ever since. As Aurefia digs deeper, she realizes that the threat is closer than she thought, and the secrets Atheon is hiding might be the very key to everything she's been fighting for.

The stakes grow higher with every passing moment. Aurefia is caught between the darkness she knows and the light she's never allowed herself to experience.

How far will Aurefia go to uncover the truth? What is she willing to sacrifice in a game where the cost of failure could be far greater than anything she's faced before? The clock is ticking, and Aurefia must make a choice that could change the fate of everything she holds dear.

title: The Mysterious Gathering (Book I)
description:
*EDITING*
Art Indigo can't remember the last time she was emotional. Sometimes, she barely feels human.
That is, until she joins the gathering; a group of people who dance in circles and chant in the woods. However, the strange gathering seems to be her only solace from the eyes that expect too much. Entrusted with the safekeeping of their precious book, she can no longer stay detached and distant as she is drawn into their conflict with another group. 

In the midst of all this, Art struggles to make sense of her life. She can't seem to get along with any of her regular friends, and she might even push away the one person she truly cares about. After joining the gathering, Art finally relearns what it means to have emotions such as love, hate, anger, joy... pain. Now, everything hurts.

I was 19 when I took a life for the first time. I was really afraid at that time I thought it was the end. The end of me. The end of my life and I decided to kill myself because I didn't want to go to jail but my brother covered up for me and that's when the devil inside me prevailed. She has been living inside me since then. In the beginning I hated her, I wanted to get rid of her somehow. She used to mock me and make fun of me for being a coward, one day I lost it and killed a man in all of my senses and after that it's me who kills not her and I don't want her to leave me now because Dilan sarsılmaz is nothing without her rage and rebellion and because if not me then she'll take my revenge.

DILAN SARSILMAZ~

I look at where her hand is clasping mine and I see a tear drop on her hand, that's when I realize that I'm crying. I'm being vulnerable in front of her.

I tried to trap this woman. I tried to send her to jail. I cheated on her and yet she is here for me. I feel guilty. Should I tell her? 

KEREM DUYMAZ~

I'm a fucked up man I cannot drag her into my mess. I'd rather die for her everyday than letting her die because of me.

I love her. I really do but do I deserve her? No. But can I see her around that bastard? Again no.

BERK ERÇEL~

title: RAYEL (MxM) [ongoing]
description:
|𝑾𝒐𝒏 𝑩𝒆𝒔𝒕 𝒊𝒏 𝑷𝒂𝒓𝒂𝒏𝒐𝒓𝒎𝒂𝒍 @𝒕𝒉𝒆𝒇𝒊𝒄𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏𝒂𝒘𝒂𝒓𝒅𝒔 2019|

A dark entity rises, ready to eradicate all living beings it possesses. Neither memory and physical proof of their whereabouts is left behind. Its nature aims at a human's negative energy, and Ray is its new target--a young eighteen-year-old man who struggles day and night with bouts on reality. To make matters worse, it feasts on Ray's doubts and grief.

The Otherworld, hidden from mankind's knowledge, remains crippled after the last war. They gather their greatest warriors and demigods to fight once more, but without the help of Ray, they are soon to vanish, leaving the humans at the mercy of the Eater. This evil crawls its way into Ray's world, wedges itself into his family and friends, making it harder for him to grasp at the strings of those he loves dear.

Ray must muster the strength to fight for his loved ones, his friends, and himself, but he can't do it alone. Together with the help of a stranger from his dreams, a few Otherworlders, and unexpected allies--he might recover what's left of his world and the Otherworld on time.

I designed all my book covers with public domain images.

authorBio:
He/Him
Hi, I'm Jojo!

Still haven't transitioned, but I hope to.

RAYEL, Winner of Best in Paranormal in @thefictionawards 2019

My main focus is to write about diverse characters such as lgbtq+, atypical stories, and romance because who doesn't like a little love now and then?

I was a Cat dad, I used to have three cats, but on March 27 at 1:30am my baby Luna passed away.

I don't do read for reads or vote for votes, so please don't send any requests, I will ignore them or refuse your request. It's incredibly offensive when someone spams my conversation section with a link to their book and expects anyone to read their work, the same applies when they copy-paste the link in my inbox. The greatest offense is when they put a link of their story or work in the comment section of my books. Not only is that disrespectful, incredibly offensive, but morally wrong. My books will not be the bridge to your advertisements, propaganda, and offensive vandalism. These books are my heart and soul, time taken from my life to write. I worked hard, hours, days without sleep to learn and cultivate it. You will not put up walls on my work with your name on it, do that in your own book, ask your friends or request it at a formal form like an award book or review book. I will delete it from my comment sections, inbox, and wherever else it may be in my profile. You want me to read your work, ask me, don't spam my inbox and my conversation section. Get to know me first and move on from there.

I do hope you enjoy my stories, they were worthy of your time, and continue to support my work.

Goals:

- Learn a lot about creative writing.☑️ (I marked this, but I'll never stop learning.  lol)
- Tell my Mom I'm a writer. ☑️
- Finish writing a book.
- Revise, proofread, and edit my finished book(s).
- Publish my book with a Literary Agent.
- Or I'll self-publish.

title: The Curious Abyss (Vol. 2 : Finor Arc)
description:
The Finor Arc of The Curious Abyss starts after the end of the Aquinn Arc.

   In the Finor Arc, Lucas and his friends arrive in the floating city of Finor, a marvel of anti-gravity technology and harmony. However, beneath its shining towers lies a shadowy underworld threatening to destabilize the city. As chaos unfolds, the group faces relentless mafia forces, catastrophic sabotage, and moral dilemmas that test their unity and newfound powers. With Finor on the brink of collapse, they must uncover hidden truths, forge alliances, and rise to the challenge, knowing their actions will echo far beyond the city's borders.

   This story is highly inspired by One Piece anime & manga.

title: Test Subjects [ON HOLD]
description:
At the dawn of the 22nd Century, when the world falls under the hand of a power hungry Warlord, who is set on finding a serum to grant him immortality, a group of very different individuals find themselves thrown into a turmoil of unexpected adventures, death, hunters, and superpowers. 

They are named Test Subjects, and though survival was the original plan, they didn't expect to witness first-hand the dangers and horrors involved in the greedy game of Human Survival. When their world turns upside down with newly discovered abilities, these Test Subjects must face the very man behind the reason why they were now mutant humans, hunted in a world with a Zombie outbreak. 

Join Adina, Matthew, Laruen, Jackson, Valerie, Khairo and Khiran, as they struggle to survive not only the Warlord that hunts them, but the horrid truths of human nature as we all know it.

title: VOICELESS | SAMPLE
description:
Book 1 in The O'Connor Chronicles
	
She ran.  They hunted her. 

They don't lurk in the dark or hide in the shadows.  No.  They hide in plain sight.  They could be anyone: your next-door neighbor, your father, your friend...the person you least expect.  The Unseen. 

Ky Grayson was chasing a murderer.  What he found, however, was a girl.  Hurt.  Starving.  Terrified.  Alone.  Their lives collided-intertwining together at an effortless pace neither of them had anticipated.  The more time he spent with her, the more he realized he was in over his head.

No one wants to be found.  No one wants to be seen.

But they see everything.

Ever since then,many people fall victims to the unknown perpetrator that were simply known as "The Polaroid Killer".

With no other lead,the Moses County Sheriff seek the help of Detective Noel,a renowed and famed detective who were now tasked to solve the long running cases of The Polaroid Killer.

title: In His Arms
description:
Power series Book 1

"You have gone all soft like a girl. Do consider the gender changing operation after this."

"Domenic don't, you kill her, you kill me."

"What?" dropping the gun, he looked at Angelo in confusion.

Angelo sighed, "We have a tiny bit of problem here. The serum has been activated."

Domenic frowned, "What do you mean by activated? It wasn't supposed to be..." He paused trailing off before something clicked in his mind, "Wait a minute. You b*st*rd, you couldn't keep it in your pants! You had to go and mate with... With..."

"With what?" Angelo challenged with an eyebrow raised.

_________________________


With the rise of new nations after the third world war and the thirst of power and supremacy, Katrina unknowingly gets involved in the rivalry between the two supreme powers.

Buying a lover wasn't new in Wursha, but she didn't know that she buying a lover for herself would make her a beautiful hindrance in a dangerous mission.

But what if, he was cold towards her and didn't treat her the way she thought? what if he showed interest in someone else, other than her?

Add an experienced powerful lady set out to snatch Katrina's lover from her, into the scene.

With lies, players, betrayal, jealousy, secrets, greed, lust, love, heart breaks and power, will Katrina survive the pre-war activities? Will she ever find love? Or will she die in a corner with a broken heart?

Life of a person and power of a nation can never be fair. While the thirst for power goes around, will Katrina be safe and sound in his arms?
___________________________

title: Escaping Gunpoint
description:
This novel takes place in the slums of Miami Florida and focuses on the life of a young adult girl stuck in a criminal lifestyle. This fictional story is full of betrayal, bloodshed, and lust as the main character, Ashley King, fights her way out of her father's gang with the help of a young rich man named Nicholas Weston.  There are several obstacles that will get in their way; one being Chase Williams, a childhood friend and 'coworker' to Ashley King. Nicholas Weston, Ashley King, and Chase Williams play vital roles in this violent story. This story becomes more impactful and passionate with each detail that defines Nick, Ash, and Chase because they are the writer's playground. They all will form this beautifully dangerous love triangle that will make Ashley's world rearrange itself, which will keep readers on this tightrope of emotions.

description:

authorBio:

I write strong yet relatable heroines, flawed but redeemable heroes, and the occasional villain you'll love to hate. I like to subvert tropes to create original ways of looking at the familiar. title: CILEUNCANG
description:
In the midst of the mystical realms and magical traditions of Sunda, Cileuncang invites readers into a world brimming with enigmas, mysteries, and the secrets of the supernatural realms of Nusantara.
This story revolves around Rangga and Silvi, two souls bound not only by love but also by a great destiny that stretches between the human world and the spiritual dimension.
When Rangga becomes trapped in Brekasan, a supernatural realm inhabited by mystical beings such as the Ipri, Danawa, Ririwa, and Bancala, he faces the dual challenge of survival and maintaining the balance between the human and supernatural dimensions. Meanwhile, Silvi, still in the real world, refuses to stand idly by. Driven by profound love and unwavering determination, she devises a grand plan that will change her life forever.
The novel unveils the often-overlooked Sundanese mythology, including the legend of Ambar's child playing in puddles during the rain, the Cileuncang chant capable of unveiling supernatural veils, and the intricate connection between humans and the spiritual realm adorned with traditional teachings and religious values. With its narrative rich in cultural elements, Cileuncang is not only a tale of supernatural adventure but also a profound exploration of the traditions and philosophies of the magical and meaningful Sundanese heritage.
Can Rangga and Silvi overcome the treacherous challenges of the spiritual realm and reunite their love separated by different dimensions? Or will they be consumed by the whirlwind of mysteries passed down by their ancestors?
Unleash your imagination into a world unlike anything you've ever seen before-Cileuncang is a journey into the mesmerizing mystical treasures of Nusantara...

***

This work does not get much appreciation in my country. Hopefully foreign readers will be more to support this story. Thanks ^^v

title: Queen Elsa's Trial
description:
An unnatural drought has devastated Arendelle, and Elsa fears her magic may once again be to blame. Strange events and mysterious visitors will Challenge Elsa & threaten the very existence of her kingdom. Can she overcome her greatest fears before it's too late?

AUTHOR'S NOTE: My favorite thing about Frozen is Elsa's struggle with her powers and, of course, her relationship with her sister.  Is it possible to recapture the feeling of the first film without being repetitive or redundant?  I believe so, and this story represents that belief.  In my mind, Elsa suffered from depression, anxiety, and PTSD, and I was convinced that the right (wrong?) set of circumstances could bring about a relapse.  Such is the case with real world people who deal with these complex issues.  This story explores the results when those circumstances occur.  Although rife with drama and romance, it's also meant to be a mystery/thriller.  I hope you enjoy!

NOTE: The first draft of this story was completed and published in its entirety before Frozen II was even announced.  Any similarities to the official sequel are purely coincidence.

An audiobook is in progress.  Listen here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLUQ8UZLYrBkKGl7WuJZhxNZ-UEYm_XG5O

title: Vendetta
description:
When it comes to revenge, love is a dangerous complication.With a fierce rivalry raging between two warring families, falling in love is the deadliest thing Sophie could do. An epic debut set outside modern-day Chicago.

When five brothers move into the abandoned mansion in her neighbourhood, Sophie Gracewell's life changes forever. Irresistibly drawn to bad boy Nicoli, Sophie finds herself falling into a criminal underworld governed by powerful families. As the boys' dark secrets begin to come to light, Sophie is confronted with stinging truths about her own family, too. She must choose between two warring dynasties - the one she was born into, and the one she is falling in love with. When she does, blood will spill and hearts will break.

authorBio:
I'm the author of Vendetta, Inferno and Mafiosa, collectively known as the Blood for Blood trilogy.

Often described as Romeo and Juliet meets The Godfather, the Blood for Blood trilogy follows seventeen-year-old Sophie Gracewell as she becomes embroiled with a deadly mafia family in Chicago. When she discovers secrets about her own family that make it impossible to climb back out of the criminal underworld, she must instead learn to survive it. As she grapples with her new identity, Sophie discovers that instant chemistry isn't all it's cracked up to be, dangerous boys are often just that - dangerous - and sometimes the person who annoys you the most might be the person who cares about you the deepest.

title: Luminari
description:
Abandoned by fate, Clara's life begins with tragedy. Her mother's fatal childbirth and father's devastating car accident on the same day leave her in the care of her devoted uncle. But destiny's cruel hand strikes again, claiming her uncle's life in a eerily similar car accident during her teenage years.

Orphaned and adrift, Clara uncovers the tangled threads of her family's past, revealing a labyrinth of secrets and challenges. As she navigates this treacherous landscape, she meets enigmatic Ethan, whose unwavering support helps her confront the mysteries head-on.

Together, they unravel the truth behind her family's tragic fate. Amidst the turmoil, Clara finds solace in Ethan's embrace, and their bond blossoms into an unforgettable love story.

title: Fighter - [Sweet Pea]
description:
discontinued


/fighter/ 
• a person who contends in battle or physical combat.


Before I even had time to turn around, he was upon me, pinning me against the wall between his muscular arms, inked with tattoos. He was so close, I could feel his breath fanning my lower lip and chin. Tussles of his thick ebony hair swept across his forehead, outlining his defined cheekbones. His deep brown eyes flittered across my face, almost as if he could see the thoughts that were running through my mind.  "Why have you come back here, Mackenzie?" he hissed in an low, authoritative tone. "What is it that you really want?"


Mackenzie Jones. 
She's the daughter of notorious gang leader, FP. She's the sister of quirky outsider, Jughead, and sweet innocent JellyBean. But she's been estranged from them and everything associated with her birth-town of Riverdale for over ten years ... And when she comes back, everything has changed.
Mackenzie's a fighter. She's always known how to take care of herself. But returning to Riverdale might just be the thing that breaks her; after all, there is a murderer on the loose and there is ... him. The boy she left behind. The boy whose heart she broke.


[Sweet-Pea x OC Fanfic]

title: Sibylline Greetings (Book 2, the LiteraTours Cozy Mystery Series)
description:
Ike Wordsworth, a divorcee and rookie tour guide sent to Rome, struggles to survive a labyrinth of dark secrets, ancient mysteries and brutal murders.

Jessica "Ike" Wordsworth is leading the LiteraTour inaugural trip to Rome. But when senseless acts of sabotage culiminate in a murder -- with the victim's body dumped in a priestess's grace, alonside a message referencing long-lost prophecies -- Ike has to use her naturual talent for book-diving to find the killer before they strike again. But was the murdered girl really the intended victim? And who are the three women chasing after Ike? It's a race against time, because Ike can't solve the mystery if she's dead.

title: The God's Energy [ A SCIENCE THRILLER ]
description:
"The intimacy of science, faith and logic is what unveils the true power of THE GOD'S ENERGY. "

When laymen love the idea of God's supremacy, scientists love to call energy their God. Both energy and God can't be seen, felt or defined. We can only say it's there when they want to show off their powers. 

But what will happen when one day a very powerful energy makes an appearance on Earth and randomly starts acting as an ordinary girl's angel thousands of miles away from where it first appeared?


--------------------------


A SCIENCE FICTION FROM THE AUTHOR OF #1 SCIENCE THRILLER ⚡ GRAVITY FALLS. 

🎀 Cover credits- @FleezyWriter 
🌈 Banner credits - @MerakiMeg

Thanks to both of them for their great artistic talents! :)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Writer of #1 Science Fiction, Gravity Falls.

Hey there, Stranger!

Welcome to my humble abode. This profile is where my heart bleeds and fill the blank pages with raw emotions. Ink soaks my excess emotions and help me maintain my sanity.

I'm crazy, I'm wild, I'm unscripted.

My books are filled with grammatical errors, typos and a lot of other hoobos but guess what? When you read them, I hope you would feel the feelings I felt while writing them.

I think all of us hide who we actually are and find solace in the characters we read. We vibe with the villains when we hate the world and cheer the heroes when we're motivated to save the world.

I might be ranting by now but who cares? Being true to ourselves is the best thing that we can do.

We will make a lot of mistakes and ruin many opportunities, but that's who we are.

Try. Fall. Cry. Rise. And repeat.

But every time,
we try a little harder,
cry a little less
And rise a little higher. :)

I write to escape the voices in my head, not knowing where do they end.
I'm just trying to figure it out by messing up the time I have.

Text me up, I always have time to chat and meet new people.

I believe there are more than 8 billion people out there, if I can learn just one thing from every one of you, damn I'll be a great human being.

Well, you survived till here?
You might as well just drop a hi on my board now.

Follow me @pranjali_aditi on instagram.

title: Trapped (A Ticci Toby Story)
description:
***This story is told completely through Toby's POV***

My life has stopped...
I was supposed to keep training. I was supposed to keep developing the skills that it took to be the slenderman's proxy. I was supposed to be there for Sally when she couldn't sleep. I was supposed to be between Jeff and Ben while they tried to show me a movie I could never sit still long enough for. I was supposed to be standing in front of Masky while he yelled at me about my carelessness. I was supposed to be there to receive Hoodie's reassuring smile. I was supposed to be with them... but I'm not. 

Something horrible happened to me...

title: Felix Gone Bad (Brainwash Short Sequel)
description:
In a world where the shadows of the past can haunt even the brightest stars, Felix finds himself tangled in a web of mystery and mind games. Two years have slipped by since the harrowing experience of being brainwashed, yet the scars remain, gnawing at his spirit as the festive season looms ever closer. With therapy sessions proving futile and the Christmas cheer feeling like a distant memory, Felix becomes an unwitting participant on a game show called BWKorea-a name that sends shivers down his spine. 


At first, it seems like an opportunity for redemption, a chance to reclaim his former self. But when he and five other contestants are captured and thrust into a sinister reality orchestrated by a mysterious idol, their mission becomes chillingly clear: destroy the very essence of Christmas. 


As Felix battles against a dark force seeking to remake him, his bandmates in Stray Kids rally together, determined to rescue him from the grip of manipulation and regain the light that was once their friend. Who's behind this nefarious plot, and what sacrifices must they make to save Felix?


Embark on a heart-pounding journey through the complexities of identity, friendship, and the fight against inner demons. Join the Stray Kids as they navigate a maze of betrayal and brainwashing, all while racing against time to bring back the Felix they know-and to unveil the true villain lurking in the shadows. Will they succeed, or will Christmas be irrevocably ruined? Dive into this gripping tale and uncover the power of love and resilience in the face of darkness.

title: The Hound
description:
Antique store owner Liz brings home a Victorian taxidermy hound from auction, unwittingly unleashing dark forces on her wife and son.
 
                                                                      *****
 
Nat Loman has finally married the love of her life, Liz, and is getting used to her role as stepmother to Liz's 5-year-old son, Liam. The Loman family runs a bustling antique business so they attend a sale where a striking, black taxidermied hound is up for auction. Liz picks it up for the business, but it ends up being stored in their home, where Nat notices strange things occurring. She quickly discovers the past residents had died violently. Then she hears from a friend about the myth of "the devil's dog", a hound that perches in the shadows, tearing families apart from the inside. Soon, people around the Lomans are dying, and Liz is changing, darkening. It's up to Nat to save the woman she loves from the darkness closing in, and to save Liam from danger no matter what she has to sacrifice.

[[Winner of the 2018 Wattys "Hidden Gems" category]]

title: Five Brutal Kings {Ongoing)
description:
Five best friends-Samuel, Clinton, Harrison, Daniel, and David-are heirs to powerful companies and all attending the same school. Tall, handsome, and influential, many things could go wrong...

"He raped her!" Vivian cried out, her voice frantic, shocked by the force of her own words.

"It's not that serious," Samuel's friend Harry said with a shrug, clearly irritated by her outburst. "Five million to testify that it didn't happen."

"I saw him rip off her clothes and do it!"
Vivian shouted, her heart racing. She couldn't believe Harry was asking her to cover up something she knew to be true.

Harry shifted uncomfortably in his seat, his frown deepening. Vivian noticed how he always seemed to wear that same expression. "Deal or no deal?" His tone was colder now.



Note to Readers:

This book is intended for those who can approach heavy, intense subjects without becoming overly emotional or upset. It deals with tough situations that may be unsettling, so please proceed with caution if you're sensitive to themes of betrayal, manipulation, or injustice.

Hey, readers!

Because of Christmas on the Corner, I've decided to pause Sixty Hearts Sky until next year. Right now, I'm focusing on wrapping up Brutal Kings and Grey, Silver, Snow, and Christmas before the year ends.

Sixty Hearts Blue still needs thorough editing.

As for my horror stories, One Night in the Cabin House and Of Gilbardo, they're on hold as well. Both have too many plot holes, and I want to add more immersive details to truly bring them to life. This will take patience, effort, and time-pheew!

Sadly, Macquarie's Christmas Wish is another project that's been delayed. The chapters uploaded so far are unedited because the device I wrote the novel on was stolen. I plan to rewrite it in time for next Christmas-so stay tuned for that!

For now, enjoy reading Brutal Kings and Grey, Silver, Snow, and Christmas!

title: Galactic Rebirth
description:
A distant future where humanity has colonized several planets. The story takes place on a highly advanced space station orbiting a gas giant.

Society is divided into the elite, who control interstellar resources, and the working class, who live on the fringes, struggling to survive.

. Main Characters:

Alyx: A skilled engineer from a lower-class background. She's resourceful and determined but feels trapped in the system.

Commander Roderick: A high-ranking officer in the space station's security force. Charismatic but hiding secrets.

Talon: A rogue hacker who seeks to expose the corruption of the governing elites, with a mysterious past linked to Alyx.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am a versatile storyteller with a passion for crafting a wide variety of narratives across multiple genres. Whether I'm weaving heartwarming tales of love and self-discovery, penning gripping thrillers that keep readers on edge, or exploring the imaginative worlds of fantasy and science fiction, my work is defined by vivid characters, compelling plots, and a deep connection to human emotion.

I find inspiration in everyday life, history, and the complexities of human relationships. My stories often delve into themes of resilience, identity, and transformation, inviting readers to reflect on their own lives while immersing themselves in richly detailed worlds.

Switching between genres and tones comes naturally to me, and I take pride in creating stories that resonate with a diverse audience. Whether it's a short story, a novel, or a serialized narrative, I approach each piece with authenticity, creativity, and dedication, striving to inspire and captivate my readers.

title: Captivate (Manipulate, Book 2)
description:
Akemi and Claire have never met in the flesh, but both are victims of an alien’s obsession.

Akemi survived her ordeal but only as a hybrid bio-computer. And Claire survived hers as well. She escaped the zoo were she’d been captive. After three years.

Her nightmare was over.

But a lone human far from Earth has few options. And the one man who might help Claire evade her masochistic owner believes her to be a fake – an alien who’s taken human form.

Don’t miss the latest installment of the Alien Cadet series, a far-flung space opera that explores the boundaries of isolation, fear, and redemption.

title: OUTSIDE - a post-apocalyptic novel
description:
The future is divided by Perimeters: high-security gated communities where life goes on as normal. If you're inside you're lucky. If you're outside, life expectancy takes a nose dive.

Riley is fortunate to have been born on the right side of the fence. But her life of privilege comes crashing down when someone breaks through and murders her sister.

She forsakes her own safety to go in search of the killer. But what awaits her outside is more unbelievable that she ever imagined.

Cut to the present day where Eleanor's world is falling apart. This time next year, civilisation won't be quite so civilised . . .

I'm posting a chapter each week. The rest of the Outside Series is complete, and available on Amazon.

authorBio:
Hiii!!😉. RED is my first story on wattpad.

Writing down things that I feel has always been my only way to escape the loneliness, fear, hurt and all other negative thoughts in my life. It became a hobby but I rarely write in papers now a days since I've got my mobile phone now. I mean we have notes and all other kind of apps where we can express our thoughts. But nothing is more effective than penning them down. :)

WATTPAD is really blessing to a number of talented writers who wanted audience. Even though I do not consider myself as a talented writer (more like a time pass writer), wattpad really helped me to find my passion. I am not very fast in updating because of many reasons but writing on wattpad is a very relaxing and peaceful habit. :)

If you came this far, you might as well want to read my story RED (still continuing). It is a suspense thriller featuring South Indian friends. Wow, this is a little bit awkward but do read because I myself find it very interesting (I've read it many times now :p ). Of course, there are mistakes and I am more than happy to take suggestions & criticism (compliments too!).

And about me, I am a medical student. Hope you get it now about why I give late updates (the main reason is my excellent ability to procrastinate though).  :)

So ending this session here hoping that you'll read, comment and vote on my story. If you already did, I LUB YOU SO MUCH!!!!!!!! <3

description:
[A WATTPAD FEATURED STORY/highest ranking: #30 Mystery/Thriller] For fans of PRETTY LITTLE LIARS and HOW TO GET AWAY WITH MURDER!

 Everyone knows that losing friends is a natural part of the high school experience.  Yet, what happens when a friend doesn't intentionally "go ghost" but is abruptly taken away?
         Kameron, Grayson, Mikey, Yasmin, and Jenna have been thick as thieves from childhood. Rightfully so-they make up the American minority in the German twin city of Arabella Park. When one of the five suddenly turns up missing, the remaining friends must find a way to bring her back while keeping up the facade of leading ordinary small-town lives. 
        As they search for their missing friend, they discover things about themselves and one another that will catapult them into an explosive climax and the ultimate revelation of who done it.
        A multi-faceted mystery, Arabella Park brings to life what it means to endure the most frightful, profound time of one's life-the teenage years-while being stretched to the limits of what it means to be an adult, even a hero.

title: Blood Alliance (Manan)
description:
Manik looked at her face and caressed it for a while and everything was off her now. Bare.
She was naked. Even her emotions were naked.

Manik smiled at her and kissed her roughly on her forehead before making his way to her neck and biting her there, feasting on her. It was his to enjoy and ravish.
Mafia's were never taught to be gentle in anyway, everything should be done roughly till they start to love that roughness and even if they are about to die, roughness should reside in their death too.

Manik ripped his own clothes and was naked infront of Nandini, smiling at her. A smile that sent every nerve in her body to bath in fear. Shivers ran through her.

title: He Comes at Night
description:
Red Feather Award Winner:

After the death of her mother, the overwhelming and uncontrollably urge to sleep nearly destroyed Nina's life. Nightmares began to rule her unconscious mind, wreaking havoc day and night. That was until a diagnosis of narcolepsy came . After months of proper treatment and the perfectly concocted drug cocktail, Nina was beginning  to feel like an entirely new person. Heathy, happy and almost untouchable. But when a handsome and alarmingly charming stranger makes his way into her mildly comfortable life, the dreams that once haunted her sleep are back and he's the ominous figure lurking in them. 

But something was different this time, these nightmares are becoming increasingly harder to decipher from reality. And maybe, just maybe, this unfamiliar stranger has something to do with it.

title: CLICKS  - The Dolphin Prophecy
description:
Book One in The Dolphin Prophecy. Clicks is about instincts - feels. Those moments the universe stops to tell you what's going to happen next.

Sixteen year old Cami has been looking forward to this summer forever. She's finally old enough to compete in the elite category for the annual Surf Carnival that takes place on Pinhold, her little tiny island that is home to an extraordinary number of twins and the most perfectly surfable waves in the Pacific.    

But just as the competitions heat up, the best swimmers go down and suddenly, Cami and her friends are at risk. The Guard, the mysterious organization that runs everything from the town council to the beach patrol to the religious ceremonies, doesn't have any answers. Cami's twin brother Mica is convinced there's a conspiracy at work, but she's too caught up in a new relationship with Mica's best friend to look beneath the surface. 

And then suddenly, the telepathic link she shares with Mica goes silent. And Cami realizes that if she doesn't take it upon herself to find out what's making her friends sick, she might lose them forever, and go down herself.
  
This is a published novel available on Amazon, bn.com and iBooks.
xoox
Amy
Tous Droits Réservés

authorBio:
I am a very bubbly and vivacious girl, who is very out spoken, I speak whatever comes to my heart. My online friends call me sweet but my offline friends speak just the opposite of it. There was a time I used to read like maniacs but now I rarely read anything. I landed here on Wattpad because of some issues happened with other websites where I write. Oops! I forgot to mention that I write on India-Forums and Facebook groups. My User-ID on forums is Samridhigoodiez and on Facebook is Sammy's writeups. You can send me buddy/friend Request.

Also, I don't write for myself as writing has never given me happiness, the works which give me happiness, I never make them public. I write for my readers, count doesn't matter to me. There are some people who don't like this aspect of mine, they try pester me that I should write for myself and blah! blah! I never paid any heeds to them. I find them weird, I mean how can you decide by what things I should become happy? Burrr!!! If anyone who may dislike this aspect of mine then I am sorry, I am not the one you should be following.

Anyway, I am a working woman, so, I get less time to write and update my stuff. That automatically means that I post my works late and readers have to wait for my stories. You need to be patient.

I welcome all my readers with whole of my heart whether you comment/Vote on my stuff or not. I always appreciate all sorts of constructive criticism. Also, if you are reviewing my works, please its my humble request that please be honest with it. I appreciate honesty not modesty.

So everyone welcome to my scribblings. Hope you all have a good time with my stories.

title: Wolves & Wildflowers| ongoing
description:
In a quiet, devoutly religious town, 19-year-old Emily struggles with the suffocating expectations of her overbearing mother and the shadows of her father's mysterious death years ago. When a series of gruesome murders begins targeting young women, fear ripples through the community, and Emily finds herself inexplicably drawn to the enigmatic and dangerous Wyatt, her charming neighbor with a hidden reputation.

As Emily grapples with her growing defiance against her mother and the awakening of forbidden desires, she begins to sense that the town's secrets run deeper than anyone dares to admit. With the arrival of Samuel, an old family friend determined to protect them, and unsettling memories of her father resurfacing, Emily starts to uncover fragments of a haunting truth buried in her past.

But the closer she gets to the answers, the more she realizes that safety is an illusion-and the greatest danger might not be lurking in the woods but within the walls of her own home.

title: SandBoxed Paradise...or is it a Prison
description:
An intriguing mystery that unravels in many surprising directions. SandBoxed includes engaging characters, interesting sub-plots, and just enough sci-fi to help you escape reality while reading. 
===========================================
I woke up with my face in the sand, naked, stranded on a deserted island. At first, I felt lucky. No matter what had happened...I landed in paradise. Perhaps it was the neverending nightmares, or maybe the 'JD291183' tattoo on my wrist that kept me from accepting, from forgetting that I had forgotten. It wasn't until a crate arrived on the beach, stenciled with my numbered tattoo that I realized something was very wrong. For inside I found a mirror, and as I gazed upon my face for the first time... my reflection blinked when I didn't.
===========================================
Begin reading here.  Download full version at YvonneDeBandi.com
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Yvonne DeBandi was born and raised east of the Mississippi River, gracing the classrooms of almost ten different schools before heading to Florida State University to graduate with high honors. Wearing many hats, DeBandi has been self-employed as a Professional Musician, Computer Programmer, Writer, Teacher and Artist for over thirty years, oddly enough with singing being her "day job".  Always on the cutting edge, her most recent projects include 3D Websites and Virtual Worlds in a Browser.

In addition to her excellent educational experiences, she is fast to share that much of her life perspective was learned while roaming around the woods and sitting by campfires. It was there she learned the best marshmallow is slightly toasted with a quick flaming; and, the best campfire music is unrehearsed with group involvement, lyrics made up on the fly because no one remembers the words.

Her animal rescue days began with an injured box turtle named Herbie (after the LoveBug, of course). The second was an abandoned sheltie that followed her home one rainy day while selling Girl Scout Cookies door to door, in the days when knocking on a stranger's door wasn't taboo. Her most recent rescue was a bi-polar cat that constantly growls at his own reflection, officially affording her a crazy cat lady badge that she wears with pride.

DeBandi is a prolific writer, currently working on both her fifth and sixth novels.  While her engaging stories are complete works of fiction, her experiences as a musician, computer programmer, nature enthusiast, and animal lover shine through in her mysterious, suspenseful tales of inspiration.  The most common comment received from her readers is, "I read it in 48 hrs, I just couldn't put it down."

title: The Eshian Lore #4: The Fairy Princess
description:
The Eshian Lore#4. 
***
[COMPLETED]

Princess Beth-Lee still has no control over her magic and time is running out fast. Her most feared enemy, Tang Chan-Lee, has taken over the throne of Eshia with the help of a puppet human. The subjects of Eshia are agitated and their faith in the daughter of the Fairy Queen is wavering, with only a shred of loyalty left to the heir. 

Beth-Lee has made a choice but is yet to find a plan to execute it. It's now or never. Eshia is seconds away from faling off the cliff: one wrong move and the entire kingdom is going to crash to the ground. 

Will Beth-Lee surrender? Or, will she regain faith in her friends and in herself and weave her path towards victory?

title: 그림자에서 벗어나기(Escaping from shadow)
description:
"When the past won't let go, sometimes the only way out is to fight back."

Hana thought moving to Seoul with her parents would be a fresh start. Struggling to fit in at a new school, bullied for her differences, and haunted by the trauma of her past, she tries to piece together a life she can call her own. But when threatening messages from a long-forgotten nightmare begin to appear, Hana realizes her past has followed her-and it's closing in fast.

Her abuser isn't just watching. He's here, in Seoul.

As Hana's world falls apart, her new friends-protective Taeyang, sharp-witted Jisoo, and dependable Minho-step up, offering her the strength to stand tall. Together, they vow to uncover the truth and bring justice to the shadow stalking her. But the closer they get to the truth, the greater the danger becomes.

With her parents taken from her, fear consuming her, and danger at every turn, Hana must confront her darkest memories and reclaim her life before her abuser strikes again. Along the way, she'll discover the power of resilience, the bonds of friendship, and the spark of love she never expected to find.

Can Hana escape the shadows of her past, or will they consume her forever?

title: The Skylar Experiment : The "X" in Apex
description:
---Book of the Month 2018 winner in the sci-fi category from awardofthemonth2018---
---1st place winner in teen fic Writer's Circle Awards by concinnitycircle---
A/N: This book is action-packed with a sprinkle of mystery all wrapped in a science-fiction teen drama! I know. It's quite a mouthful. Cue the summary!
***
Skylar is born with predetermined odds against her. She's been isolated since birth from her true nature and her peers in the name of an experiment. A change of plans cause the people in charge to order her relocation to Oakwood, a microscopic town swarming with mutants like her. They silently follow her journey as Riley is confronted to strange locals, a boy that hates her guts and nightmarish monsters lurking around her house. Throughout the series, she slowly but surely discovers truths about herself she could never fathom... and that there is a daunting trap waiting to snap. 
One life. One experiment. Endless lies. 


Some cussing and violence invovled. 

THIS IS THE FIRST BOOK OF A SERIES AND IT GETS PROGRESSIVELY DARKER 😈

Disclaimer : 
My story is inspired from Jennifer Armentrout's series Lux (basically, credits to her because this wouldn't exist otherwise). There are many differences but also several similarities. The plot isn't centered the same, either way. I just have fun writing and twisting up my favorite elements.

❁

     Ruben Victoriano and Marcelo Jimenez have only one key goal in mind: to explore every secret of the human mind and develop a diabolical machine to fuse multiple consciousnesses as one, no matter what it takes.

     Although, as they continue their nightmare inducing experiments on the innocent, mentally unstable patients of Beacon Mental Hospital, Ruben Victoriano discovers room 36: a cell containing a quite peculiar little girl by the name of Sophie Liaz. While Jimenez tells him to pay her no mind, Ruben can't contain his ever-growing curiosity.

     As he visits her everyday, trying to comfort and heal her wounds from the atrocious experiments she endures daily, he attempts to uncover the child's origins and diagnose her condition. But a thought begins to linger in his mind as he witnesses the girl's selfless, forgiving attitude towards those who have done her wrongfully all her life.

     Is she even ill?

Me as a writer:
I actually have a ton of stories in my head, and it usually pops up  when I'm bored, shitting, or just woke up from a nap. Though I tend to filter my ideas, and only write the ones that I feel like its-going-to-be-awesome kind of thing.

{Update: Dec. 20, 2019}

I decided to open Wattpad again, after a few years of hiatus.

And I'm actually surprised of the world I forgot I built during those times.

So quick update, I'm now happily married, with a potato for baby -just kidding its a real baby. And a super busy life.

I honestly missed those times when my life was only filled with imaginary stories and sharing them through writing. Wish to be able to write again, but for now I don't have the freedom of time. Maybe someday I'll come back again.

Anyways, thank you for visiting my profile and reading my books!

title: My Father's House
description:
Harper doesn't know her enemy. The first attack on her England holiday is dismissed as a random mugging. But when she is held at gunpoint by a woman intent on taking more than her purse, Harper is forced to reconsider her initial assumptions. 
As her adversaries become more lethal, Harper slowly uncovers disturbing facts about her missing father's criminal history. The more she learns, the more she questions her father's objectives. Does he truly wish to protect her or is there a scheme unfolding that places her intentionally in the crosshairs of his enemies? To escape England alive, Harper must face her enemies and the possibility that her father is one of them.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: My Father's House is my first work of fiction. I have co-authored research in the past so any comments whether praise or criticism on my writing in this genre are welcomed! I love editing; sometimes I think I wrote this just so I could edit it. Nevertheless, every time I read it I find something glaring I should have changed. For the most part I wrote what I would like to read. Novels with action, adventure, and mystery with plenty of plot twists are my favorite.

title: Dutchess
description:

Hatred ran through her veins,

 blood in her eyes, 

revenge on her heart,

and love on her mind.

 Vashti Wright isn't as innocent as everyone would love to believe. After witnessing the death of her mother at the tender age of ten, the once loving little girl turned into a sinister woman. 

   Now, all this  Twenty-two year old  wants is bitter revenge and she won't stop at nothing to achieve it. Even if it leads her into the doors of the most ruthless gang of the south and in and out the bed of its members. 

   Will she be able to climb her way to the top? Can she survive? Or will her mother's killer fish her out first? Follow Vashti on her journey to the top of a predominantly man's world.

When Meghan Byer's daughter finds an injured fawn in the month of December, the weary mother of two doesn't think much about it. It isn't until more baby deer begin turning up at their doorstep that she realizes something is wrong. With help from her ex-husband, Meghan and their kids are on the run to try and escape what is happening to them. Threatening notes are being left for them to find, fawns are showing up with collars but no identifiable homes, and terrors are being inflicted by a stalker.

This is an abnormal Christmas, and one this family will not soon forget.

authorBio:
Hi there! I'm Dani. I'm a 23-year-old fantasy author. 🔮🦋 Feel free to introduce yourself on my message board, and I'll do the same here in my bio. :)

INSTAGRAM: danih._

✍️🏻 I began writing stories around the age of 8-9 and realized my passion for it at 13. Now, I write fantasies (high, dark, modern). It's a nice getaway from reality.    

❄️ My favorite seasons are autumn and winter. Sweater weather, warm cuddles, pumpkin spice, apple cider, hot cocoa, fuzzy socks, Harry Potter, christmas lights, warm colors, snow...*chefs kiss*   FUN FACT: 90% of my books take place in autumn and/or winter.

🐬 That being said (⬆️) my favorite animal has been dolphins since I was 9-years-old, my favorite food is sushi, and one of my happy places is the ocean. Ironically, very summer themed, lol.

✈️🧳 I love exploring and traveling. I haven't gotten to do it much (haven't left the USA yet), but one of my long-term goals is to publish my books into the world and make money to travel and experience new places.
