title: BRAINSTORM
description:
When orphans vanish, Nick Sperry takes on the case. What do the missing children have in common? IQ's higher than Einstein's.

P.I. Nick Sperry investigates the disappearance of Sidney Ryder. Nick's girlfriend, Melissa, brought the child to Sunshine Children's Home, D.C. eight years ago. Nick isn't fooled when the federal orphanage claims to have no record of Melissa's son. As an ex-CIA agent, Nick understands the immoral capabilities of the US government. Fueled by his suspicion, he discovers Sidney isn't the only lost orphan. Moreover, an unidentified man claiming to be their uncle took the children away from their foster families at a very young age.

Meanwhile, Dr. Jack Kerwin begins to work with Tabula Rasa, a highly effective think-tank based out of the Center for Interactive Research and Solutions, or CIRAS. Under the direction of Tabula Rasa, Jack's research on childhood leukemia could save countless lives. But, his enthusiasm recedes when he notices strange things lurking behind the center's shiny walls.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I love taking journeys of the mind in writing or daydreaming because imagination is limitless. I consider myself a perpetual learner, constantly evaluating experiences  to better understand myself and others, and create a better version of me.

Playing with words since I was a child, I've since written a screenplay, two novels, and several short stories.  I'm also a Partner and Senior Writer for Book Club Babble, a blogger, and an entrepreneur at heart. I love watching something born out of pure thought grow wings and soar.

title: Entrapment- Drowning Into Darkness
description:
A continuation of the story Entrapment. 
Advay has lost Chandini forever now. 
"Heartbreak is a lonely place", she had always told him. 
And here he stood, lost forever in the barren landscape where she'd left him. 
Heartbreak was truly a lonely place. A place of desolate despair, with no escape. 
Yet he had revenge to seek from the murderers of his parents. He had his duties to fulfil.  He had a brother to find.

Keep reading to find out if whether Advay gains back his sanity and his resolve,  or if he will wither away in the crumbling sands of the beautiful mirage of his beloved wife...Chandini Singh Raizada....Chandini Mahadev Kashyap.

All rights reserved. This book belongs to me. Characters names, and plots and sequences must not be copied.

Disclaimer: Please note this is a continuation to my book Entrapment which I have currently unpublished due to plagiarism.

title: The Curse - Book 1 (Completed)
description:
If two souls are meant to be together, they will always find their way back to each other, in this and every lifetime. 

Having lost the only love of his life, Katrina, Luther is tormented with nightmares of the past. Clinging to the hope of seeing her face again, he survives throughout the centuries. The only person he has contact with is his daughter Sophia, but their relationship resembles more to one of a soldier and its sergeant, rather than that of a father and his daughter.

Everything changes when 17-year-old Chris runs into mysterious Sophia and confuses her for his twin sister, Victoria, making for a bloody encounter.

He has to find out who she is. Only, by hunting Sophia down, he and Victoria will realize they were the ones being hunted all along... 

• • • •

Miscraft is a story of a never-ending hunt, a love obsession, and a world in which years and names have no value. 

I've written Miscraft together with my dear friend, Philip Alexander, therefore our joint pen name. We've put a lot of time (skype calls) and love ❤️ into it, so we hope readers will enjoy it❣️

title: Hanover House: Kickoff to the Evelyn Talbot Chronicles
description:
Welcome to Hanover House.... 
 
Psychiatrist Evelyn Talbot has dedicated her life to solving the mysteries of the antisocial mind. Why do psychopaths act as they do? How do they come to be? Why don't they feel any remorse for the suffering they cause? And are there better ways of spotting and stopping them?  
 
After having been kidnapped, tortured and left for dead when she was just a teenager-by her high school boyfriend-she's determined to understand how someone she trusted so much could turn on her. So she's established a revolutionary new medical health center in the remote town of Hilltop, Alaska, where she studies the worst of the worst.  
 
But not everyone in Hilltop is excited to have Hanover House and its many serial killers in the area. Alaskan State Trooper, Sergeant Amarok, is one of them. And yet he can't help feeling bad about what Evelyn has been through. He's even attracted to her. Which is partly why he worries.  
 
He knows what could happen if one little thing goes wrong...
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm a New York Times Bestselling Author writing suspense for Minotaur (St. Martin's Press), small town contemporary romance for Mira Books (Harlequin Enterprises) and historical romance for Montlake (Amazon's romance imprint).

In The Evelyn Talbot Chronicles, my brand new suspense series for St. Martin's Press, Psychiatrist Evelyn Talbot is researching serial killers at a remote facility in Alaska. She's determined to unravel the secrets of the psychopathic mind. But with so many dangerous men in one place, a lot could happen if one little thing goes wrong. The kick-off to this series is titled HANOVER HOUSE which I will begin posting in June. The next book, HER DARKEST NIGHTMARE, will be out August 30th.

In my critically acclaimed Whiskey Creek series, you can follow a tight-knit group of friends, both male and female, who've grown up in the same idyllic Gold Country town and still get together for coffee every Friday, as they find love and happiness despite their challenges.

In my stand alone historical romances for Montlake, you can expect a dark, rather gothic tone and some romantic adventure. Check out OF NOBLE BIRTH, my very first book, HONOR BOUND, THROUGH THE SMOKE or A MATTER OF GRAVE CONCERN.

For more information about me or my books, please visit www.brendanovak.com, where you can sign up on my mailing list, enter my monthly drawings or contribute to my efforts to raise money for diabetes research. So far, with the help of all those who have supported me, I've been able to raise $2.5 million for this cause.

description:

title: Wednesday's Child
description:
In the feverish heat of 1929, Beatrice Grace was involved in a tragic incident- a drowning by the lake where she spent her childhood.  As one of the few who had seen Evelyn Young in her last moments, she became trapped in a web of whispers, secrets and half-truths, compelling her to escape her small town. 

When Beatrice returns to Winthrop's Hollow in 1933, accompanied by the frigid chill of both the weather and her former friends, the murmurs still haven't died. Her sudden reappearance takes everyone by surprise and suspicions start to resurface. It all makes Beatrice wonder. 

Is it just a series of coincidences or is she really cursed?

title: Blue [Brallon-ish]
description:
Brendon Urie is unstoppable. The famed Museum of Natural History stationed all the way out in Montana just recruited him to the renowned group Blue: a team of paleontologists working isolated on a barren wasteland to uncover anything they possibly can before they head back in a couple months. Simple enough, according to Brendon. 

There's no easy way back and almost no way to contact the museum without traveling miles and miles back to the closest road in the middle of nowhere. With nobody to check up on the tiny dream team, it's almost as if they've been removed from the face of the Earth. 

But the moment they uncover the bones arranged in strange ways, team members start disappearing, and Brendon is going to wish he'd stayed in California.

And in a matter of sixteen days, he's going to have to make a choice.

title: Sickest Addictions: Sympathy For The Devil
description:
"Mirror, mirror on the wall, who's the sickest of them all?" 

In 1956 he was locked away. Trapped in a nightmare from his dark mysterious past, Jack Veil is one of the most feared men in the small, close-minded place of Vex Town. Six years later he is released, only to be assigned a young faced, clear blue eyed, caretaker. At first all seems well, until secrets are unleashed, and the darkness of one's past is uncovered. Drug dealing saints, pill popping public figures, crooked cops, false idols and a system with a taste for corruption. Everything is not all what it seems. But will Jack keep on his best behavior? Or will the darkness of his past soon catch up to the unforgiving present? Will he finally submit to becoming a true saint, or return to his old ways as a true devil in white. 

Re-Write of a fan favorite short story written back in 2013.  The adventures of Jack Veil and his hopelessly devoted lover Hades. LGBTQ+ Based novel. Viewer discretion is advised [[18+]][[TRIGGER WARNING]]
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Please allow me to introduce myself...

Hello and welcome my dearest readers, to this dumb dude's wattpad. My name is Mr. White. Pleasured to meet you! I started this account back in 2013, but have been creating such stories and characters since I was able to speak and write. I hope you enjoy these little tales of mine, the old and the new. It is a passion of mine to create and tell stories, and I have all sorts for any kind of reader. From horror to romance, heroes to villians, I have it all. Poems, short stories and more! Most LGBTQ+ based. So please feel free to have a look around! And don't be a stranger to ask questions, or leave a comment for me to read. For more about my stories, as well as drawings of the actual characters, you can follow my social media listed below ⬇⬇ Thank you for all your love and support.

Your's Truly,

Mr. White💀

title: The Camgirl's Assistant
description:
Within this thriller, a young waitress signs up for nude modeling at a Russian camming website where she partners with a shrewd and literary bilingual assistant who'll not only show her the ropes, but how to create the illusion that she has a command of English for her fans. But while the waitress' career as a camgirl develops, an unlikely collection of individuals upon the Internet are drawn into a web of intrigue after a life becomes threatened. 

The complex psychology and culture of camming, the Internet's latest and most controversial form of entertainment, becomes the backdrop for this international thriller that explores romance, friendship, and personal discovery. The characters within this loose adaption of a classic Rostand tale include an architect in decline, an angry literature geek, a waitress with a cover-girl face, an unemployed sociologist, a fraternal pair of felons, an aging bohemian sage, a Parisian trophy bride, and a young Russian entrepreneur. 

The complete version or the novel is now available on Amazon:
www.amazon.com/Camgirls-Assistant-James-M-Carroll-ebook/dp/B07LCW8V6V/
.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am a man who lives in Northern California. My interests are history, sociology,  literature, personal discovery, illustration, and music. Emerging art forms that have not yet received validation from academics are of special interest to me.

title: The Shadows (OG "Don't Look")
description:
The world has been completely and irrevocably divided into two; Gifteds and Humans. Powerful and weak. Black and white. There isn't any gray in the life of Leah Thompson. At least not until a mission gone wrong and a double agent plunges Leah into an entirely different world, where all there is to see are gray areas. The beliefs she had about her friends, the Agency, The Republic of Unity, the rebels and even herself are shattered, drowning Leah as she struggles to complete a secret mission for a powerful man while fighting her own doubts. Everything is changing, yet one thing remains constant: when faced with a Shadow, don't look into their eyes. 

--------------------------

Warnings: 
-violence 
-moderate swearing 
-will definitely break your heart 

(A/N) hello loves! Thank you for taking the time to look at my work, it means a lot! If you enjoy sci-fi series like Legend, the Red Queen, or the Darkest Minds, you'll probably like this. Feel free to leave any comments you'd like, but please remember to be kind! I don't have any kind of update schedule, but I will be trying to write as often as I can. I have another book I'm working on at the moment that isn't on my account, so I'll be balancing the work between the two as much as possible. I hope you all enjoy!

I do not own any of the pictures used in this story. All rights for the photos or gifs are given to the proper owners.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Ever since I was little, I have loved reading. From books like The Red Queen to romances like the Host, I have read hundreds of books and fallen in love with the worlds they created. Reading is a mystical thing, allowing people to create pictures and movies in the reader's mind, perhaps even teaching the reader a few morals while at it. Whether they know it or not, the authors who wrote these novels have helped raised me.  That is why I created this account. I made this account so that I could read new books, and create worlds of my own. I wanted to be able to share the stories that I am working on with a wide network of people. Not for fame, not for fortune.  All I want is for something I created to become important in someone else's life the way that many books have become important in mine. Thank you to anyone who takes the time to read what I have written. I do not have an update schedule, but I promise the first chapters of my series "The Shadows" is coming soon.
-A.B Taylor

title: Watching You
description:
16 year old Lucie has always kept to herself. She is very nice to others and hates when others are bullied. Thing is, she is the only one who ever seems to get bullied in her opinion. Everywhere she goes, she gets taunts on her appearance, behaviour, etc. Even her own parents love to put her more down after a day of constant bullying. Then, one night, as she decides she's had enough, she starts getting creepy messages. Messages from him. They go a little something like this. 

"Hey dearest, 

I've seen the people. I've seen you. I have always seen you. I've always been watching you my dearest. And today, I've done for you the best thing ever. I hope you like my present for you. It's waiting outside... 

And I hope that you will finally love me back...."

Cover by @thejessicamartin

title: Before Altswood Can Cry (The Altswood Saga #4)
description:
The core survivors of the Bottle Island massacres lived happily ever after, but there is still one more story to be told.

In the fourth instalment of the Altswood saga, Annabelle Martinez and Jules Sodrepena may have left Altswood, but the psyche of Altswood is unlikely to ever leave them. It is their senior year of college and they are en route to Venice, Italy with the rest of their class as part of their final Art History project. Annabelle can't wait-they are graduating in mere weeks, so she doesn't really care about doing well in class anymore. She just wants to sit back and relax, which includes not admitting to herself that she may or may not have developed a crush on Jules, whose new girlfriend is also on this trip. 

If only the universe didn't hate her. Within her first few seconds in Venice, Annabelle collides with a man running for his life. Just before he dies in her arms, he whispers: "The cipher is in the phone."

Annabelle had sworn to herself she would never get involved with another investigation regarding a killer running rampant on a paradise island. But as the situation turns from a murder investigation to a bomb threat that could destroy the whole of Venice, the authorities continue scratching their heads with no solid leads. What Annabelle overheard could be the key to solving this mystery, and preventing the whole island from blowing to smithereens.

With only twenty-four hours before the countdown ends, Annabelle and Jules take it upon themselves to uncover who killed the man and why. Their talents for sleuthing in Altswood have followed them to Venice, and there is no time to spare. Only as the seconds tick away, it would seem both the island and their friendship are at risk of falling into pieces.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Final Paradox
description:
Millions of dollars lie at the root of an ancient fraud. Over the decades, dirty money has worked its poison through many lives, resulting in the death of five people. Does Norma Dinnick, Harry Jenkin’s elderly client, hold the secret to the fraud? Once so lively and shrewd, Norma is now entirely mad. Or is she?

Lawyer, Harry Jenkins, must find out. If you’ve already met him in Conduct in Question, you’ll know just how relentless he can be. If you haven’t then you’re about to witness his tenacity.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Welcome!
The Wondrous Apothecary
Something new! I have a beginning, middle and end of my seventh novel, but much editing lies ahead. A publication date isn't set yet.
The first chapter of the novel is posted here and I hope to get your reactions, especially if they'll encourage me on to the next stage!
If you like the writing, why not check out my six novels while waiting for the publication date.
The Osgoode Trilogy [Conduct in Question, Final Paradox and A Trial of One] and
The Trilogy of Remembrance, [The Drawing Lesson, The Fate of Pryde and Night Crossing]
What is The Wondrous Apothecary about?
You, Rinaldo, are a famous conceptual artist remanded by the judge to a mental hospital to assess if you are fit to stand trial on trumped up criminal charges. On your arrival, you see patients, in great pain, from decades back whom no one else can see. How can these visions appear?
You are obsessed with collaborating with the renowned landscape artist, Alexander Wainwright. Although both of you are diametrically opposed in your art and your world views, there is an elusive bond between you as powerful as a magnetic force of absolute attraction and repulsion. Both of you wonder if you trust each other enough to form a shared vision and to collaborate?
Follow the paths of these two artists in a suspenseful tale of art, passion and liberation. First they'll take you to the inspiring art of our ancestors buried deep in the Chauvet caves of France.
Cast a suspicious eye about this mental hospital where medical experimentation was performed years ago and perhaps secretly practised today. Can Alexander liberate Rinaldo?
At last you'll be taken to their holographic universe where the freedom of cutting edge art allows them to collaborate in their first magnificent creation.
Have I enticed you? Here's the first chapter. In the meantime have a look at my website and at Amazon. Love to hear from you!
http://www.amazon.com/author/maryemartin

title: The Two-Minute Club
description:
At midnight, a group of strangers gathers in an abandoned train station to perform "The Two-Minute Ritual," a mysterious rite that allows them to rewrite two minutes of their past. The catch? Every change has unintended consequences, and once you're part of the club, there's no way out.

Liam, haunted by the guilt of his brother's death, joins the club hoping to undo his biggest regret. But as he delves deeper into the ritual, he discovers that altering the past comes at a terrifying cost-and someone within the club is using the power of the ritual for dangerous, manipulative purposes.

Caught between his desire to change his past and the unraveling chaos around him, Liam must decide: will he risk everything to break the cycle, or will he become another victim of the club's dark secrets?

for those confused and wondering "What even are asexuality and aromanticism?"

Allow me to explain it simply for you boo~ （○゜ε＾○）

IN THEIR SIMPLEST FORMS, Asexuality and Aromanticism are a lack (or little to none) of sexual attraction towards anyone, and a lack (or little to none) of romantic attraction towards anyone, respectively. Asexuality is a sexual orientation, and aromanticism is a romantic orientation.

title: Cultured
description:
When Hannah, Alex, Azalea, and Hunter meet during the first week of senior year, none of them knows what to expect. They all come from different homes, different neighborhoods, different racial backgrounds. But when a grisly homicide rocks their sleepy California town, these four unlikely allies will be forced to band together to solve a brutal and twisted mystery, a decades-old tale of hatred and revenge, of murder and malice...a tale whose end will be written in blood.
  
Note: This novel is written from alternating points of view, each chapter being told by one of the four protagonists.

title: The Cracks in the Labyrinth
description:
Evoking the paranoid tension of Rosemary's Baby and the unnerving atmosphere of the cult horror film Jacob's Ladder, The Cracks in the Labyrinth is a disturbing psychological thriller set in present-day Caracas, where the government has devolved into a "democratic dictatorship"-a creepy suspense novel meant to challenge your deeper, subconscious fears of losing control.
  
It consumed the sanity of an entire country...
  
And it was not from this world. It couldn't have been. Whatever caused the incident known as "The Red Christmas" drove Venezuela into madness.
  
Even ten years since it happened, none of the survivors of that night dare to attempt to make sense of it all, including Adam. Living ostracized to hide from the brutal way of life in Caracas, he's working tirelessly as an online writer to help his brother and sister flee the country. Now, as he's about to have enough money to take them to safety, he receives an email from his old girlfriend ... which is remarkable, considering she's been presumed dead for years. 
  
Adam tries to think nothing of the email or the broken video file attached to it. He convinces himself that it has to be a computer virus of some kind until he discovers something terrifying: the video might link his sister to the worst night of his life, the night his girlfriend went missing, the night of "The Red Christmas". Then he realizes this could be a threat; his sister's life could be in danger. 
  
 As he starts to investigate who sent the video, Adam begins to uncover dark truths about his neighbors and finds evidence that there might be a larger conspiracy at play. The problem is that he's starting to suffer from hellish hallucinations that make him question what is real. Soon, the only clear thing to him is that someone doesn't want him to dig up the past. 

 Will Adam be able to stay sane long enough to find out what really happened the night of "The Red Christmas"? Will he succeed in helping his family escape the country?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Christian Nava is a bestselling author and an award-winning advertising writer with over ten years of experience in online marketing.

In 2017, he published his first novel, SKELETONS IN THE RAIN, which became the #1 Best Seller in Mysteries and & Thrillers in Spanish for several weeks.

His novel, THE CRACKS IN THE LABYRINTH, has been in the Top 10 Hottest Thriller Stories for over 16 months.

All the usual suspects, like Mr. Potter, Mr. Wayne, and a very likable serial killer called Kira, live in his bookshelf. Squall and Rinoa are his favorite couple. He may or may not have attended Xavier's School for Gifted Youngsters.

His novel SKELETONS IN THE RAIN is also available in Spanish.

authorBio:
New York Times and USA Today Bestselling author Nicole Blanchard lives in Mississippi with her family and their menagerie of animals. She chooses each day to chase her own fairy tale even if they contain their fair share of dragons. She is married to her best friend and owns her own business.

Nicole survives on a diet of too many books and substantial amounts of root beer and slim jims. When not reading, she's lavishing attention on her family or inhaling every episode of The Walking Dead and The Big Bang Theory.

title: The Lake House
description:
Lesley and Nick Livingston make a life-changing decision: to leave the hustle and bustle of New York City behind and find peace in an idyllic lake house in the tranquil town of Arcaden. The water glistens serenely, but beneath the facade of beauty lies a dark secret, a haunting mystery waiting to be unraveled.

Their dreamy lake house, a haven of relaxation, holds a somber history. Leah Meyers, the daughter of the previous owners, tragically drowned there. Yet, this doesn't deter Lesley; she's eager to transform the lake house into a charming home. However, strange and eerie occurrences start unfolding. Lesley senses an ethereal presence, a ghostly figure she believes to be Leah. This unsettling experience begins to fray her sanity and her once-promising photography career spirals toward the precipice of collapse. Matters worsen when Nick goes missing, leaving Lesley to grapple with the eerie lake house all alone.

The clock is ticking, and time is running out.

Can Lesley unravel the mysteries lurking within the house? And will Nick be found before it's too late? 

FEATURED:

@Mystery (Amateur (Sleuth))
@Fright (Creatures & Zombies)

title: Just A Bet
description:
"I  really like you! Will you be with me through my highs and lows?" He asked to her with a bright smile and a hope in his eyes.

"I'm really sorry Advik but can we be friends firstly?" She replied to him hesitantly, trying her best to control the butterflies in her stomach.
_________________________

"I don't know how to say this but can we be more than friends? Can we be with each other till our death? Can we be in a relationship? Do you feel the same, Advik?" She asked him, finally trusting and confessing him with the dreams of a beautiful future with him.

"More than Friends? I want to be someone for whom you'll wear bangles and put vermillion. Till death? I will be with you forever that even death can't separate us. Relationship? I want to marry you, Avi! Feelings? I can't even express what i feel for you! I love you, Avi!" He said looking in her eyes, holding her hands.
_________________________

"I trusted you blindly and you proved  i was really blind to trust you!" She shouted at him as a tear fell from her eye.

"I-i can't hide it from you anymore. Whatever you saw... was right, Avantika!" He replied casually without a frown.
_________________________

What did Avantika see that broke her this much?What did Advik do and why was he still calm? They both loved each other but got seperated... why??

Let's dive into the love, fun, heartbroken and thrilling story of
- Advik and Avantika!


Tropes~

- Teen love
- CAXMafia
- Heartbreak
- Reunion

_________________________

(It's my first work, please co-operate and be kind! English is not my first language.... Please ignore all the grammatical and spelling errors! Hope you enjoy!)

title: DEVIL IN THE HIGH SCHOOL
description:
---
Lucky ni kijana mwenye uwezo wa kipekee wa kuona mambo yasiyo ya kawaida-vitu vya kiroho, majini, wachawi, na nafsi za waliokufa. Uwezo huu unamuweka kwenye ulimwengu tofauti na wa ajabu, ambapo anakuwa na marafiki watatu wa kipekee: Nasri, rafiki yake wa kiume ambaye ni binadamu wa kawaida; Sasha, Dracula mwenye nguvu za ajabu; na jini mwenye hekima na siri nyingi.

Baada ya kumaliza elimu yake ya sekondari, Lucky anafaulu kujiunga na shule ya advance, ambayo pia ina chuo kikuu. Huko ndiko ambapo maisha yake yanaanza kupatwa na changamoto bwa. Shule hii inajulikana kwa kuwa na viumbe vingi vya kishetani, na kila siku huleta hatari mpya.

Katika siku yake ya kwanza, Lucky anapata chumba cha malazi kilichokuwa na historia ya ajabu-kila mwanafunzi aliyekaa humo alikufa siku ya pili. Lakini Lucky, akiwa na uwezo wake wa kiroho, anapaswa kuamua kama atakubali changamoto hii au atakutana na hatima ya kutisha.

Je, Lucky atafanikiwa kuishi katika shule hii iliyojaa giza na uchawi, au atakutana na hatima inayomsubiri kila mwanafunzi aliyekaa katika chumba hicho? Usikose kusoma hadithi hii yenye siri, ujasiri, na mapambano ya kiroho.
---

title: The Crimson Serenade
description:
⚠️SPIN OFF TO THE MAHARANA SERIES

Warped in time, bound by fate, and consumed by obsession...

Three lives collide in a haunting spiral of power, passion, and destiny.

Ambitious psychology student Meera Parmar is drawn into a dangerous game of lies and delusions when one man claims to be the reincarnation of a legendary emperor, determined to reclaim what he believes is rightfully his.

Caught between his obsession and another man's enigmatic charm, Meera must navigate a web of secrets. The suave and calculating billionaire who hides his own tormented past may be her ally, or her greatest threat.

As history threatens to repeat itself in the most devastating way, Meera must untangle truth from illusion, love from manipulation, and freedom from the chains of a fate that may have already been sealed.

In this story of intrigue and betrayal, no one is who they seem, and the past refuses to stay buried.

Will Meera escape the grip of a centuries-old obsession, or will history claim her too?

title: Dauntless
description:
When viola, a brilliant and fiercely independent woman, crosses paths with an enigmatic FBI agent, sparks ignite and secrets unravel. Their minds are sharp, their chemistry electric, but their worlds couldn't be more dangerous.

As they delve into a case that blurs the line between personal and professional, they must confront deadly threats, hidden truths, and their own hearts. Will their love survive the chaos of their lives, or will their professions become the ultimate obstacle?

Dive into a world of suspense, danger, and passion where every decision could mean life or death-and love is the ultimate risk.

This is not just a love story. This is a battle of wit, trust, and survival.

title: THE KILLER
description:
Intro:

In the heart of Seoul, the Park family appeared ordinary to the outside world. They lived in a cozy house, the picture of happiness. But beneath the surface of smiles and warmth, a darkness festered.
         Park Hye Jin, the eldest daughter, had always been close to her father _park ji won . Strong, confident, and unafraid,qualities her ji won admired. She was his pride, his reflection in a world he believed was too soft for her. She understood things no one else did. Not like her mother-Lee Eun mi, who was weak in her father's eyes. Not like her younger brother_Park min jae, who was gentle like her mother..
             But no one knew the truth about her father. No one knew the blood that stained his hands and the twisted lessons he was determined to pass down. He had hoped his son would follow in his footsteps, to become the next in a long line of predators. But it was Hye Jin who listened, who learned, who was just like him.

And soon, she would prove that even in the safety of family, no one was truly safe.....stay tuned to know the full story of THE KILLER....🔪

title: Better Than Bollywood
description:
✧ Better Than Bollywood ✧

『When life gives you drama, make it DRAMATIC!』

Welcome to Nyatik Junior College, where everyday life puts Bollywood movies to shame. Between sneaking phones into the hostel and surviving Mr. Rao's never-ending physics lectures, we thought we had enough on our plates.

Then THEY walked in.

Three new guys who could give any movie star a run for their money:
• Aarav - with his arrogant charm and calculated moves
• Krish - whose jokes hide more than they reveal
• Vivaan - calm calculated whose demeanor held more secrets than dad's locker

But they aren't the only mystery in our college. Someone's running an anonymous confessions page, spilling secrets that were meant to stay buried. As we prepare for the biggest musical event of the year, the confessions get more dangerous, threatening to turn our show into a disaster.

Now my friends and I are racing against time to:
✓ Unmask the mysterious confession king/queen
✓ Save our musical from sabotage
✓ Figure out why these new guys seem to be everywhere the drama is
✓ Maybe survive our exams (if we're lucky)

And somehow, in between all this chaos, my heart decides it's the perfect time to do something stupid - like fall for the one person I absolutely shouldn't.

They say high school years are unforgettable. 
They never said they'd be THIS unforgettable.

Welcome to a world where reality is better than fiction, and every day brings a new plot twist.

Because sometimes, real life can be...
Better.
Than.
Bollywood.

[ Multi-Pov ]
#CollegeRomance #Mystery #Bollywood #Drama #TeenFiction

title: Eyes of the Wendigo
description:
In the isolated, snow-buried village of White Pines, winter is not merely a season-it's a suffocating force that brings both cold and fear. As the bitter winds howl through the forest, a series of violent deaths sends shockwaves through the tight-knit community. The bodies are mutilated, torn apart by what appears to be an animal-but the villagers know better. Rumors swirl about the Wendigo, an ancient legend passed down through generations, a creature born of desperation and hunger, lurking in the frozen woods.

A group of seasoned hunters, led by the grizzled but respected Elias Conroy, bands together to track and kill whatever is hunting their people. But as they venture deeper into the wilderness, they make a horrifying discovery: the Wendigo isn't a creature of myth, but something far more real-and far more terrifying. It's not just hunting them; it's infecting them. The twisted remains of their friends and neighbors reveal a monstrous truth: once the Wendigo touches you, you become it.

The hunters, once brothers-in-arms, begin to turn on one another as paranoia sets in. Anyone could be next. As the lines between human and monster blur, trust disintegrates, and survival becomes a harrowing, personal struggle. In the brutal cold, with no help coming, they must face the terrifying reality that the Wendigo may not just be among them-it may already be them.

Status: ONGOING
Genre: Psychological Horror

title: GRAVITY FALLS {COMPLETED} #WATTYS2016
description:
Science fiction #1

Highest Rank #1 in science fiction...;)

What's hot- rank #1 in Science Fiction

Featured on Science Fiction Reading list at @IndiaCentral
___________
What will happen when there will be no gravity?
Will we die or survive? 
If yes, then how?
And for how long?


When things appear normal on the Earth, they are definitely not. The preparation of gravity falls has begun to steal away life from the only habitable planet of the universe. When gravity is all set to be nullified, a teenager finds herself trapped in the mess. If she's the key to start this, then she must be the one to stop it. But is her determination enough to save the world? 

But one thing is sure in this race of survival, YOU HAVE TO CREATE YOUR OWN DESTINY BECAUSE SURVIVAL IS THE REAL TRUTH.
___________
Thanks @RajanGaggiArora for this amazing cover!!!!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Writer of #1 Science Fiction, Gravity Falls.

Hey there, Stranger!

Welcome to my humble abode. This profile is where my heart bleeds and fill the blank pages with raw emotions. Ink soaks my excess emotions and help me maintain my sanity.

I'm crazy, I'm wild, I'm unscripted.

My books are filled with grammatical errors, typos and a lot of other hoobos but guess what? When you read them, I hope you would feel the feelings I felt while writing them.

I think all of us hide who we actually are and find solace in the characters we read. We vibe with the villains when we hate the world and cheer the heroes when we're motivated to save the world.

I might be ranting by now but who cares? Being true to ourselves is the best thing that we can do.

We will make a lot of mistakes and ruin many opportunities, but that's who we are.

Try. Fall. Cry. Rise. And repeat.

But every time,
we try a little harder,
cry a little less
And rise a little higher. :)

I write to escape the voices in my head, not knowing where do they end.
I'm just trying to figure it out by messing up the time I have.

Text me up, I always have time to chat and meet new people.

I believe there are more than 8 billion people out there, if I can learn just one thing from every one of you, damn I'll be a great human being.

Well, you survived till here?
You might as well just drop a hi on my board now.

Follow me @pranjali_aditi on instagram.

title: Silent Lies
description:
Silent Lies is a psychological thriller and boy-love story following investigative journalist Choi Seungcheol, who is drawn into a series of mysterious disappearances in town. His logical, emotionally distant nature-rooted in past trauma-is challenged when he meets Yoon Jeonghan, a psychiatrist with a troubling past and manipulative charm. Initially, the two clash, but a reluctant partnership and their shared involvement in the case gradually spark a complex romance. As Seungcheol wrestles with his growing feelings and suspicions about Jeonghan's true role, his friends Mingyu, Joshua, Hoshi, and Vernon offer insight and support. Together, they explore the unsettling mysteries surrounding the disappearances, while Seungcheol faces a difficult choice between uncovering the truth and protecting the man he's come to love.

title: The Turing Test - [Open Novella Contest 2019 Shortlist]
description:
Ronnie Gold only has one dream.

Every night for the past two years, flickering images of a bloody battlefield have haunted her sleep, and every night, she's the only survivor. She's never told anyone about it, because combined with the dissociative emotional disorder that renders empathy out of her reach, she'd be labeled dangerous.

But amid rising public tensions over an artificial intelligence project she's spearheading, Ronnie's dreams begin to infect her waking life, too. With the visions starting to take on an ominous, almost prophetic quality, Ronnie must sort through the blurred lines of reality before the bloodiest nightmare finally comes true.
 ▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁
#RedefineHumanity

title: The Curse
description:
Hindsight is 20:20, as they say. But Madeline's vision had never been that great. 

Blind-sided by the Supernatural, Madeline finds her carefully structured and idealistic world ripped from under her after a chance encounter in the depths of the forest changes her life, forever. 

Change shapes all things, and Madeline Alvarez was no exception to this rule. Set on a path towards - what some would call - her destiny. Madeline would argue with you, to the ends of the earth, about the conceptualised nature of destiny, but self-denial, can only stem so far.

After working herself towards her goal of self-actualisation, Madeline jumps at the opportunity, throwing herself into a world of danger, and chaos, destruction and death. Subject to a prophecy uttered years before her birth, Madeline must use every shred of power, and knowledge, to survive in this new-world.

title: The Last of the Twenty: The Setting of the Board
description:
Alex can’t understand why Nadia is with
Ethan. Nadia is the most beautiful girl in Freedom, New Hampshire, and Ethan is
a grade-A jerk. 

But as Alex observes the budding relationship,
his jealousy turns to worry. Historical research and some damning photos reveal
Ethan’s dark side. Alex is sure Ethan is a threat to Nadia’s very life, but
Nadia won’t listen to him.

In the meantime Alex is developing his own
strange supernatural abilities, a teenage girl claims to have been attacked by
a vampire, and wolves are roaming the forests around Freedom—along with a
mysterious and deadly dark man. As Alex fights for Nadia’s safety, he uncovers
a network of ancient supernatural beings, and the secrets of his own dimly
remembered past. 

The Setting of the Board is the first in Mike Yeaton’s Last of
the Twenty series, a collection of young adult vampire tales that’s more Salem’s Lot than Twilight.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Well aren't these little bios just awkward? How many of us sit at the computer for long periods of time pondering the very best qualities of ourselves to pull out for display, while at the same time trying to appear humble? Oh sure, some of us say we don't care what other people think of us or our writing, but then again, why put ourselves and our carefully crafted work out there for all to see if not for the gratification of the proverbial "pat on the back", and satisfaction of seeing those numbers next to that little eyeball climb?

I know in my heart of hearts it's what I want, and am looking for. Although I want to build an audience, and hopefully an eventual fan base, most of all I want the help of critical eyes and genuine opinions. I crave not only the self-affirming boost of positive feedback, but also the stinging criticism of where I went wrong, and what I can do to improve. It is, after all, only through other's eyes that we can truly see the work that we hold so close to ourselves. I am also more than happy to read other's work and give honest feedback of my own, as well as share any "tricks of the trade" I may pick up while on my journey as a hopeful writer. Please be kind on length however, as I am the happily married father of four kids!

I look forward to reading other's work and receiving feedback on my own, and feel free to PM me for any critique exchanges or just to chat. As my profile states, my name's Mike. My favorite authors include Stephen King, Anne Mccaffery, and of course, George R.R. Martin!

Good luck in your writing my friends, and I look forward to getting to know you through your stories!

title: Murder Is At Hand.

It's a closed-room case, and Allie will need every scrap of wit and determination she has to solve the case before the police get involved.

title: Jack
description:
Do you know Jack? The Ripper? Saucy Jack? Leather Apron?

Like the tale of anyone's life, these short stories are a blend of horror, romance, mystery, thrills, and even some humor. Think you know Jack? Well, get ready. You are about to meet him face to face.

title: Until It's Gone (A Dead Island Fanfic) [Part 1/4]
description:
[Part 1 of 4]

She lived her life to the fullest, spending all of her time outside basking in the sunlight of her home on Banoi. She was smart, brilliant, and put others before herself. She had a loving family, a lover, best friends and a home she could cherish all her life. One could say she had everything and her life was perfect, but now she’s lost it all. Her home, her family, her friends; everyone and everything she once knew was gone. And she barely had the chance to say goodbye. What was once her beautiful home was now Hell, yet she still finds it hard to think about leaving it all behind. That old saying - “You don’t know what you’ve got until it’s gone” - is more powerful than one may think. At least, to her it is.

This is the story of Abigail Mason; the story of how she just barely survived the place she once called home.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Broken | Lucas North - Spooks/MI5 Story [Featured]
description:
*Wattpad Featured Story*

A year before MI5 spy Lucas North ends up in Russian prison for 8 years, there is Alexa George, a woman he rescues as a favor to his boss, Harry Pearce.   But when Lucas gains his freedom as part of a prisoner exchange, his return to London sets off a series of events that threaten to reveal the truth behind the people who aren't exactly who they appear to be - including Lucas and Alexa.

This story takes place between Season 7, episodes 1 - 2 for Chapter 1 - 2 of the BBC series Spooks/MI5; and between episodes 2 and 3 for the rest of the chapters.  All events happen before episode 3 when Ben Kaplan goes undercover for a radical Muslim group.  There will be references made to events that do occur towards the end of Season 7.  

If you're a fan of Season 1, you'll also discover an old face - Jools Siviter, one of my favorite recurring characters who always kept Harry on his toes!  Played to perfection by none other than Hugh Laurie, Siviter is a juicy character indeed!

Just like the series this story is based on (Spooks/MI5) "Broken - MI5/Lucas North" contains scenes that depict violence as well as some mature content.  Please take this in consideration before reading.    

Disclaimer: All publicly recognizable characters, settings, etc. are the property of Kudos and BBC. The original characters and plot are the property of the author of this story. The author is in no way associated with the owners, creators, or producers of any previously copyrighted material. No copyright infringement is intended.

title: How Fate Binds Us
description:
Fate is weird thing that binds everyone, everything together. It comes in many names destiny, the divine will, and even luck.

Colton Jacobs doesn't think fate is pretty kind to him. He's the outcast in his school, the geeky weirdo who is invisible to everyone. And some days he prefer it like this, and sometimes he doesn't. So like every desperate person in the need for popularity and friends, he takes on the challenge.

In the peaceful yet strange town of Baskerville Heights, there is the legend of The Bentley Massacre. All Colton needed to do was go in to the Bentley Manor, find a portrait, write his name, and get the hell out of there. But it's a change of plans when there's something in there. Something is trapped in there, the company he will have to face.

So it's up to Colton to decide if he'd actually risk his life just to be known. Just to be seen. Just to have friends. Or to do the total opposite of that. It is his choice after all.

This is just how fate binds us.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Lethal Affair (Teacher-Student Romance)
description:
A mysterious killer on the loose. Rebellious students to handle. A forbidden relationship to hide. A mystery to solve. What has a 24 year old Mathematics teacher, April Paige gotten herself into?

April Paige is an ordinary teacher at Valley High that was assigned to look after the new 19 year old transfer student, Damien Morrison. To Miss Paige's dismay, she finds out that Damien is one troublesome delinquent. Both of them soon plunge into a love-hate relationship which slowly, but surely develops into something scandalous and forbidden. 

As if that's not complicated enough, both of them find themselves the target of a mysterious killer. What does the killer want? Why is the killer after them? And most importantly, who is the killer?

title: The Mosaic
description:
FEATURED | #1 in whodunnit  for over four weeks | #1 in the third chaos award 

When you can't trust in angels, you turn to the devil for a pact.

Alessandro Steno is Venice's living legend. Trying to wash old blood off his hands, he hunts the city's worst criminals. Investigating the grotesque deaths of famous artists, Alessandro finds himself face to face with a ghost story. An assassin known as 'The Reaper'. And in the shadows of the dead hides something bound to destroy his city and plunge the world into chaos. In dire need of allies, Alessandro finds out beggars can't be choosers...

A stranger offers him a deal: he will kill the Reaper, if the inspector let's him uncover the secrets of his father. Alessandro just might have to team up with one demon to defeat another...

A girl hellbent on revenge for the murder of her friend won't stay home in the safety of wealth and marriage. Wanting to prove herself at all costs, she might just be the Reaper's easiest catch...

Can liars find the truth? How long can they fight all fronts -- themselves, each other, the world? Who can beat death's game?

description:
"Tell me you love me, darling," He demanded as his arms caged me to the rough, concrete wall. 

I scoffed, "Who do you think you are?"

"I think I'm your worst nightmare and your sweetest day dream."

........................

Taken to a prison asylum after the Prominence kills her family in front of her at a young age, gifted Riley Evans finds herself under ceaseless experimentation and tests. 

While there, Riley notices she's under constant supervision from a pair of jaded, light blue eyes. However, her passionate hatred for General Parker of Division 64 does not deter him from keeping watch over her since the many years following their childhood friendship. 

When Parker's attentions to Riley catch the ever-watching eye of the Prominence, Riley's life as she knows it changes beyond return. Although, as she and Parker discover the rocky balance of their developing relationship, Riley might never want to return to her old life even if she could.

authorBio:
I may be simple minded
but,
If someone were to ask me
If I believed in monsters?? My answer would be 'yes'
If I believed in ghosts?? My answer would again be a simple 'yes'
If I believed in demons?? My answer would be a frightened 'yes'
If I believed in aliens?? My answers would be a big 'YES'
If I believed in time travel?? My answer would be be a futuristic 'yes'
If I believed in multi-dimensions?? My answer would again be 'yes'
If I believed in love?? My answer would be definitely be a 'yes'
The multiple 'yes' that follow the questions are only because they are alive in my dreams, thoughts and imagination.

I'm a person who dreams of living in a different dimension, aliens are our closet neighbors, monsters living closer to us than we actually like to believe, the feelings of ghosts and demons who we never seem to consider and a life where there is no limit when you spread your wings and take off.

Yes, my head is filled with crazy but it's a place where I like to spend most of my time.

authorBio:
My life is blessed with a love that deepens each passing year that we are married--and my husband and I have been married for more than 30 years now.  We are each others' true hearts and loving soul mates.

And I have always been a romantic at heart, loving the great novels, plays, & poems by Austen, the Bronte's, Shakespeare, Wharton, and others--whether the stories were of star crossed lovers, lovers with obstacles in their path, or lovers needing to learn how to love again, etc..  At university, I studied literature and performed it--as well as, writing my own early musings in prose and verse.  But the everyday necessities of life took hold and my creative writing spirit lay dormant for a very long time.

However my return to my own creative writing in February 2010--after viewing the liltingly romantic BBC production of "North & South" (first broadcast in 2004)--became an unstoppable force that has infused my life with inestimable joy as I have written over 50 stories to date.  Of my stories, some are original fan fiction, but most are my completely original stories--with my writing of new stories continuing weekly.   I joke, that I can't turn off my storytelling brain--nor would I want to. 

My storytelling genre is romantic love--tender, passionate, sensuous, and always honoring the deep and abiding love that my lovers share.  My stories are tales of heartfelt love and of lovers who cherish each other.  After all, Love is the cherished dream of our hearts' desires (Gratiana L., 2012).

I began a blog called Something About Love; in 2011 where I have also shared my stories.  It is found at www.gratianads90.wordpress.com  And in August 2012, I began to share my stories with the wider audience of Wattpad, with you.  I hope that you enjoy my stories.

Cheers!  Gratiana Lovelace  (upd Dec. 31, 2019)

P.S.  My profile picture is Renoir's lovely "At the Concert" (1880).  For more, visit http://impressionism.kimbellart.org/exhibit/saints

title: Exuberance Is Beauty (Book 1)
description:
(Featured Story 2016 & 2017) Oregon, 1940s: Eve Miller, a young war widow, rebels against the ordinariness of womanhood in the post-war era. Eve is enlightened as she succumbs to the sensual temptation of an adulterous affair. In its aftermath, Eve Miller's life unravels and leads to unexpected violence and moral isolation. Exuberance Is Beauty, is a contemporary interpretation of Adam and Eve's biblical allegory and Eve's fall into desolation. The story examines the consequence of erotic obsession and the repentance the female protagonist must pay for her sins of the flesh.

Exuberance Is Beauty has been described as "an intense psychological thriller," "hauntingly beautiful," and "terrifying."
  
  
  WHAT WATTPADERS ARE SAYING ABOUT JEFF:
  
  * controlling, heartless, psychopath man! 
  * I really don't like Jeff, he's a bully and controlling her life.
  * Manipulation then seduction, a typical narcissist. Poor Eve.
  * Jeff is such an evil narcissistic...I bet he does mistreat his wife...physically and threatening to dump her if she doesn't back his projects and that he has had affairs regularly...It will all come out eventually. I just loathe him 
  
  
  WHAT WATTPADERS ARE SAYING ABOUT EVE:
   
  *Why do I feel Jeff will ruin her chance of happiness?
  * I am trying to understand Eve but to be sincere I just cant. Jeff's behaviour is disgusting but it was wrong for her to follow him to his bed. I understand that she feels she now has control over her life but I just have this bizarre fear that she'd go back to him again, it seem as if they are obsessed and dats not love
  * I felt bad for her knowing that the only reason for all of this is a man- a controlling, heartless, psychopath man! 
  * She didn't deserve any of this 
  * What a frightening life this character led.  I only hope some of the women that were tortured during this time frame were able to recover to some degree
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I write fiction, memoir and plays. I love reading new works and connecting with readers and other authors. Most often, I  write about relationships that have a dysfunctional, psychological undercurrent.  Three of my books have been featured here on wattpad! I also write under the name Donna Barrow-Green.

title: Royal Alpha Xavier (Being Rewritten)
description:
"Why is she here?" he seethes, clenching his fists.

"You're being unreasonable-"

"I want her gone!" He growls, sending the book shelves next to the doorway flying. She doesn't let herself be fazed by his antics.

"They'll tear each other apart if they're together, yet they can't survive without each other," she repeats a part of the prophecy they both had memorised so many years ago. Stepping around him and the broken shelves, she smiles. "It sucks, doesn't it? Watching the person you love fall for someone else. Maybe now you'll know how I felt."

~*~*~*~

At the brink of World War Three, Iris has been bought by a mysterious business man to work on his farm as a horse trainer. In exchange, he'll make sure she won't be sent back home, where war has already damaged without remorse. She, of all people, hates the idea of being owned. Luckily, this man has an offer she can't refuse. Work for him, earn enough money to buy her contract back, then leave with her horse.

Only now, when she gets to know him and the people around him, does she realise that maybe she doesn't want to leave. She could be happy for the first time in a long time.

When war strikes their part of the world and dark secrets are revealed, forcing everyone to flee once again, Iris finds herself trapped between two worlds. This time around, she can't be free, no matter what path she chooses.

The fiery human girl and the stubborn Alpha.

What can go wrong?

***The rewritten version of Royal Alpha Xavier is available on the Radish Fiction app now!***

title: Perfection - The Oasis Project Book 1 (Complete)
description:
When fugitive Valentina Linkin is offered a free trip to a tropical island, she takes up the offer without hesitation. Under no pressure to cut her vacation short, she hopes to enjoy the sun before starting her life over. However, the longer she stays, the more she finds strange things that can't be ignored: freak illnesses, terrible accidents, and people who never come back from the hospital.

Ira Konstantinov admitted herself to the island hospital a year ago. Her life has never been a breeze, but she hit rock bottom when she was imprisoned and robbed of human sight. She waits in the darkness, trying to find her way above ground.

There are horrors on this island - on the surface, underground in the labs, and within the inhabitants themselves. Linkin and Ira are different now, and science hates imperfections.

Co-written with @squirrelg

My name is Ella Nigh and I have been a writer for over 9 years now. Writing is and forever will be a passion of mine, but it is not what I do full time. I am currently in school going through for Radiation Therapy which does eat up a lot of my time.
I write when I can, but I have the habit of being forced to stop writing and when I find free time again I end up just starting another piece. I do dabble in short stories, but my personal favourites to write are novels and novellas. My preferred genres are fantasy, supernatural, and sci-fi.

I am a huge believer in supporting people who support me. So if you have read my work, please feel free to leave a review and when I find some spare time I will do so to you.

Also, please feel free to shoot me a message! I love to meet new people and I do take requests for covers and take payment in the form of reads.

title: Misty
description:
#42 in Mythology

____

Looking everywhere through dark, among the light, a tired soul looked for another. The question was simple, the answer was a mess.

"Where will I find her?" 

The voice came out clean, burdened with no stress. 

"She will find you." 

A deep breathe echoed around, the silent scream was audible.

"When?" 

A smile curved beautifully, the heartbeats were unstoppable. 

"When the love will blind you."

title: Virus: The Infected
description:
❝If Everything Around You Changes Would You Stay The Same?❞

Sarah and Tyler was just another survivor when almost everyone in our oh so peaceful planet was infected with an unknown virus that turned humans against each other. The infected turned other uninfected human beings into their food to survive. The humans had no other choice than killing them to survive because only a bite is what it takes to takes for you to turn into one of them.

Sarah and Tyler being best friends made them a really great team, they did whatever they needed to survive just like every other survivor even if it comes to taking the life of another human being. However, there are too much to them than they let on, too many dark secrets, too many lies, too many demons buried beneath the strong and badass facade.

One stupid mistake made by Sarah put them in a situation where they had to be saved. That day they met a family of a survivor that made them believe in humanity again. Sarah slowly started growing fond of them and began opening up about her bad past. 

Day by day, they found new survivors who were in need and helped them but in all that distraction they forgot one thing - The Infected. They emerged, they grew stronger than humans and they were coming but nobody knows how or have the power to beat them. 


❝I LOVE IT!! The way you write is amazing, such as the use of your similes and description. You also used a lot of suspense throughout the chapter which made me keep reading and that's what I loved most about it❞ from @SweetChildO_A_R.

title: AFTER + Zombies
description:
Tessa is a good fighter with a sleek, sturdy sword at her side. She's barely moved into her freshman dorm when zombies crash through the gates. With their graying skin, powerful appetite and strong numbers, zombies are a threat Tessa is used to--and one she enjoys fighting whenever she can. Something she's not used to, however, is Hardin; with his cocky British accent and dark demeanor, his skills with a sword are just as impressive as his collection of tattoos. Soon, Tessa learns it's not just zombies she has to fight, but her heart too.

authorBio:
A zombie outbreak has fallen upon the land in this reimagining of Jane Austen's classic tale of the tangled relationships between lovers from different social classes in 19th century England. Feisty heroine Elizabeth Bennet (Lily James) is a master of martial arts and weaponry and the handsome Mr. Darcy (Sam Riley) is a fierce zombie killer, yet the epitome of upper class prejudice. As the zombie outbreak intensifies, they must swallow their pride and join forces on the blood-soaked battlefield in order to conquer the undead once and for all.

This film has been rated PG-13 by the MPAA for the following reasons: zombie violence and action, and brief suggestive material.

Pride + Prejudice + Zombies, in theaters February 5th.

authorBio:
Wattys 2015 winner for my book S.M.A.R.T. - check it out and tell me what you think.

Growing up I was different than most boys. Rather than sports, I'd draw comics, or make up stories about things that lived in the orchards behind my house. I watched lots of TV, and lots of movies and I loved any story. I have fond memories of Munsch and Suess and the like as a youngster, but I really fell in love with reading via the Harry Potter series. My mother got me the second book first. I didn't mind. I loved it just the same. I was the same age as Harry as I read the books.
In highschool I wrote and wrote, mainly crappy poetry that wreaked of youth, but I eventually got the idea for my first novel. I spent years on that, rewriting the first third over and over until I finally learned to complete things and edit after. Writing is my life, and I hope you like my stories.

Please check out my work and leave comments!

title: Outburst
description:
The death of her father forced Callie to live with her estranged uncle-the strict, ambitious, and authoritative Luke Mercer. It never crossed her mind that living with him would make her life surrounded by hot and cold situations-not only came from Uncle Luke, but also from his trusted assistant, Grant Olivier.

And it all became worse when Uncle Luke's girlfriend and rival businessman were found dead in the woods near their house just days apart, and he was accused of killing them.

At first, Callie thought it was just a misunderstanding. But when she discovered a secret about her uncle, she started to wonder: am I safe here?

Copyright © 2014 by Widya Nurul

authorBio:
Movie marathon athlete, expert dreamer, and professional weirdo. If you mix them up, you get a girl who likes making up things in her head 24/7, so she decides to write them down with a little change here and there, and finally you get the stories posted here.

Enjoy!

title: Offering (Book 1)
description:
Offering was a Wattpad Featured Story*
Olivia and her family invited an elderly employee into their home Christmas Eve, 1908, and their act of kindness was repaid with a brutal bloodbath.  Slaughtered by a Master Vampire and abandoned in the cellar, Olivia and her children were left with a final parting kiss of immortality.  Emerging from their hole, they discovered nearly everything they thought they knew about the curse was incorrect.  Now, a century later, never having crossed paths with another vampire, they have learned to handle their needs without causing harm, and live among us in our mortal world.  

A sexy, romantic, urban fantasy written for New Adults (college age).  

This novel is unique in that it can be read in one of two ways.  If you are looking for a love story, read Secrets (Offering Prologue) first. If you're looking for a vampire story full of action and intrigue, begin on the first page of this book.

title: Odd Eye [SKZ Lee Know X OC]
description:
Jung Raon, a gentle kindergarten teacher, never imagined that her life would take a dramatic turn when a mysterious man literally fell into her life-through her bedroom window. Lee Minho, a notorious mafia boss on the run, crashes into her world, bringing danger and secrets in his wake. Desperate to help Raon save her father's failing business, Minho offers an unconventional solution: marriage.

Now living together as husband and wife, Raon begins to notice the shadows surrounding Minho. A series of gruesome murders grips the city, and Raon's suspicion grows. Could her secretive husband be behind them? As Raon digs deeper, she uncovers the truth about Minho's dangerous world and his tragic past, including the eye patch he always wears.

But Raon isn't without her own secrets. A forgotten trauma from her past resurfaces, unraveling her memories and leaving her in tears. Minho, battling his own demons, stands by her side, and together they find solace in each other's arms.

As love blossoms between them, their newfound bond is tested when Raon is kidnapped by a vengeful enemy. To save their future, Minho and Raon must face their darkest fears and confront the past that haunts them both. In a world where danger lurks at every corner, will their love be strong enough to survive?

In this gripping tale of love, secrets, and redemption, Raon and Minho discover that even in the darkest of worlds, there can be light.

title: The Green Eyed Girl
description:
On a frozen island in the North Blue, an abandoned girl named Vespera is haunted by visions of the pirate Donquixote Doflamingo, whom she calls "Daddy." After years of waiting, she finally sees him sail by but is devastated when he pretends not to notice her. As rumors of the Hie Hie no Mi draw the Marines to investigate the island, Doflamingo returns, intrigued by the mysterious power he senses in Vespera.

Taken in by Doflamingo, Vespera must confront the painful question of why he never came for her and her mother. As she joins his crew, she begins to unravel the secrets of her past and her connection to the infamous pirate, all while navigating her new life in a dangerous world.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
About Me:

Hi! You can call me Sara. I'm originally from America, but I'm currently living in Japan, where I'm studying Japanese and teaching English. My passion for anime and storytelling has always been a big part of my life, and being in Japan has given me a deeper connection to the culture and stories I love. I'm especially interested in how Japanese storytelling blends fantasy, adventure, and deep character development.

I'm a huge fan of Isekai series, which is a genre I've been diving into more lately. Some of my recent favorites include Ascendance of a Bookworm, 7th Time Loop: The Villainess Enjoys a Carefree Life, I Used My Appraisal Skill to Advance in the World, and Campfire Cooking in Another World. Aside from that, I have a long list of favorites like One Piece, Gakuen Alice, Bleach, Yu-Gi-Oh!, Naruto, Inuyasha, Wolf's Rain, Sailor Moon, Fullmetal Alchemist, and Shugo Chara.

Writing has been one of my biggest passions for as long as I can remember. I've deleted my previous stories, but I'm currently working on a Yu-Gi-Oh! fanfiction called Echos of Darkness: Ryouras Journey where I reimagine Ryou Bakura as a girl who inherits the Millennium Ring. It's a project I'm excited to share, as it brings new twists to the original story and explores deeper character dynamics.

I'm also working on a One Piece fanfiction featuring an OC paired with Doflamingo, which has been a lot of fun to write. If you're into these fandoms, I'm currently looking for a beta reader to help me with both of these projects, so feel free to reach out if you're interested!

When I'm not writing or watching anime, I'm exploring Japan, learning the language, and immersing myself in its unique culture. You can follow my journey on Instagram and TikTok at @sarafeywrites, where I showcase my writing and behind the scenes and also my reading addictions. Also have a second account @sarafey.jp where I showcase life in Japan, the sights, and the experiences that inspire my stories.

title: Hidden Whispers
description:
[ OPEN NOVELLA CONTEST 2019 SHORTLISTED ]

[ FEATURED ON MYSTERY ]

Mikaela didn't want anything to do with her past. Her life already changed to a drastic extent when she had to be the sole witness of an "accident".

10 years later, a new accident pulled her back to her hometown. Because it resembled something she dreaded for long.

But things aren't the same in Glenville, and she realises that she wasn't the only one who knew what happened that night. 

People have changed. There were new perspectives, new love, too much hallucinations (or are they?) topped up with self-fed lies and bitter truths. But we know that what we know doesn't always come true. And the ride to knowing about the fact that you don't know is a bumpy one.

But to find out who the other person is who knows about night other than her could cost her many things - even her own sweet life.

TW

title: The Vanishing of Brandyn Taylor
description:
Brandyn Taylor had entered Kiera's life when she was seven years old, and they had been best friends ever since. Kiera even saw herself marrying him, but all her hopes of a happy life with him are smashed to pieces when he goes missing. The deeper Kiera gets into trying to solve the mystery, of where Brandyn's Body is, the deeper into trouble she gets herself. Convinced she is going to find a body, she sets off trying to trace his whereabouts. As she rules out all possible, feasible, reasons for his disappearance, she begins to think the un-thinkable. Has he been kidnapped? Are there drug rings involved? Someone's life can't simply be erased, leaving no trace of them what so ever. Can it?

Follow Kiera's story, as we delve into the mind of a troubled young woman, who desperately needs her best friends support, and whenever she's needed him before he has always been there for her. Why isn't he there for her this time?

If you enjoy reading this and feel like voting for a chapter, I'd much appreciate it, but it's not necessary. It means more to me that people are reading this story than numbers on a voting page. (But it IS lovely to see people like it enough to leave it a vote.)

Good morning.

Read and leave,

Tonight is dark and dear,

A typical stranger, throwing his fingers for a meaning.
A typical wanderer, looking through your eyes for attention, for affection, for hope.
Tick the words from my eyes, see them through your mind. Live my world, and think back through yours.
I will keep your soul in my care, all you need is to feed it the silly colors my heart make.

title: Open Heart {Under Revision}
description:
An unforgettable past. An unbreakable promise. An unforeseeable journey. An untouchable love.  

Years have passed since that fateful night changed everything for Charlotte Turner. What followed was submergence in dark waters through which breathing was difficult. Yet life offered a second chance, and even with secrets of her family and demons of past-  she came to Boston to breathe again as a new person. To become a doctor and forget everything which left her shattered. 

After facing near-obliteration of her career and getting publicly humiliated by the brilliant and condescending world-renowned diagnostician, Dr. Ethan Ramsey...who also happened to be her inspiration-  Charlotte pledged to never let her resounding past or undulating present destroy chance of having promising future or take away the dreams of a person she promised to fulfill once.  

And new life brought the gift of friendship and among them, Dr. Bryce Lahela seems to be quite different. His ability to bring forth a smile is hard to ignore and there are Sienna and Landry who always stand with Charlotte. But when a battleground is announced for five coveted positions, enemies start to rise and will go to whatever ends in order to achieve those places. 

But everything changed when suddenly Charlotte and the last person she ever expected to get involved with are thrust into an intangible situation. Working together, they find that not everything is unveiled about the hospital and the evil which lurks behind its pristine walls are too treacherous to be ignored. What they analyze starts a chain reaction of discoveries spanning to numerous meshed paths having no beginning or end. 

And when each touch of the person she used to run away from ignites flames of undeniable desire, Charlotte never expected how dangerously a dance of forbidden love has begun which leaves her world completely upside down. 

This is not a story. This is a chronology of her life.

 [UNDER REVISION]
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
In shadows of silence, you discover the truth of your origin. Your life. Your destiny. Your end. Your eternity.
And you know what?
Everything is is your hands. Doesn't matter if cosmic powers are trying to rip you apart-- fling yourself back by sheer strength of your private universe.

Trust me, we are born to chase and tame infinity.

I exist in a world so ephemeral, a constant surge of tides... I live under a night without stars and my mind is a fire that forever burns.

"Ten spears go to battle and nine shatter. Did that war forge the one that remained? No. All the war did was identify the spear that would not break."- Kaladin Stormblessed.

A Bit about me- 19, petite, Biotechnology Major...working to become an Astrobiologist. Epic Brandon Sanderson fan!

title: A Deadly Sorority (Book #1 Sorority Horrors)
description:
~A COZY YA HORROR~

Kayla Collins leaves her roots behind in Sedona, Arizona, to embrace a new chapter at a four-year university in sunny Irvine, California. Excitement courses through her veins as she pledges to Alpha Sigma Chi, a sorority renowned for its glamour and allure.

But beneath the surface of her newfound sisterhood, a darker obsession takes hold. Kayla becomes entangled with the Crime Ladies Podcast, drawn into a chilling world of sadistic true crime stories. As a criminal justice major, the allure is undeniable, but little does she know that her fascination will lead to a deadly web of secrets and deceit, unmasking a sadistic serial killer.

When Kayla crosses paths with Monique and Lauren, the enigmatic hosts of the Crime Ladies Podcast, her life takes an unexpected turn. They offer her a chance to host one of their episodes, a thrilling opportunity that soon turns into a haunting nightmare. Struggling to juggle her commitments, Kayla is soon faced with a string of mysterious deaths within her sorority, each one more sinister than the last.

With every passing moment, fear grips Kayla, leaving her trembling at the thought of becoming the next target on the hitman's list. As her world unravels and the shadows close in, she must race against time to uncover the chilling truth and survive the deadly game that has turned her sisterhood into a haunting nightmare.

Will Kayla emerge as a survivor or become just another murdered sorority sister?

Don’t miss this chilling paranormal suspense in a small California town—by the New York Times bestselling author! 

Stay tuned as we reveal more of the story every Friday!

Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
The author of a string of New York Times bestsellers, JAYNE ANN KRENTZ uses three different pen names for each of her three "worlds".   As JAYNE ANN KRENTZ (her married name) she writes contemporary romantic-suspense.  She uses AMANDA QUICK for her novels of historical romantic-suspense.  JAYNE CASTLE (her birth name) is reserved these days for her stories of futuristic/paranormal romantic-suspense.

"I am often asked why I use a variety of pen names," she says.  "The answer is that this way readers always know which of my three worlds they will be entering when they pick up one of my books."

In addition to her fiction writing, she is the editor of, and a contributor to, a non-fiction essay collection, DANGEROUS MEN AND ADVENTUROUS WOMEN: ROMANCE WRITERS ON THE APPEAL OF THE ROMANCE published by the University of Pennsylvania Press.  Her commitment to her chosen genre has been strong from the very beginning of her career.  Each year at the annual convention of the Romance Writers of America she participates  in a special day-long workshop for librarians and speaks on the importance of the romance genre.

"The romance genre is the only genre where readers are guaranteed novels that place the heroine at the heart of the story," Jayne says.  "These are books that celebrate women's heroic virtues and values:  courage, honor, determination and a belief in the healing power of love."

She earned a B.A. in History from the University of California at Santa Cruz and went on to obtain a Masters degree in Library Science from San Jose State University in California.  Before she began writing full time she worked as a librarian in both academic and corporate libraries.

She is married and lives with her husband, Frank, in Seattle, Washington.

title: Dangerous Letters
description:
Dear Reader, 

The following work was found sealed in the library of a castle, belonging to an ancient noble family, in the Champagne region to the east of Paris. The dates of the events contained within are attributed to sometime in the 18th century. It appears that any other record of the Marquis featured within, and the estate that he kept, have since been expunged from historical record. It is as if there was an omertà (conspiracy of silence) which sought to erase him entirely from collective memory - one that might have succeeded if not for the astonishing recovery of these letters. 

It has been my duty to act as caretaker to this work since I agreed to its restoration. I have found, regrettably, that my colleagues have failed to grasp the momentous importance of these letters and their wider significance. There is, I  admit, some question of authenticity that requires consideration. For my part, I have forcible reasons to believe that these letters are genuine. I have submitted the work to a broader audience, however, for precisely this object; I have hope that, by breaking outside the narrow remit of literary academia, I may yet find a willing readership committed to studying these letters as seriously as I have. 

As the Judge might once have heard it, so the Reader shall hear it now.

Unfortunately, I must also include a notice of warning: the letters of Charlotte B--- speak of diabolical horrors and the direst human cruelty. I believe that, were these letters recognised, they would take the place as the first of the modern écritures maudits (damned writings), above de Sade or Corbière. Hence, I recognise that such subject matter is certainly not for everyone. 

Should you decide to turn to more pleasant reading, I certainly could not blame you. The world can be a sombre and unforgiving place without having to reflect on its grimmest parts. 

The choice to continue, Reader, is entirely your own.

Yours faithfully,

Dr. Samuel J. Collins
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Missing Nolan
description:
As I write, the weight of Nolan's disappearance presses heavily on my mind. Memories of our past conversations mingle with the eerie events that have started to unfold around me, deepening the mystery of his vanishing. Despite the fear, I'm determined to uncover the truth. Each word I type on Wattpad becomes a beacon of hope, a plea for Nolan to reach out and end this unsettling silence.
