authorBio:
Hello, lovely readers! I'm Paige McKenzie, one of the creative minds (and the face!) of the YA trilogy The Haunting of Sunshine Girl. What started as a popular YouTube channel, became a book series that was headed to TV. As thing happen in Hollywood, my journey has taken many twists and turns. Now I own the IP once again and hope to find a new studio to make a film or show from my story.
When I'm not writing or producing, you can find me effortlessly quoting movies, embracing my adorkable nature, and navigating life as a gluten-free, not-so-tall individual. Join me on this adventure, and let's create magical worlds together! ✨

title: Tangled in Thorns
description:
Luciano "The Viper" De Luca, a ruthless and vengeful mafia boss, as he seeks to destroy those responsible for the brutal murder of his family. His target is the Moretti family, and at the top of his list is Isabella Moretti, the last surviving member of the once-powerful crime family. Cold, calculating, and consumed by the need for revenge, Luciano kidnaps Isabella, believing she holds the key to uncovering the conspirators behind the attack on his family.

However, Isabella is no helpless victim. Fiercely intelligent and unyielding, she fights back against Luciano's plans, determined to protect her family's legacy and rebuild what was lost. Forced into an uneasy alliance by a new, even greater threat from rival mafia factions, the two enemies must work together to survive. As tensions rise, so does their chemistry, creating a volatile mix of passion, hatred, and distrust.

As secrets unravel and betrayal lurks around every corner, both Luciano and Isabella must confront the truth about their families, their pasts, and their growing feelings for each other. In a world driven by bloodshed and power, can they rise above their hatred and find redemption? Or will the fires of revenge consume them both?

A gripping tale of love, betrayal, and vengeance, Tangled in Thorns explores the fine line between enemy and lover, and the sacrifices one must make in a world ruled by darkness.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: 𝗥𝗘𝗤𝗨𝗜𝗘𝗠
description:
"𝐑𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐠𝐞 𝐢𝐬 𝐚 𝐬𝐨𝐧𝐠 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐧𝐨 𝐦𝐞𝐥𝐨𝐝𝐲, 𝐨𝐧𝐥𝐲 𝐞𝐜𝐡𝐨𝐞𝐬."

Elle porte le poids des silences, chaque souvenir d'une sœur disparue gravé comme une brûlure. Maliah ne cherche pas la paix, elle cherche la justice, mais chaque pas la rapproche de la tempête. La vérité n'a pas de visage, mais elle porte des secrets trop lourds pour être ignorés.

Ezra, l'ombre d'un passé qu'il ne peut fuir, se fraie un chemin à travers ses murs. L'homme lié par une dette qu'il ne comprend plus, un cœur partagé entre la loyauté et la révolte.

Dans leurs regards, il y a des promesses brisées, des vies qui se croisent et s'entrechoquent comme des étoiles mortes. Elle le déteste. Lui la craint. Et pourtant, leurs âmes se reconnaissent, comme deux mélodies oubliées.

𝐌𝐚𝐢𝐬 𝐥𝐚 𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞, 𝐦𝐞̂𝐦𝐞 𝐥𝐨𝐫𝐬𝐪𝐮'𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐞 𝐭𝐨𝐮𝐜𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐨𝐧 𝐛𝐮𝐭, 𝐧𝐞 𝐟𝐚𝐢𝐭 𝐪𝐮𝐞 𝐬𝐨𝐮𝐟𝐟𝐥𝐞𝐫 𝐬𝐮𝐫 𝐥𝐞𝐬 𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐞𝐬 𝐝'𝐮𝐧 𝐟𝐞𝐮 𝐞́𝐭𝐞𝐢𝐧𝐭.

description:
Why did it happen? How did it happen? They had no clue. 

All they remembered was joining into the GWANGJU UNIVERSITY OF PSYCHOLOGY, in the hopes of studying criminology. 

A serial killer is littering the town with corpses, a notorious one at that who easily escapes the clutches of police. The situation gets serious, once the killer targets the students from Gwangju university, 

Was it for revenge? or the blood thirst?

Was the university really built for educational purpose? The students think as they unravel things they should've never known. 

In the end all they are left with are 7 suspects, each one of them somehow related to the University. 

Join LEE HANEOL, in the journey of finding the serial killer once she finds out that she is the next target.

title: Once In A Lifetime • The Roosevelt
description:
Roosevelt. 

A last name. A very powerful last name that could bring shivers down to anyone's spines as well as their blood run cold. Just a mention of this last name can either sparkle your eyes in astonishment or in fear for your life. Either a 100 or a 0. No in between, either a great life or a survival.

A young lady, with a stoned heart. Her green eyes are lifeless, just like a living corpse. A woman who's alive but is not living. 

A woman full of rage and grudge. Isolated herself from any love and care. 

Who can save her from this misery? No one.

And that makes her the perfect.. Roosevelt.

title: Nursing a Grudge: An Earl Walker Mystery
description:
WHAT'S THE WORST THAT COULD HAPPEN?
With the nursing home about to close for good, can a grumpy old man find a killer—and figure out his relationship with his new lady friend—before all the suspects move away?

Read this novel on your Kindle Fire, iPad, tablet or smart phone! Get the free app here: http://www.wattpad.com/getmobile
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
When I was in the first grade, my life goal was that I would grow up to be Batman. Because I thought it was a vocation -- you know, policeman, fireman, Batman. Once my first grade teacher crushed the dreams of that little boy, I guess I decided I would do the next best thing and make up stories about Batman. And then somewhere after that I learned about things like "intellectual property" and "copyright law" and "cease and desist" and decided that I would have to make up stories about my own characters.

So today, I do just that: Write stories about my own characters -- whether it's a doomed hitman named Solomon Long or a grumpy old amateur sleuth named Earl Walker or an out-of-work smart alec crime reporter named Truman.

My novels include the crime comedy TOO GOOD TO BE TRUMAN, the Earl Walker whodunit NURSING A GRUDGE and the Kansas City crime shoot-em-up FORGIVING SOLOMON LONG.

I'm also an editor and content strategist for a national media company.

title: Untouchable (LGBT - SciFi - Romance)
description:
Alan Stewart, First Lieutenant on the space ship Qatar, and Captain Robin Lang of the Huan Police Force, have been best friends since their days in the Space Academy, despite the fact that Stewart is homosexual and Lang has a wife and son, Max.
However Max is growing up and their friendship is threatened when Lang believes Stewart has designs on his son.
When Max, now an adult and a recent recruit to the Qatar, is assaulted in a gay bar, Lang accuses Stewart.  In an attempt to protect his son at all costs, Lang finds himself drawn into a dark conspiracy of murder and blackmail.
Meanwhile, Stewart has his own battles to fight.  Apart from defending himself against Lang's accusations, he discovers the young man he is falling in love with, Michael Banner, is the one man on the ship who is out of bounds, untouchable.
Lives and love hang in the balance as Lang and Stewart search for the truth.
  ... (LGBT / Romantic Sci-Fi)
(Watty 2012 Awards Finalist)

title: When Worlds Collide
description:
In the distant future, Earth lies in ruin, a desolate landscape scarred by the ravages of time and neglect. Cities crumble, forests fade to dust, and the remnants of civilization cling desperately to the shadows of a once-thriving world. Amidst this bleak panorama, a group known as the Treaders emerges-individuals bestowed with extraordinary abilities that connect them deeply to the earth and its truths.

With great abilities, Treaders can summon storms, grow life from barren soil, and even speak to the remnants of the past. Their gifts, however, come with a heavy burden: they are the last hope for restoring balance to a fractured planet, but they are also hunted by factions that crave their abilities for domination.

A girl, broken by captivity and lost in silent pleas may just hold the key to ridding the world of its desolation. 

A boy, forced to grow up too fast and see too much might just be the one able to save her. From the ones that hold her trapped...or from herself?

what will happen, When worlds Collide?




Trigger warning; depicted scenes of violence and abuse
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"I write to give myself strength. I write to be the characters I am not. I write to explore all the things I'm afraid of.&quot
"When reading we don't fall in love with the characters' appearance. we fall in love with their words, their thoughts, and their hearts. We fall in love with their souls."

title: Not Sick But Not Well.
description:
This day wasn't an exception. I cried over and over until I could no longer, I wiped my tears and took the packages in my arms after opening the door. 

In the house, nothing new. They were still talking, so I had time to drop off the packages, and without even opening one, I headed to the showers, cleaned my face with water, and went to my room. 

This is roughly how my days as a child went. I know that it cannot be described as an ideal childhood, but it would certainly be the most beautiful period of my life. Despite family conflicts, school conflicts, loneliness, and fear, I was happy. I was happy because they were all there, happy because they always remained, despite my faults, and happy. After all, I knew that I had not yet experienced the worst. Happy because I knew, that sooner or later everything would end. So yes, I was as cowardly and useless as they all claimed and even more naive than they would have believed, but this vision that I had at that age kept me going. 

Although the truth was hard to accept, I was given no choice. So I accepted life as it came; I accepted myself and my truth, my weaknesses, and the fact that I had to get used to the idea that I would always be the first actor to die in films.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
La Marquise

A solitary soul, La Marquise found refuge in the world of words. Haunted by loneliness, she turned to books and writing as an escape. Her vivid imagination, nurtured by fairy tales and myths, transformed into a powerful tool for expressing her emotions. Through her stories, she sought to understand the human condition and share her perspective with the world. Writing became her passion, her purpose, and her salvation. authorBio:
Oh hi there! It's been a couple years since I updated my "about me" thing, so let's do this:

I'm Alison and I like to write when I'm not working full time in disability services. Somehow I've managed to publish three novels since I first started posting on Wattpad - In 27 Days (2017), The Silence Between Us (2019), and A Game Most Foul (2024) - and as my five year old says, "That's cool, mom." 📚

I also want to say thanks a million for all the love and continued support I get here. It's still surreal to look back and see how far I've come since 2011. (crap, I'm old.)

Check out my website for more info on all the bookish things I have going on:

www.alisongervais.com

Oh, and just in case you were curious... YES, there is still a movie for In 27 Days in the works! Unfortunately, the pandemic and the movie industry itself slowed things waaaaay down. Hopefully I will have more updates to share about this very soon!

title: Twisted Time
description:
Driving home after a bad day, Danielle "Dan" Lent is transported from her car into a subterranean laboratory. Confused and disoriented, she has no choice but to trust the stranger Ric, who claims to be a time agent. He recruits Dan to investigate illegal time travel. 

However, Dan finds herself caught in a loop of time switches, thrown back and forth between the lab and a rainy parking lot where a stray border collie offers her company. Desperate to find a way home, Dan tries to figure out why she has become the pawn of criminal forces-and why her name and scientific work seem to be so important a few centuries down the line. 

With the help of Ric and her new dog friend, Dan sets out to untangle the twisted timelines. In a race against time, she is risking everything she has-her life, love, and future.

authorBio:
Hi, I'm Henry, a former Wattpad star with 5 books formerly in the Paid Stories program that are currently on Amazon.  You can find full versions of these stories on my author page.
https://www.amazon.com/Henry-Scott/e/B09JFL7SL1

I live in metro-Detroit with my family, two lovable golden retrievers, two cats, and a turtle.  You can see plenty of pictures of them on my Instagram. I love coffee, sausage pizza with extra sauce, true-crime TV shows, bonfires on cool nights, and my Triumph motorcycle.

I'm also an avid reader. One of my earliest memories is crying at the end of Charlotte's Web because it wasn't fair- she'd saved Wilbur, damn it!  However, I moved past that sad experience, and I started another book about a boy and his dog, Old Yeller.

title: Anne Boleyn And The Death Of The Tudors
description:
The story of Anne Boleyn does not end on the scaffold. The fate of the Tudors is rewritten in blood and fire...

I hear it, before I am ready.  The high whistle of a sharp blade slicing through the air.  Anne Boleyn: the ambitious virgin, the great whore, the queen, the revolutionary, the witch, is going to die...

At that moment the world explodes in sound.  I hear running and screaming, chaos around me. This is not right.

I hear the voice of my killer.  "Run!  Run now Anne!" he whispers roughly. I rip off the blindfold.  My eyes adjust, but what I see makes no sense.  Maybe I am dead after all.  Maybe this is hell...

Anne will fight for survival and revenge in the face of the deadly plague that blights the land.  Thomas Cromwell will fight for power in a dying kingdom.  A tale of Anne Boleyn with an apocolyptic twist.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am a voracious reader and my taste ranges from historical fiction to apocolyptic and dystopian fiction.  I am a first time writer and I would love to hear your feedback on my first book, which combines my two favourite genres. 

I will be updating as frequently as possible!

In university, Emma and Khalil fall in love and begin dating. after graduation of the university, Emma's demanding new job creates tension between them, ultimately leading to betrayal and their heartbreaking breakup. Khalil then meets Wendy, a bright light in his life, but tragedy strikes when Emma and her new partner, Tyler, orchestrate a fatal accident that changes everything. In the aftermath, Khalil transform into the Ghost Rider, seeking vengeance and justice. Meanwhile, Emma, filled with guilt,, attempts to redeem herself by restoring Khalil's beloved car. Years later, their paths unexpectedly cross once more, and the possibility of forgiveness hangs in the balance as they confront their shared past and the choices that altered their lives. title: Retribution
description:
After years of torment and pain, I'm just a shadow of the woman I once was. Even now, after months of freedom, the lingering aches of broken bones, and the memories of unspeakable horrors still keep me from living a life of peace.

While I try my best to put back all the broken pieces, the last thing I need is another man-or so I thought.

Jake is one of Hollywood's hottest, most popular actors. He's the kind of man a woman like me should avoid at all costs. But his determination to prove to me that happiness is more than just a shattered dream slowly starts to break down my defenses, and I start to hope that I might still be able to find love.

Unfortunately, with a painful history like mine, hoping for a better future can turn out to be a huge mistake-especially when the demons of your past refuse to let you go.

title: Catastrophic Supermodel (RE-WRITING)
description:
(Currently on-hold for rewriting purposes, may see new changes afterwards but the plot will still remain the same)

×

my name's Vivian, but some call me Viana (you know, the supermodel). I'm 19 years old and I live two, very different lives.

I thought things were just settling up for me after my fathers tragic death, when my 'step mom'  transfers me to a new country to live with a rich ass family.

not only do I have to keep my supermodel life a secret from the unsuspecting boys that I'm forced to live with, my real life as Vivian decides to come crashing down as well.

to make matters worse I just had to meet someone whom I've had a terrible past with. I thought things were getting cool between us when he decides to unravel himself and expose his true intentions. Which were terrifying to be honest. And it gets even more terrifying when he actually starts to carry out those intentions.

I was the one who created two versions of myself, bringing up double the trouble. 
So like father always said, "you got yourself into this mess, you get yourself out of it."

Though I'm not very sure how to get my self out of this doughnut.

Warning: this story contains certain mature scenes, brutal acts and expected further violence. Don't let the info deceive you, humor is only a 10% in this one.
I'd advice you to be 13+ and not a robot to read this story :)

But soon, a new peril will arise, threatening to turn the city into a war-zone, a menace that will quickly become fursonal for Judy Hopps.  Nick Wilde, meanwhile, will journey to a distant city in pursuit of an elusive criminal--and find himself face to face with a monstrous power-grab scheme.   But, is it already too late to stop it?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Well, I suppose I'm a bit overdue for this. (To put it mildly!)

I live in Portland Oregon, currently on disability owing to contracting cancer three years ago. As to my age, let's just say that it's somewhere between 60...and death!

I've been writing anthropomorphic fiction since 1999 in once capacity or another.

My first writing excursion was for a Yahoo Group known as Furry City, a combination of an RPG and a Writer's Circle. About six months after it came online, I became the group's the moderator following the departure of Furry City's creator.

Furry City was set in a fictional town in Southern California (Califurnia)called Los Gatos, actually more like the city in the film Sing! than Zootopia--except that like Zootopia, the only residents were mammals. (All birds, reptiles, etc. were either pets, or food. No humans either.)

After leaving Furry City I began penning stories for the Spontoon Island website. (Google it) and later returned to writing for Furry City when it enjoyed a brief revival.

I currently serve an the staff of the Zootopia News Network website, working to help develop the Art of the Day projects.

My Zootopia fanfic, The Fire Triangle currently remains my one and only writing project. (One thing I learned from my stint at Furry City is that I don't do well writing multiple stories at once.) And after a somewhat rocky start I flatter myself that it's finally beginning to catch on.

On a final note, I would like to take this opportunity to extend my thanks to everyone who has taken a look at my humble scrivenings. And and extra big thanks goes out to those who've taken the time to post reviews and/or become followers.

Your most humble servant

MercMarten aka John Urie

title: The tale of sofi
description:
"Taai? Is that who your fucking now?" He spat, his fingers tightening against my waist as he pulled me closer.
Realizing he'd just broken my phone out of some stupid assumptions he'd made pissed me off so much, that I couldn't stop myself from slapping him.
Our breathing was all i could hear, along with my fastening heart beat. 
He slowly returned his icy glare to me, and the next second i was flying across the room. 
He'd almost thrown me across the room and onto my bed. Hovering over me, he grabbed my wrists and pinned it over my head with one of his hands. 
"You've forgotten who you belong to" he whispered, his voice vibrating with anger.


Some grew up with tales of prince charming and his lost princess. And the others grew up watching pretty woman or the notebook. But i grew up watching twilight and vampire diaries. A fictional world where anything could happen. From Harry potter to Jamie Lannister. 

But at the age of 22 i was forced to face the harsh reality of life when i ran way from home, escaping the lies and games of my wealthy family. We thought the worst was finally done. 
While I continued living the life we'd built for ourselves in the small happy town of Port Angeles, oh how unaware we were of the darkness that surrounded us. 
Forced into the world of impossibilities, only then did i discover my true self. 
And like our beloved Niklaus Mikaelson once said... 
"Don't underestimate the allure of darkness. Even the purest hearts are drawn to it"

And that's what Icarus did.

Veronica Ray, youngest child of Ray family. She is the sweetest and the naughtiest darling daughter of Mr.  and Mrs. Ray. Veronica belongs to a above average family and has a ambition to start a business on her own. She is a independent girl living her life on her condition.

title: The Girl Who Kept Running
description:
He ran into her at street theater.

She was a force of nature, not a casual first time hire.

She brought the house down with her performance, literally pulled the audience to their feet in standing ovation.

Her performance was too real, unnerving, deeply unsettling to him. He spent all his energy keeping up with her.

At the end of the play, she snatched her earnings from the director's hands and ran away, leaving a trail of questions behind her, the most burning one in his mind was:

Would he ever see her again?
____________________

This ongoing novel imagines a world that our younger generations inherit after a series of successive presidencies in the same vein as the current model. There is no need for erecting walls, as the biggest divide created by humanity - that of social class - takes care of a post modern segregation. The poor are literally marginalized into slum-like townships and tend to be of color. The names of these townships would be enough to tell you their story. The rich, well, remain happily oblivious in the big American cities. 

In this world find a mysterious girl whose identity must be hidden or she would be hunted down and a young street actor who falls for her intrigue. Discover how they survive, born into a society not prepared to give them a chance.

For them, the dystopia came without an apocalypse. 

Copyrighted 2018

title: Unfamiliar (Unfamiliar Series #1)
description:
I will be posting this story on Royal Road within the next week or so after I have passed the approval process. My name on there will also be CatLegis. 

Kara thought that going to a boarding school for witches would be hard. But when she's framed for murder, she must clear her name before the murderer can strike again. 
*****
Kara has just turned sixteen and is to attend Greenwood Academy, a witches' boarding school located in the Salem Woods in Massachusetts. But the Zen family is notorious for weak familiars and, as she prepares to summon her familiar for the first time, along with bracing for the bullying that will surely follow, something miraculous happens. 

The power she summons was thought to be a myth and legend: and it's extremely powerful. 

Accepted by the popular students within the academy, Kara begins to think that her stay at Greenwood will be an easy one. But when a fellow student is viciously murdered, Kara is the sole suspect of the crime, and she must figure out how to clear her name before tragedy can strike again.

But what exactly is the truth when she's going to a three hundred year old boarding school that has secrets?

Word count: Approximately 70,000 words.

title: FaultLine: A Call Of Duty Zombies Fanfiction
description:
I was an average teenager with an average life. And never in my life had I imagined getting stuck in a video game. Well, I have no idea, is this real? 

A survival game to be precise, whose primary antagonist 'Samantha' is sure to prove herself as a 'trigger-happy-parasite' waiting for its right chance to... we'll see that...

I don't kill zombies and hell hounds everyday you know... On top of everything, forming deep bonds with video game characters was also not a part of my plan. 

Nuh,uh!

Things are different here and I really miss the time when I was the controller, the commander and the player. Now we are the puppets and above all, fresh meat...

AZA ARSALAN, a ruthless mafia king hidden behind the respect table paid off a successful CEO, is haunted by his past and the lies that shaped his cold, brutal natural. when AIZA SHAIK, a brilliant and independent fashion mogul living a double life I can under cover agent, crosses his path. title: Hidden Talent
description:
In an alternate universe where having superpowers is a norm in people's lives, Eleanor has a talent in making sand castles ever since she was a child. Despite having the power to manipulate earth and sand, her creations crumble instantly. Now enrolled in a facility which trains people who struggle in using their powers properly, she meets a lonely and secretive man named Will, who isolates himself from her circle of friends despite being roommates. Eleanor's peaceful days in the facility ended right after participating in a tournament, as the parents of a person she knows well, were almost murdered, and an important person working in the facility was kidnapped. With no experience in combat aside from a losing streak in friendly fights against her sister, Eleanor must find ways to improve her powers for her own safety, as well as investigating Will's past which might be related to the case of the kidnapped person.

title: She's Too Naive
description:
What is the definition of a perfect summer?

For small town girl, Ellie Charleston, a perfect summer includes late nights at Dairy Queen with her friends, hot days spent on the beach, and a new name for herself. But, getting a new name in a small town isn't that simple. That is, until Rosen Parker shows up in town, and everything starts to change. A summer romance sparks, giving Ellie the new reputation she was looking for.

But no summer is really what you expect it to be. 

Ellie's fling quickly spins out of control when she finds out the dark truth about Rosen, and unwillingly gets dragged along on a perilous journey. Gone is the charming boy she fell for, replaced by a liar who is constantly on the run. Forced to leave the only place she's ever known, Rosen teaches Ellie the first rule of his lifestyle: Trust no one, not even him.

(Warning: There will be some violence in this story, so if you are uncomfortable with that please do not read)
Tous Droits Réservés

title: SHADOWS OF DESIRE|JK FF| S2
description:
"You think I'm going to let you go again, mon chéri?" 
"Only if you catch me first." 


Warning: If you haven't read Season 1 of Shadows of Desire, what are you even doing here? Trust me, you'll want to read it first because things are about to get way more complicated. And honestly, why miss out on all the steamy chaos?

In Shadows of Desire: Season 2, the storm isn't over-if anything, it's just getting started. Jungkook and Y/N have been through hell and back, but now? Oh, now it's even messier. With old enemies, new betrayals, and a love that refuses to die, the lines between obsession and devotion blur once again.

Mr. Lee's twin is still lurking, but what's his endgame? Jungkook's feelings are tangled, but does Mira have a chance at replacing Y/N? What about the puzzles they've yet to solve-Min Ho, Soobin's reaction to the chaos, and the deeper mysteries that are uncomfortably close to unraveling?

As much as they want to move on, destiny has a wicked sense of humor. Can they truly escape the shadows of their past? Or are they doomed to repeat the same heartbreaking cycle?

Romance, suspense, and a whole lot of drama-get ready to laugh, cry, and gasp because in this season, no one is safe. But the real question remains: Can true love survive even the darkest of shadows?

You won't want to miss out on the romance, the suspense, and the sarcastic banter that might just break your heart... again.

Get ready to lose yourself in a storm of passion, secrets, and the ultimate question-can love survive the shadows of desire, or will it be consumed by them?

title: Seven Sisters and Seven Marks
description:
Embun Sitala Laluna, Tala, was suffering from severe hearing injury. When she was seventeen years old, she made a promise  with the other six girls of her age that they will be sisters forever. All of them were often treated badly in the orphanage. They made incisions of Sanskrit Hindi numeric symbols on their wrists to seal their oath for the sisterhood.

Seven years later, Fulmala Rosa Merona, the fourth sister, found a mysteriously chopped-off human's left hand, bloody with a scar of an incision that was very familiar to her, a symbol of number one in Sanskrit Numerical, with a new incision scar that said "Sisters Forever". She also saw that the first sister, Arawinda Biru, was miserably hanged up in her room, facing her, with her left hand gone.

Many evidences led to prejudgement that Ara could have possibly killed herself. In fear and confusion, the other six women started to believe that their incision scars had become the symbols of some unexplainable curses. They began to experience incomprehensible weirdness.

Tala, the seventh sister, was the only one who didn't believe in the curses. Together with a rookie detective, Damar Irsyad Lazuardi, who later came summoned to investigate the cases, she tried to solve the mysteries.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Set Free
description:
Emancipation: to be set free without the need for guardians. A critical need for fourteen-year-old Sana who can no longer safely live in the house that she was supposed to be able to call her own. After the passing of her biological mother and newborn brother Cyrus, Sana's stepmother Martha has made it impossible to stay. By strong will and the help of only herself, she is set free by the state of California.

With nowhere to turn and no one to turn to Sana meets a fifteen-year-old boy at a local diner who shares her struggles along with new ones. Through him and friends they meet along the way she finds life worth struggling for again. With every new chapter in her life comes a whirlwind of drama. From love, lust, fighting, jealousy, anger, and breaking many laws along the way, will Sana learn to embrace her new life and accept that not everything ends in freedom?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: My newest book "Set Free" Is available now online! Please read, vote, and comment. A story about a young girl emancipated from her home has to make it on her own, she discovers it might not be as easy as she would think. Meeting the local diner boy and his friends, she discovers just how difficult it is to stay safe in the world that is waiting to hurt you and how hard it is to have no choice to blindly trust your life in someone else's hands.

title: Goodbye, Evan [BxB]
description:
In the school's ancient halls, Evan remains a ghost, stuck in limbo since his untimely death fifty years ago. He's used to helping troubled souls, only to be forgotten afterward. 
Theodore appears to be another lost cause, until Evan feels an inexplicable pull toward him. Unable to resist, Evan forms a bond with Theodore unlike any other, defying the rules of his ghostly existence.

 As they unravel the mysteries of Evan's death and the dark secrets hidden within the school's walls, they discover a chilling connection that ties their fates together. With danger lurking around every corner, Evan and Theodore must confront the past to save their futures, uncovering truths that could change everything

title: Rewind: Book 1 - The Third Son
description:
In a not-so-distant future, three-quarters of the world's population have evolved into superior beings called "the dominants", endowed with extraordinary abilities such as telepathy, telekinesis, teleportation, and more. However, these advanced humans are incapable of killing others. Should they attempt to do so, their highly developed nervous systems release a hormone that induces paralyzing pain throughout their bodies. The remaining quarter of the population, possessing no supernatural powers and no such killing barrier, are derogatorily referred to as "the recessives".

One of the few jobs available to "the recessives" is that of executioner, as they can end lives without suffering any repercussions. They are not only scorned for their lack of physical prowess but also feared for their unrestrained capacity for murder. 

In the prestigious Lanes family, the father is a powerful politician, the mother a successful businesswoman, the eldest son a reliable doctor, the second son a popular police officer, and the youngest daughter a famous, talented idol. For years, no one knew they had a third son. He is Gabriel Lanes, the only "recessive" in the family. After seven years in prison for committing murder, Gabriel is determined to start anew in an unwelcoming world with a huge disadvantage. Can Gabriel catch a break, or will his dark past catch up with him? - Updates weekly on Fridays.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Alley B - a passionate storyteller who likes science fiction, drama, and thrilling adventures. I enjoy blending futuristic concepts with deep emotional narratives, extraordinary abilities and human struggles. Dive into my universe and explore the boundaries of imagination and reality.

title: Overwatch: Twisters
description:
Left in the capable hands of the gentle giant Winston, a group of spirited ten-year-olds Amy Ziegler, the daughter of Angela "Mercy" Ziegler; Diego Colomar, the son of Olivia "Sombra" Colomar; Samuel Amari, the son of Faheera "Pharah" Amari and the grandson of Ana Amari; Ethan Oxton, the son of Lena "Tracer" Oxton; Peter Song, the son of Hana "D.Va" Song; Elise Lacroix, the daughter of Amelie "Widowmaker" Lacroix; and Ben Lindholm, the son of Brigitte Lindholm and the grandson of Torbjörn. While their parents and all Overwatch agents, embark on crucial missions for the week, the children spend time with Winston, enjoying their time in Oklahoma for vacation. However, their idyllic getaway is abruptly shattered when a devastating tornado strikes on their first night, leaving them stranded and their beloved guardian, Winston, missing.

Isolated from the outside world and grappling with the sudden loss of their protector, these young heroes must summon their inner strength to navigate the harsh realities of the storm-ravaged landscape. As they face the relentless challenges of tornado season, they uncover a chilling truth from a Talon leader in Oklahoma: their quest to find Winston is inextricably linked to uncovering Overwatch's past mistakes in the region.

With unwavering determination, the children forge ahead, aided by unlikely allies-Brian and Timmy, knowledgeable brothers from the Overwatch Museum who help defeat two Talon operatives, and Alejandra, a resilient baker from Panadería Las Nieblas (Spanish for "The Fogs" Bakery) in Dorado. Together, they embark on a dangerous adventure to unravel Winston's disappearance's mysteries, rectify past errors, and survive an unprecedented outbreak of destructive tornadoes. Their journey will test their courage, ingenuity, and the bonds of friendship as they strive to become the heroes their parents always knew they could be.

Disclaimer: Overwatch characters belong to Blizzard Entertainment. OC characters are my creation.
Tous Droits Réservés

authorBio:
AUTHOR BIO

Dr. Thomas Davison has taught college coursework inside two State Prisons in Ohio for the past eight years. His observations and interactions with his incarcerated students have deeply moved him. This motivated him to create poems and short stories about their daily lives and experiences. Thomas has recently started a not-for-profit Entrepreneur Services for Felons (ESF). He has dedicated 100% of his writing earnings to providing free one-on-one support services for felons and ex-felons. Dr. Davison has created two Writing Clubs within the prisons. These incarcerated students are his beta readers to ensure he speaks in their voice and keeps it honest.

His published novels include:

The Boy With Strange Eyes: award-winning YA Fantasy.

Different Prisons: NF-Memoirs, Dr. Davison's personal story about teaching inside the prisons. 

How to Write a Winning Dissertation:  Academic how to book.
